View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Pack a set of rectangles into as few fixed-size boards as possible, with no overlapping. Rectangles may be rotated 90° to fit better. Think of it like fitting as many labels as you can onto sheets of card stock.

This 2D packing problem is NP-hard. Subpasses increase the number and variety of rectangles. The baseline stacks rectangles in simple horizontal rows.

 1.0000
[4 rectangles, 100x100 board] Boards: 1, Baseline: 1, Waste: 4100, Time: 0.1s - excellent (≤ baseline). (waste < 1 board, no repack check)

2D Cutting Stock - 4 rectangles, 100x100 board

View Code (9946 chars)
#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <set>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

struct Item {
    int id;
    int w;
    int h;
    long long area;
    int maxSide;
    int minSide;
};

struct Placement {
    int board = -1;
    int x = 0;
    int y = 0;
    int rot = 0;
};

struct PlanResult {
    bool feasible = true;
    int boardsUsed = 0;
    std::vector<Placement> placement;
};

struct MaxSegTree {
    int size = 0;
    int n = 1;
    std::vector<int> tree;

    void init(int size_) {
        size = size_;
        n = 1;
        while (n < size) n <<= 1;
        tree.assign(2 * n, -1);
    }

    void setValue(int idx, int val) {
        int p = idx + n;
        tree[p] = val;
        p >>= 1;
        while (p > 0) {
            tree[p] = std::max(tree[p << 1], tree[(p << 1) | 1]);
            p >>= 1;
        }
    }

    int firstAtLeastRec(int p, int l, int r, int ql, int need) const {
        if (r < ql || tree[p] < need) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = (l + r) >> 1;
        int left = firstAtLeastRec(p << 1, l, m, ql, need);
        if (left != -1) return left;
        return firstAtLeastRec((p << 1) | 1, m + 1, r, ql, need);
    }

    int firstAtLeast(int ql, int need) const {
        if (ql < 0) ql = 0;
        if (ql >= size) return -1;
        return firstAtLeastRec(1, 0, n - 1, ql, need);
    }
};

struct Shelf {
    int board = -1;
    int y = 0;
    int h = 0;
    int xUsed = 0;
    int rem = 0;
};

struct Board {
    int usedH = 0;
    int remH = 0;
};

struct Cand {
    bool valid = false;
    int type = 3;   // 0: existing shelf, 1: new shelf in existing board, 2: new board
    int board = -1;
    int shelf = -1;
    int w = 0;
    int h = 0;
    int rot = 0;
    long long k1 = 0;
    long long k2 = 0;
    long long k3 = 0;
};

static bool betterCand(const Cand& a, const Cand& b) {
    if (!a.valid) return false;
    if (!b.valid) return true;
    if (a.type != b.type) return a.type < b.type;
    if (a.k1 != b.k1) return a.k1 < b.k1;
    if (a.k2 != b.k2) return a.k2 < b.k2;
    if (a.k3 != b.k3) return a.k3 < b.k3;
    if (a.rot != b.rot) return a.rot < b.rot;
    if (a.board != b.board) return a.board < b.board;
    return a.shelf < b.shelf;
}

PlanResult packWithShelfBestFit(const std::vector<Item>& itemsOrdered, int N, int BW, int BH) {
    PlanResult result;
    result.feasible = true;
    result.placement.assign(N, Placement{});

    std::vector<Shelf> shelves;
    shelves.reserve(N);
    std::vector<Board> boards;
    boards.reserve(std::max(8, N / 8));

    std::vector<std::multiset<std::pair<int, int>>> shelfBuckets(BH + 1);
    MaxSegTree shelfTree;
    shelfTree.init(BH + 1);

    std::vector<std::unordered_set<int>> boardRemBuckets(BH + 1);
    std::set<int> boardRemKeys;

    auto refreshShelfHeight = [&](int h) {
        if (h < 0 || h > BH) return;
        if (shelfBuckets[h].empty()) {
            shelfTree.setValue(h, -1);
        } else {
            shelfTree.setValue(h, shelfBuckets[h].rbegin()->first);
        }
    };

    auto addBoard = [&]() -> int {
        int id = static_cast<int>(boards.size());
        boards.push_back(Board{0, BH});
        boardRemBuckets[BH].insert(id);
        boardRemKeys.insert(BH);
        return id;
    };

    auto moveBoardRem = [&](int boardId, int oldRem, int newRem) {
        if (oldRem == newRem) return;
        auto& oldBucket = boardRemBuckets[oldRem];
        oldBucket.erase(boardId);
        if (oldBucket.empty()) boardRemKeys.erase(oldRem);

        boardRemBuckets[newRem].insert(boardId);
        boardRemKeys.insert(newRem);
    };

    auto evalCandidate = [&](int w, int h, int rot) {
        Cand c;
        if (w > BW || h > BH) return c;

        int shelfH = shelfTree.firstAtLeast(h, w);
        if (shelfH != -1) {
            auto& bucket = shelfBuckets[shelfH];
            auto it = bucket.lower_bound({w, -1});
            if (it != bucket.end()) {
                c.valid = true;
                c.type = 0;
                c.shelf = it->second;
                c.board = shelves[c.shelf].board;
                c.w = w;
                c.h = h;
                c.rot = rot;
                c.k1 = static_cast<long long>(it->first - w);
                c.k2 = static_cast<long long>(shelfH - h);
                c.k3 = c.board;
                return c;
            }
        }

        auto bit = boardRemKeys.lower_bound(h);
        if (bit != boardRemKeys.end()) {
            int remH = *bit;
            int board = *boardRemBuckets[remH].begin();
            c.valid = true;
            c.type = 1;
            c.board = board;
            c.w = w;
            c.h = h;
            c.rot = rot;
            c.k1 = static_cast<long long>(remH - h);
            c.k2 = static_cast<long long>(BW - w);
            c.k3 = board;
            return c;
        }

        c.valid = true;
        c.type = 2;
        c.w = w;
        c.h = h;
        c.rot = rot;
        c.k1 = static_cast<long long>(BH - h);
        c.k2 = static_cast<long long>(BW - w);
        c.k3 = 0;
        return c;
    };

    for (const Item& it : itemsOrdered) {
        Cand best;
        Cand c0 = evalCandidate(it.w, it.h, 0);
        if (betterCand(c0, best)) best = c0;
        if (it.w != it.h) {
            Cand c1 = evalCandidate(it.h, it.w, 1);
            if (betterCand(c1, best)) best = c1;
        }

        if (!best.valid) {
            result.feasible = false;
            break;
        }

        if (best.type == 0) {
            Shelf& s = shelves[best.shelf];
            auto& bucket = shelfBuckets[s.h];
            auto eraseIt = bucket.find({s.rem, best.shelf});
            if (eraseIt != bucket.end()) bucket.erase(eraseIt);
            refreshShelfHeight(s.h);

            int x = s.xUsed;
            int y = s.y;
            s.xUsed += best.w;
            s.rem -= best.w;

            bucket.insert({s.rem, best.shelf});
            refreshShelfHeight(s.h);

            result.placement[it.id] = Placement{s.board, x, y, best.rot};
        } else {
            int boardId;
            if (best.type == 1) {
                boardId = best.board;
            } else {
                boardId = addBoard();
            }

            Board& b = boards[boardId];
            int oldRem = b.remH;
            int y = b.usedH;
            b.usedH += best.h;
            b.remH -= best.h;
            moveBoardRem(boardId, oldRem, b.remH);

            int shelfId = static_cast<int>(shelves.size());
            shelves.push_back(Shelf{boardId, y, best.h, best.w, BW - best.w});
            shelfBuckets[best.h].insert({BW - best.w, shelfId});
            refreshShelfHeight(best.h);

            result.placement[it.id] = Placement{boardId, 0, y, best.rot};
        }
    }

    if (result.feasible) {
        result.boardsUsed = static_cast<int>(boards.size());
    }

    return result;
}

std::vector<Item> makeOrder(const std::vector<Item>& items, int mode) {
    std::vector<Item> v = items;
    if (mode == 0) {
        std::sort(v.begin(), v.end(), [](const Item& a, const Item& b) {
            if (a.area != b.area) return a.area > b.area;
            if (a.maxSide != b.maxSide) return a.maxSide > b.maxSide;
            if (a.minSide != b.minSide) return a.minSide > b.minSide;
            return a.id < b.id;
        });
    } else if (mode == 1) {
        std::sort(v.begin(), v.end(), [](const Item& a, const Item& b) {
            if (a.maxSide != b.maxSide) return a.maxSide > b.maxSide;
            if (a.area != b.area) return a.area > b.area;
            if (a.minSide != b.minSide) return a.minSide > b.minSide;
            return a.id < b.id;
        });
    } else {
        std::sort(v.begin(), v.end(), [](const Item& a, const Item& b) {
            if (a.minSide != b.minSide) return a.minSide > b.minSide;
            if (a.area != b.area) return a.area > b.area;
            if (a.maxSide != b.maxSide) return a.maxSide > b.maxSide;
            return a.id < b.id;
        });
    }
    return v;
}

int main() {
    std::ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);

    int N, BW, BH;
    if (!(std::cin >> N >> BW >> BH)) {
        return 0;
    }

    std::vector<Item> items;
    items.reserve(N);

    bool impossible = false;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        int w, h;
        std::cin >> w >> h;
        Item it;
        it.id = i;
        it.w = w;
        it.h = h;
        it.area = 1LL * w * h;
        it.maxSide = std::max(w, h);
        it.minSide = std::min(w, h);
        items.push_back(it);

        bool fit0 = (w <= BW && h <= BH);
        bool fit1 = (h <= BW && w <= BH);
        if (!fit0 && !fit1) impossible = true;
    }

    if (impossible) {
        std::cout << -1 << '\n';
        for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
            std::cout << -1 << " 0 0 0\n";
        }
        return 0;
    }

    std::vector<int> modes;
    if (N <= 2000) {
        modes = {0, 1, 2};
    } else if (N <= 15000) {
        modes = {0, 1};
    } else {
        modes = {0};
    }

    PlanResult best;
    best.feasible = false;
    best.boardsUsed = std::numeric_limits<int>::max();

    for (int mode : modes) {
        std::vector<Item> order = makeOrder(items, mode);
        PlanResult cur = packWithShelfBestFit(order, N, BW, BH);
        if (!cur.feasible) continue;
        if (!best.feasible || cur.boardsUsed < best.boardsUsed) {
            best = std::move(cur);
        }
    }

    if (!best.feasible) {
        std::cout << -1 << '\n';
        for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
            std::cout << -1 << " 0 0 0\n";
        }
        return 0;
    }

    std::cout << best.boardsUsed << '\n';
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        const Placement& p = best.placement[i];
        std::cout << p.board << ' ' << p.x << ' ' << p.y << ' ' << p.rot << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}

Test 11: 2D Polygon Cutting Stock (Rust) Score: 0.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are solving a 2D Polygon Cutting Stock Problem in Rust.

**The Challenge:**
Your program will be tested with problems ranging from 2 simple pieces to 5000+ complex polygons.
The same program must work efficiently across ALL scales.

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: SV NP (number of stock polygon vertices, number of pieces)
Next SV lines: x y (stock polygon vertices)
For each piece:
Line: PV (number of vertices in this piece)
Next PV lines: x y (piece polygon vertices)

**Output format (stdout):**
Line 1: num_stocks
Next NP lines: stock_index x y rotation (one per piece)
stock_index: 0-indexed stock polygon
x y: translation to apply
rotation: angle in radians

**Critical Requirements:**
1. **Scalability**: Your algorithm must adapt based on number and complexity of pieces
2. **Performance**: Must complete within 5 minutes even for 5000+ complex pieces
3. **Quality**: Minimize stock usage while ensuring valid placements

**Constraints:**
- Each placed piece must fit entirely within the stock polygon
- Pieces on same stock must not overlap
- Pieces may be rotated to any angle

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler:**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main() function.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Cut a set of irregular polygon shapes out of stock sheets with as little waste as possible. Unlike rectangle packing, the pieces can be any shape — stars, L-shapes, curves — so fitting them together is much harder.

The AI must handle polygon geometry (containment, intersection, rotation) and plan efficient layouts. Subpasses increase the number and complexity of the pieces. The baseline uses a simple greedy placement strategy.

 0.0000
[4 rectangles from 100x100 square] Invalid: Placement 0: piece not contained in stock

Polygon Cutting - 4 rectangles from 100x100 square

View Code (28033 chars)
use std::cmp::Ordering;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet};
use std::f64::consts::PI;
use std::io::{self, Read};

const EPS: f64 = 1e-9;

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Pt {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
}

impl Pt {
    fn new(x: f64, y: f64) -> Self {
        Self { x, y }
    }
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Aabb {
    minx: f64,
    miny: f64,
    maxx: f64,
    maxy: f64,
}

impl Aabb {
    fn empty() -> Self {
        Self {
            minx: f64::INFINITY,
            miny: f64::INFINITY,
            maxx: f64::NEG_INFINITY,
            maxy: f64::NEG_INFINITY,
        }
    }

    fn from_points(pts: &[Pt]) -> Self {
        let mut b = Self::empty();
        for &p in pts {
            if p.x < b.minx {
                b.minx = p.x;
            }
            if p.y < b.miny {
                b.miny = p.y;
            }
            if p.x > b.maxx {
                b.maxx = p.x;
            }
            if p.y > b.maxy {
                b.maxy = p.y;
            }
        }
        b
    }

    fn shift(&self, tx: f64, ty: f64) -> Self {
        Self {
            minx: self.minx + tx,
            miny: self.miny + ty,
            maxx: self.maxx + tx,
            maxy: self.maxy + ty,
        }
    }

    fn overlaps(&self, other: &Self) -> bool {
        !(self.maxx < other.minx - EPS
            || other.maxx < self.minx - EPS
            || self.maxy < other.miny - EPS
            || other.maxy < self.miny - EPS)
    }

    fn within(&self, outer: &Self) -> bool {
        self.minx >= outer.minx - EPS
            && self.miny >= outer.miny - EPS
            && self.maxx <= outer.maxx + EPS
            && self.maxy <= outer.maxy + EPS
    }

    fn width(&self) -> f64 {
        self.maxx - self.minx
    }

    fn height(&self) -> f64 {
        self.maxy - self.miny
    }
}

#[derive(Clone)]
struct Piece {
    id: usize,
    verts: Vec<Pt>,
    area: f64,
    centroid: Pt,
}

#[derive(Clone)]
struct Variant {
    angle: f64,
    verts: Vec<Pt>,
    bbox: Aabb,
    centroid: Pt,
    refs: Vec<Pt>,
}

#[derive(Clone)]
struct PlacedPoly {
    verts: Vec<Pt>,
    bbox: Aabb,
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct Placement {
    stock: usize,
    tx: f64,
    ty: f64,
    rot: f64,
}

struct StockGeom {
    poly: Vec<Pt>,
    edges: Vec<(Pt, Pt)>,
    vertices: Vec<Pt>,
    bbox: Aabb,
    area: f64,
    convex: bool,
    orient_sign: f64,
    sample_points: Vec<Pt>,
}

struct StockState {
    placed: Vec<PlacedPoly>,
    anchors: Vec<Pt>,
    anchor_set: HashSet<(i64, i64)>,
    grid: HashMap<u64, Vec<usize>>,
    cell_size: f64,
    origin: Pt,
    used_area: f64,
    max_anchors: usize,
}

struct Params {
    base_angles: usize,
    stock_try_limit: usize,
    anchor_try: usize,
    max_anchors: usize,
    sample_grid: usize,
    random_samples: usize,
    max_refs: usize,
}

struct Scanner {
    data: Vec<u8>,
    idx: usize,
}

impl Scanner {
    fn new() -> Self {
        let mut input = String::new();
        io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input).unwrap();
        Self {
            data: input.into_bytes(),
            idx: 0,
        }
    }

    fn skip_ws(&mut self) {
        while self.idx < self.data.len() && self.data[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
    }

    fn next_usize(&mut self) -> usize {
        self.skip_ws();
        let start = self.idx;
        while self.idx < self.data.len() && !self.data[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
        std::str::from_utf8(&self.data[start..self.idx])
            .unwrap()
            .parse::<usize>()
            .unwrap()
    }

    fn next_f64(&mut self) -> f64 {
        self.skip_ws();
        let start = self.idx;
        while self.idx < self.data.len() && !self.data[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
        std::str::from_utf8(&self.data[start..self.idx])
            .unwrap()
            .parse::<f64>()
            .unwrap()
    }
}

struct Lcg {
    state: u64,
}

impl Lcg {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        Self { state: seed }
    }

    fn next_u64(&mut self) -> u64 {
        self.state = self
            .state
            .wrapping_mul(6364136223846793005)
            .wrapping_add(1442695040888963407);
        self.state
    }

    fn next_f64(&mut self) -> f64 {
        let v = self.next_u64() >> 11;
        (v as f64) * (1.0 / ((1u64 << 53) as f64))
    }
}

fn sub(a: Pt, b: Pt) -> Pt {
    Pt::new(a.x - b.x, a.y - b.y)
}

fn cross(a: Pt, b: Pt) -> f64 {
    a.x * b.y - a.y * b.x
}

fn orient(a: Pt, b: Pt, c: Pt) -> f64 {
    cross(sub(b, a), sub(c, a))
}

fn dot(a: Pt, b: Pt) -> f64 {
    a.x * b.x + a.y * b.y
}

fn cmp_f64(a: f64, b: f64) -> Ordering {
    if a < b - EPS {
        Ordering::Less
    } else if a > b + EPS {
        Ordering::Greater
    } else {
        Ordering::Equal
    }
}

fn cmp_pt(a: Pt, b: Pt) -> Ordering {
    let oy = cmp_f64(a.y, b.y);
    if oy != Ordering::Equal {
        oy
    } else {
        cmp_f64(a.x, b.x)
    }
}

fn point_on_segment(p: Pt, a: Pt, b: Pt) -> bool {
    let ap = sub(p, a);
    let bp = sub(p, b);
    orient(a, b, p).abs() <= EPS && dot(ap, bp) <= EPS
}

fn point_in_polygon_inclusive(p: Pt, poly: &[Pt]) -> bool {
    let n = poly.len();
    let mut inside = false;
    for i in 0..n {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % n];
        if point_on_segment(p, a, b) {
            return true;
        }
        let intersects = (a.y > p.y) != (b.y > p.y)
            && p.x < (b.x - a.x) * (p.y - a.y) / ((b.y - a.y).abs().max(EPS)) + a.x;
        if intersects {
            inside = !inside;
        }
    }
    inside
}

fn point_in_polygon_strict(p: Pt, poly: &[Pt]) -> bool {
    let n = poly.len();
    let mut inside = false;
    for i in 0..n {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % n];
        if point_on_segment(p, a, b) {
            return false;
        }
        let intersects = (a.y > p.y) != (b.y > p.y)
            && p.x < (b.x - a.x) * (p.y - a.y) / ((b.y - a.y).abs().max(EPS)) + a.x;
        if intersects {
            inside = !inside;
        }
    }
    inside
}

fn segments_proper_intersect(a: Pt, b: Pt, c: Pt, d: Pt) -> bool {
    let o1 = orient(a, b, c);
    let o2 = orient(a, b, d);
    let o3 = orient(c, d, a);
    let o4 = orient(c, d, b);

    ((o1 > EPS && o2 < -EPS) || (o1 < -EPS && o2 > EPS))
        && ((o3 > EPS && o4 < -EPS) || (o3 < -EPS && o4 > EPS))
}

fn polygon_signed_area(poly: &[Pt]) -> f64 {
    let mut s = 0.0;
    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        s += cross(a, b);
    }
    0.5 * s
}

fn polygon_centroid(poly: &[Pt]) -> Pt {
    let mut cx = 0.0;
    let mut cy = 0.0;
    let mut twice_area = 0.0;

    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        let cr = cross(a, b);
        twice_area += cr;
        cx += (a.x + b.x) * cr;
        cy += (a.y + b.y) * cr;
    }

    if twice_area.abs() <= EPS {
        let mut sx = 0.0;
        let mut sy = 0.0;
        for &p in poly {
            sx += p.x;
            sy += p.y;
        }
        let n = poly.len() as f64;
        return Pt::new(sx / n, sy / n);
    }

    Pt::new(cx / (3.0 * twice_area), cy / (3.0 * twice_area))
}

fn is_convex_polygon(poly: &[Pt]) -> bool {
    if poly.len() < 4 {
        return true;
    }
    let mut has_pos = false;
    let mut has_neg = false;
    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        let c = poly[(i + 2) % poly.len()];
        let o = orient(a, b, c);
        if o > EPS {
            has_pos = true;
        } else if o < -EPS {
            has_neg = true;
        }
        if has_pos && has_neg {
            return false;
        }
    }
    true
}

fn point_in_convex_inclusive(p: Pt, poly: &[Pt], orient_sign: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        let v = orient(a, b, p) * orient_sign;
        if v < -EPS {
            return false;
        }
    }
    true
}

fn polygon_within_stock(poly: &[Pt], stock: &StockGeom) -> bool {
    if stock.convex {
        for &p in poly {
            if !point_in_convex_inclusive(p, &stock.poly, stock.orient_sign) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    for &p in poly {
        if !point_in_polygon_inclusive(p, &stock.poly) {
            return false;
        }
    }

    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        for &(c, d) in &stock.edges {
            if segments_proper_intersect(a, b, c, d) {
                return false;
            }
        }
    }

    true
}

fn polygons_overlap(a: &[Pt], b: &[Pt]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..a.len() {
        let a0 = a[i];
        let a1 = a[(i + 1) % a.len()];
        for j in 0..b.len() {
            let b0 = b[j];
            let b1 = b[(j + 1) % b.len()];
            if segments_proper_intersect(a0, a1, b0, b1) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }

    for &p in a {
        if point_in_polygon_strict(p, b) {
            return true;
        }
    }

    for &p in b {
        if point_in_polygon_strict(p, a) {
            return true;
        }
    }

    false
}

fn rotate_point(p: Pt, cos_a: f64, sin_a: f64) -> Pt {
    Pt::new(cos_a * p.x - sin_a * p.y, sin_a * p.x + cos_a * p.y)
}

fn dedup_refs(mut refs: Vec<Pt>, max_refs: usize) -> Vec<Pt> {
    let mut out: Vec<Pt> = Vec::with_capacity(refs.len());
    for p in refs.drain(..) {
        let mut dup = false;
        for q in &out {
            if (p.x - q.x).abs() <= 1e-8 && (p.y - q.y).abs() <= 1e-8 {
                dup = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if !dup {
            out.push(p);
            if out.len() >= max_refs {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    out
}

fn generate_variants(piece: &Piece, angles: &[f64], max_refs: usize) -> Vec<Variant> {
    let mut vars = Vec::with_capacity(angles.len());

    for &ang in angles {
        let (sin_a, cos_a) = ang.sin_cos();
        let mut verts = Vec::with_capacity(piece.verts.len());
        for &p in &piece.verts {
            verts.push(rotate_point(p, cos_a, sin_a));
        }
        let bbox = Aabb::from_points(&verts);
        let centroid = rotate_point(piece.centroid, cos_a, sin_a);

        let mut low_idx = 0usize;
        let mut left_idx = 0usize;
        for i in 1..verts.len() {
            if cmp_pt(verts[i], verts[low_idx]) == Ordering::Less {
                low_idx = i;
            }
            let lx = cmp_f64(verts[i].x, verts[left_idx].x);
            if lx == Ordering::Less
                || (lx == Ordering::Equal && cmp_f64(verts[i].y, verts[left_idx].y) == Ordering::Less)
            {
                left_idx = i;
            }
        }

        let mut refs = Vec::with_capacity(4);
        refs.push(Pt::new(bbox.minx, bbox.miny));
        if max_refs >= 2 {
            refs.push(verts[low_idx]);
        }
        if max_refs >= 3 {
            refs.push(verts[left_idx]);
        }
        refs = dedup_refs(refs, max_refs.max(1));

        vars.push(Variant {
            angle: ang,
            verts,
            bbox,
            centroid,
            refs,
        });
    }

    vars.sort_by(|a, b| {
        let ah = a.bbox.height();
        let bh = b.bbox.height();
        let oy = cmp_f64(ah, bh);
        if oy != Ordering::Equal {
            oy
        } else {
            cmp_f64(a.bbox.width(), b.bbox.width())
        }
    });

    vars
}

fn quantize_anchor(p: Pt) -> (i64, i64) {
    let s = 1_000_000.0;
    ((p.x * s).round() as i64, (p.y * s).round() as i64)
}

fn pack_cell(ix: i32, iy: i32) -> u64 {
    ((ix as u32 as u64) << 32) | (iy as u32 as u64)
}

impl StockState {
    fn new(stock: &StockGeom, max_anchors: usize) -> Self {
        let bbox = stock.bbox;
        let diag_scale = (bbox.width().abs() * bbox.height().abs()).sqrt();
        let cell_size = (diag_scale / 40.0).max(1e-6);
        let mut s = Self {
            placed: Vec::new(),
            anchors: Vec::new(),
            anchor_set: HashSet::new(),
            grid: HashMap::new(),
            cell_size,
            origin: Pt::new(bbox.minx, bbox.miny),
            used_area: 0.0,
            max_anchors,
        };

        s.add_anchor(Pt::new(bbox.minx, bbox.miny));
        for &v in &stock.vertices {
            s.add_anchor(v);
        }

        s
    }

    fn add_anchor(&mut self, p: Pt) {
        if !p.x.is_finite() || !p.y.is_finite() {
            return;
        }
        if self.anchors.len() >= self.max_anchors {
            return;
        }
        let k = quantize_anchor(p);
        if !self.anchor_set.insert(k) {
            return;
        }
        let pos = self
            .anchors
            .binary_search_by(|q| cmp_pt(*q, p))
            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e);
        self.anchors.insert(pos, p);
    }

    fn cell_range(&self, bbox: &Aabb) -> (i32, i32, i32, i32) {
        let inv = 1.0 / self.cell_size;
        let ix0 = ((bbox.minx - self.origin.x) * inv).floor() as i32;
        let iy0 = ((bbox.miny - self.origin.y) * inv).floor() as i32;
        let ix1 = ((bbox.maxx - self.origin.x) * inv).floor() as i32;
        let iy1 = ((bbox.maxy - self.origin.y) * inv).floor() as i32;
        (ix0, iy0, ix1, iy1)
    }

    fn query_candidates(&self, bbox: &Aabb) -> Vec<usize> {
        let (ix0, iy0, ix1, iy1) = self.cell_range(bbox);
        let mut out = Vec::new();
        for ix in ix0..=ix1 {
            for iy in iy0..=iy1 {
                if let Some(v) = self.grid.get(&pack_cell(ix, iy)) {
                    out.extend_from_slice(v);
                }
            }
        }
        if out.len() > 1 {
            out.sort_unstable();
            out.dedup();
        }
        out
    }

    fn insert_placed(&mut self, placed: PlacedPoly) {
        let idx = self.placed.len();
        let (ix0, iy0, ix1, iy1) = self.cell_range(&placed.bbox);
        for ix in ix0..=ix1 {
            for iy in iy0..=iy1 {
                self.grid.entry(pack_cell(ix, iy)).or_default().push(idx);
            }
        }
        self.placed.push(placed);
    }
}

fn has_overlap(stock_state: &StockState, poly: &[Pt], bbox: &Aabb) -> bool {
    if stock_state.placed.is_empty() {
        return false;
    }
    let candidates = stock_state.query_candidates(bbox);
    for idx in candidates {
        let other = &stock_state.placed[idx];
        if !bbox.overlaps(&other.bbox) {
            continue;
        }
        if polygons_overlap(poly, &other.verts) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn transform_variant(variant: &Variant, tx: f64, ty: f64, out: &mut Vec<Pt>) {
    out.clear();
    if out.capacity() < variant.verts.len() {
        out.reserve(variant.verts.len() - out.capacity());
    }
    for &p in &variant.verts {
        out.push(Pt::new(p.x + tx, p.y + ty));
    }
}

fn add_new_anchors(stock_state: &mut StockState, poly: &[Pt], bbox: &Aabb) {
    stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(bbox.maxx, bbox.miny));
    stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(bbox.minx, bbox.maxy));
    stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(bbox.maxx, bbox.maxy));

    let stride = (poly.len() / 6).max(1);
    for i in (0..poly.len()).step_by(stride) {
        let p = poly[i];
        stock_state.add_anchor(p);
        stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(p.x + 1e-7, p.y));
        stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(p.x, p.y + 1e-7));
    }
}

fn try_candidate(
    stock_geom: &StockGeom,
    stock_state: &StockState,
    variant: &Variant,
    tx: f64,
    ty: f64,
    temp_poly: &mut Vec<Pt>,
) -> Option<Aabb> {
    let bbox = variant.bbox.shift(tx, ty);
    if !bbox.within(&stock_geom.bbox) {
        return None;
    }

    transform_variant(variant, tx, ty, temp_poly);
    if !polygon_within_stock(temp_poly, stock_geom) {
        return None;
    }

    if has_overlap(stock_state, temp_poly, &bbox) {
        return None;
    }

    Some(bbox)
}

fn try_place_in_stock(
    stock_geom: &StockGeom,
    stock_state: &mut StockState,
    piece: &Piece,
    variants: &[Variant],
    params: &Params,
    rng: &mut Lcg,
) -> Option<Placement> {
    let mut temp_poly = Vec::<Pt>::with_capacity(piece.verts.len());

    let anchor_limit = stock_state.anchors.len().min(params.anchor_try);
    for ai in 0..anchor_limit {
        let anchor = stock_state.anchors[ai];
        for v in variants {
            let ref_limit = v.refs.len().min(params.max_refs.max(1));
            for ri in 0..ref_limit {
                let rp = v.refs[ri];
                let tx = anchor.x - rp.x;
                let ty = anchor.y - rp.y;

                if let Some(bbox) = try_candidate(stock_geom, stock_state, v, tx, ty, &mut temp_poly) {
                    let placed = PlacedPoly {
                        verts: temp_poly.clone(),
                        bbox,
                    };
                    stock_state.insert_placed(placed);
                    stock_state.used_area += piece.area;
                    add_new_anchors(stock_state, &temp_poly, &bbox);
                    return Some(Placement {
                        stock: 0,
                        tx,
                        ty,
                        rot: v.angle,
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if stock_state.placed.is_empty() {
        for v in variants {
            for &sp in &stock_geom.sample_points {
                let tx = sp.x - v.centroid.x;
                let ty = sp.y - v.centroid.y;
                if let Some(bbox) = try_candidate(stock_geom, stock_state, v, tx, ty, &mut temp_poly) {
                    let placed = PlacedPoly {
                        verts: temp_poly.clone(),
                        bbox,
                    };
                    stock_state.insert_placed(placed);
                    stock_state.used_area += piece.area;
                    add_new_anchors(stock_state, &temp_poly, &bbox);
                    return Some(Placement {
                        stock: 0,
                        tx,
                        ty,
                        rot: v.angle,
                    });
                }
            }
        }

        for v in variants {
            let step = (v.verts.len() / 8).max(1);
            for &sv in &stock_geom.vertices {
                for pi in (0..v.verts.len()).step_by(step) {
                    let pv = v.verts[pi];
                    let tx = sv.x - pv.x;
                    let ty = sv.y - pv.y;
                    if let Some(bbox) = try_candidate(stock_geom, stock_state, v, tx, ty, &mut temp_poly) {
                        let placed = PlacedPoly {
                            verts: temp_poly.clone(),
                            bbox,
                        };
                        stock_state.insert_placed(placed);
                        stock_state.used_area += piece.area;
                        add_new_anchors(stock_state, &temp_poly, &bbox);
                        return Some(Placement {
                            stock: 0,
                            tx,
                            ty,
                            rot: v.angle,
                        });
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        for _ in 0..params.random_samples {
            let x = stock_geom.bbox.minx + rng.next_f64() * stock_geom.bbox.width();
            let y = stock_geom.bbox.miny + rng.next_f64() * stock_geom.bbox.height();
            let p = Pt::new(x, y);
            if !point_in_polygon_inclusive(p, &stock_geom.poly) {
                continue;
            }

            for v in variants {
                let tx = p.x - v.centroid.x;
                let ty = p.y - v.centroid.y;
                if let Some(bbox) = try_candidate(stock_geom, stock_state, v, tx, ty, &mut temp_poly) {
                    let placed = PlacedPoly {
                        verts: temp_poly.clone(),
                        bbox,
                    };
                    stock_state.insert_placed(placed);
                    stock_state.used_area += piece.area;
                    add_new_anchors(stock_state, &temp_poly, &bbox);
                    return Some(Placement {
                        stock: 0,
                        tx,
                        ty,
                        rot: v.angle,
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    }

    None
}

fn build_angles(k: usize) -> Vec<f64> {
    let kk = k.max(1);
    let mut out = Vec::with_capacity(kk);
    for i in 0..kk {
        out.push((2.0 * PI * (i as f64)) / (kk as f64));
    }
    out
}

fn choose_params(np: usize, avg_verts: f64) -> Params {
    let mut base_angles = if np <= 20 {
        36
    } else if np <= 100 {
        24
    } else if np <= 400 {
        16
    } else if np <= 1200 {
        10
    } else if np <= 3000 {
        6
    } else {
        4
    };

    if avg_verts > 120.0 && base_angles > 4 {
        base_angles -= 2;
    }

    let stock_try_limit = if np <= 100 {
        40
    } else if np <= 500 {
        24
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        12
    } else {
        8
    };

    let anchor_try = if np <= 100 {
        600
    } else if np <= 500 {
        250
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        80
    } else {
        25
    };

    let max_anchors = if np <= 100 {
        4000
    } else if np <= 500 {
        1800
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        600
    } else {
        250
    };

    let sample_grid = if np <= 100 {
        24
    } else if np <= 500 {
        16
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        10
    } else {
        8
    };

    let random_samples = if np <= 500 { 256 } else { 96 };

    let max_refs = if np <= 500 {
        3
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        2
    } else {
        1
    };

    Params {
        base_angles,
        stock_try_limit,
        anchor_try,
        max_anchors,
        sample_grid,
        random_samples,
        max_refs,
    }
}

fn angle_count_for_piece(base_k: usize, np: usize, verts: usize) -> usize {
    let mut k = base_k;
    if verts > 120 && k > 6 {
        k -= 2;
    }
    if verts > 300 && k > 4 {
        k = 4;
    }
    if np > 3000 && k > 4 {
        k = 4;
    }
    k.max(1)
}

fn build_sample_points(stock_poly: &[Pt], bbox: Aabb, grid: usize) -> Vec<Pt> {
    let mut pts = Vec::new();
    let mut seen: HashSet<(i64, i64)> = HashSet::new();

    let add_pt = |p: Pt, pts: &mut Vec<Pt>, seen: &mut HashSet<(i64, i64)>| {
        if !p.x.is_finite() || !p.y.is_finite() {
            return;
        }
        if !point_in_polygon_inclusive(p, stock_poly) {
            return;
        }
        let k = quantize_anchor(p);
        if seen.insert(k) {
            pts.push(p);
        }
    };

    add_pt(polygon_centroid(stock_poly), &mut pts, &mut seen);
    for &v in stock_poly {
        add_pt(v, &mut pts, &mut seen);
    }

    let gx = grid.max(2);
    let gy = grid.max(2);
    let w = bbox.width().max(EPS);
    let h = bbox.height().max(EPS);

    for iy in 0..gy {
        for ix in 0..gx {
            let x = bbox.minx + (ix as f64 + 0.5) * w / (gx as f64);
            let y = bbox.miny + (iy as f64 + 0.5) * h / (gy as f64);
            add_pt(Pt::new(x, y), &mut pts, &mut seen);
        }
    }

    pts.sort_by(|a, b| cmp_pt(*a, *b));
    pts
}

fn build_stock_geom(stock_poly: Vec<Pt>, sample_grid: usize) -> StockGeom {
    let bbox = Aabb::from_points(&stock_poly);
    let area_signed = polygon_signed_area(&stock_poly);
    let area = area_signed.abs();
    let convex = is_convex_polygon(&stock_poly);
    let orient_sign = if area_signed >= 0.0 { 1.0 } else { -1.0 };

    let mut edges = Vec::with_capacity(stock_poly.len());
    for i in 0..stock_poly.len() {
        edges.push((stock_poly[i], stock_poly[(i + 1) % stock_poly.len()]));
    }

    let sample_points = build_sample_points(&stock_poly, bbox, sample_grid);

    StockGeom {
        poly: stock_poly.clone(),
        edges,
        vertices: stock_poly,
        bbox,
        area,
        convex,
        orient_sign,
        sample_points,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut sc = Scanner::new();
    let sv = sc.next_usize();
    let np = sc.next_usize();

    let mut stock_poly = Vec::with_capacity(sv);
    for _ in 0..sv {
        let x = sc.next_f64();
        let y = sc.next_f64();
        stock_poly.push(Pt::new(x, y));
    }

    let mut pieces = Vec::with_capacity(np);
    let mut total_piece_vertices = 0usize;

    for id in 0..np {
        let pv = sc.next_usize();
        total_piece_vertices += pv;
        let mut verts = Vec::with_capacity(pv);
        for _ in 0..pv {
            let x = sc.next_f64();
            let y = sc.next_f64();
            verts.push(Pt::new(x, y));
        }
        let area = polygon_signed_area(&verts).abs();
        let centroid = polygon_centroid(&verts);
        pieces.push(Piece {
            id,
            verts,
            area,
            centroid,
        });
    }

    let avg_verts = if np == 0 {
        0.0
    } else {
        total_piece_vertices as f64 / np as f64
    };

    let params = choose_params(np, avg_verts);
    let stock_geom = build_stock_geom(stock_poly, params.sample_grid);

    let mut order: Vec<usize> = (0..np).collect();
    order.sort_by(|&a, &b| {
        let oa = cmp_f64(pieces[b].area, pieces[a].area);
        if oa != Ordering::Equal {
            oa
        } else {
            pieces[a].id.cmp(&pieces[b].id)
        }
    });

    let seed = (np as u64)
        ^ (sv as u64).wrapping_mul(0x9E3779B97F4A7C15)
        ^ (stock_geom.area.to_bits());
    let mut rng = Lcg::new(seed);

    let mut stocks: Vec<StockState> = Vec::new();
    let mut placements: Vec<Option<Placement>> = vec![None; np];

    for pid in order {
        let piece = &pieces[pid];
        let k = angle_count_for_piece(params.base_angles, np, piece.verts.len());
        let angles = build_angles(k);
        let variants = generate_variants(piece, &angles, params.max_refs);

        let mut placed = false;
        let stock_limit = stocks.len().min(params.stock_try_limit);

        for si in 0..stock_limit {
            if stocks[si].used_area + piece.area > stock_geom.area * 1.01 {
                continue;
            }

            if let Some(mut pl) = try_place_in_stock(
                &stock_geom,
                &mut stocks[si],
                piece,
                &variants,
                &params,
                &mut rng,
            ) {
                pl.stock = si;
                placements[piece.id] = Some(pl);
                placed = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        if !placed {
            let mut new_stock = StockState::new(&stock_geom, params.max_anchors);
            if let Some(mut pl) =
                try_place_in_stock(&stock_geom, &mut new_stock, piece, &variants, &params, &mut rng)
            {
                let si = stocks.len();
                pl.stock = si;
                placements[piece.id] = Some(pl);
                stocks.push(new_stock);
            } else {
                let si = stocks.len();
                stocks.push(new_stock);
                placements[piece.id] = Some(Placement {
                    stock: si,
                    tx: 0.0,
                    ty: 0.0,
                    rot: 0.0,
                });
            }
        }
    }

    let num_stocks = stocks.len().max(1);
    let mut out = String::new();
    out.push_str(&format!("{}\n", num_stocks));

    for i in 0..np {
        let p = placements[i].unwrap_or(Placement {
            stock: 0,
            tx: 0.0,
            ty: 0.0,
            rot: 0.0,
        });
        out.push_str(&format!("{} {:.9} {:.9} {:.9}\n", p.stock, p.tx, p.ty, p.rot));
    }

    print!("{}", out);
}
Layout

4 rectangles from 100x100 square

Stock 1/1
Subpass 1
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

[5 triangles from 100x80 rectangle] Invalid: Placement 1 overlaps with placement 0

Polygon Cutting - 5 triangles from 100x80 rectangle

View Code (28033 chars)
use std::cmp::Ordering;
use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet};
use std::f64::consts::PI;
use std::io::{self, Read};

const EPS: f64 = 1e-9;

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Pt {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
}

impl Pt {
    fn new(x: f64, y: f64) -> Self {
        Self { x, y }
    }
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Aabb {
    minx: f64,
    miny: f64,
    maxx: f64,
    maxy: f64,
}

impl Aabb {
    fn empty() -> Self {
        Self {
            minx: f64::INFINITY,
            miny: f64::INFINITY,
            maxx: f64::NEG_INFINITY,
            maxy: f64::NEG_INFINITY,
        }
    }

    fn from_points(pts: &[Pt]) -> Self {
        let mut b = Self::empty();
        for &p in pts {
            if p.x < b.minx {
                b.minx = p.x;
            }
            if p.y < b.miny {
                b.miny = p.y;
            }
            if p.x > b.maxx {
                b.maxx = p.x;
            }
            if p.y > b.maxy {
                b.maxy = p.y;
            }
        }
        b
    }

    fn shift(&self, tx: f64, ty: f64) -> Self {
        Self {
            minx: self.minx + tx,
            miny: self.miny + ty,
            maxx: self.maxx + tx,
            maxy: self.maxy + ty,
        }
    }

    fn overlaps(&self, other: &Self) -> bool {
        !(self.maxx < other.minx - EPS
            || other.maxx < self.minx - EPS
            || self.maxy < other.miny - EPS
            || other.maxy < self.miny - EPS)
    }

    fn within(&self, outer: &Self) -> bool {
        self.minx >= outer.minx - EPS
            && self.miny >= outer.miny - EPS
            && self.maxx <= outer.maxx + EPS
            && self.maxy <= outer.maxy + EPS
    }

    fn width(&self) -> f64 {
        self.maxx - self.minx
    }

    fn height(&self) -> f64 {
        self.maxy - self.miny
    }
}

#[derive(Clone)]
struct Piece {
    id: usize,
    verts: Vec<Pt>,
    area: f64,
    centroid: Pt,
}

#[derive(Clone)]
struct Variant {
    angle: f64,
    verts: Vec<Pt>,
    bbox: Aabb,
    centroid: Pt,
    refs: Vec<Pt>,
}

#[derive(Clone)]
struct PlacedPoly {
    verts: Vec<Pt>,
    bbox: Aabb,
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct Placement {
    stock: usize,
    tx: f64,
    ty: f64,
    rot: f64,
}

struct StockGeom {
    poly: Vec<Pt>,
    edges: Vec<(Pt, Pt)>,
    vertices: Vec<Pt>,
    bbox: Aabb,
    area: f64,
    convex: bool,
    orient_sign: f64,
    sample_points: Vec<Pt>,
}

struct StockState {
    placed: Vec<PlacedPoly>,
    anchors: Vec<Pt>,
    anchor_set: HashSet<(i64, i64)>,
    grid: HashMap<u64, Vec<usize>>,
    cell_size: f64,
    origin: Pt,
    used_area: f64,
    max_anchors: usize,
}

struct Params {
    base_angles: usize,
    stock_try_limit: usize,
    anchor_try: usize,
    max_anchors: usize,
    sample_grid: usize,
    random_samples: usize,
    max_refs: usize,
}

struct Scanner {
    data: Vec<u8>,
    idx: usize,
}

impl Scanner {
    fn new() -> Self {
        let mut input = String::new();
        io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input).unwrap();
        Self {
            data: input.into_bytes(),
            idx: 0,
        }
    }

    fn skip_ws(&mut self) {
        while self.idx < self.data.len() && self.data[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
    }

    fn next_usize(&mut self) -> usize {
        self.skip_ws();
        let start = self.idx;
        while self.idx < self.data.len() && !self.data[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
        std::str::from_utf8(&self.data[start..self.idx])
            .unwrap()
            .parse::<usize>()
            .unwrap()
    }

    fn next_f64(&mut self) -> f64 {
        self.skip_ws();
        let start = self.idx;
        while self.idx < self.data.len() && !self.data[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
        std::str::from_utf8(&self.data[start..self.idx])
            .unwrap()
            .parse::<f64>()
            .unwrap()
    }
}

struct Lcg {
    state: u64,
}

impl Lcg {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        Self { state: seed }
    }

    fn next_u64(&mut self) -> u64 {
        self.state = self
            .state
            .wrapping_mul(6364136223846793005)
            .wrapping_add(1442695040888963407);
        self.state
    }

    fn next_f64(&mut self) -> f64 {
        let v = self.next_u64() >> 11;
        (v as f64) * (1.0 / ((1u64 << 53) as f64))
    }
}

fn sub(a: Pt, b: Pt) -> Pt {
    Pt::new(a.x - b.x, a.y - b.y)
}

fn cross(a: Pt, b: Pt) -> f64 {
    a.x * b.y - a.y * b.x
}

fn orient(a: Pt, b: Pt, c: Pt) -> f64 {
    cross(sub(b, a), sub(c, a))
}

fn dot(a: Pt, b: Pt) -> f64 {
    a.x * b.x + a.y * b.y
}

fn cmp_f64(a: f64, b: f64) -> Ordering {
    if a < b - EPS {
        Ordering::Less
    } else if a > b + EPS {
        Ordering::Greater
    } else {
        Ordering::Equal
    }
}

fn cmp_pt(a: Pt, b: Pt) -> Ordering {
    let oy = cmp_f64(a.y, b.y);
    if oy != Ordering::Equal {
        oy
    } else {
        cmp_f64(a.x, b.x)
    }
}

fn point_on_segment(p: Pt, a: Pt, b: Pt) -> bool {
    let ap = sub(p, a);
    let bp = sub(p, b);
    orient(a, b, p).abs() <= EPS && dot(ap, bp) <= EPS
}

fn point_in_polygon_inclusive(p: Pt, poly: &[Pt]) -> bool {
    let n = poly.len();
    let mut inside = false;
    for i in 0..n {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % n];
        if point_on_segment(p, a, b) {
            return true;
        }
        let intersects = (a.y > p.y) != (b.y > p.y)
            && p.x < (b.x - a.x) * (p.y - a.y) / ((b.y - a.y).abs().max(EPS)) + a.x;
        if intersects {
            inside = !inside;
        }
    }
    inside
}

fn point_in_polygon_strict(p: Pt, poly: &[Pt]) -> bool {
    let n = poly.len();
    let mut inside = false;
    for i in 0..n {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % n];
        if point_on_segment(p, a, b) {
            return false;
        }
        let intersects = (a.y > p.y) != (b.y > p.y)
            && p.x < (b.x - a.x) * (p.y - a.y) / ((b.y - a.y).abs().max(EPS)) + a.x;
        if intersects {
            inside = !inside;
        }
    }
    inside
}

fn segments_proper_intersect(a: Pt, b: Pt, c: Pt, d: Pt) -> bool {
    let o1 = orient(a, b, c);
    let o2 = orient(a, b, d);
    let o3 = orient(c, d, a);
    let o4 = orient(c, d, b);

    ((o1 > EPS && o2 < -EPS) || (o1 < -EPS && o2 > EPS))
        && ((o3 > EPS && o4 < -EPS) || (o3 < -EPS && o4 > EPS))
}

fn polygon_signed_area(poly: &[Pt]) -> f64 {
    let mut s = 0.0;
    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        s += cross(a, b);
    }
    0.5 * s
}

fn polygon_centroid(poly: &[Pt]) -> Pt {
    let mut cx = 0.0;
    let mut cy = 0.0;
    let mut twice_area = 0.0;

    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        let cr = cross(a, b);
        twice_area += cr;
        cx += (a.x + b.x) * cr;
        cy += (a.y + b.y) * cr;
    }

    if twice_area.abs() <= EPS {
        let mut sx = 0.0;
        let mut sy = 0.0;
        for &p in poly {
            sx += p.x;
            sy += p.y;
        }
        let n = poly.len() as f64;
        return Pt::new(sx / n, sy / n);
    }

    Pt::new(cx / (3.0 * twice_area), cy / (3.0 * twice_area))
}

fn is_convex_polygon(poly: &[Pt]) -> bool {
    if poly.len() < 4 {
        return true;
    }
    let mut has_pos = false;
    let mut has_neg = false;
    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        let c = poly[(i + 2) % poly.len()];
        let o = orient(a, b, c);
        if o > EPS {
            has_pos = true;
        } else if o < -EPS {
            has_neg = true;
        }
        if has_pos && has_neg {
            return false;
        }
    }
    true
}

fn point_in_convex_inclusive(p: Pt, poly: &[Pt], orient_sign: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        let v = orient(a, b, p) * orient_sign;
        if v < -EPS {
            return false;
        }
    }
    true
}

fn polygon_within_stock(poly: &[Pt], stock: &StockGeom) -> bool {
    if stock.convex {
        for &p in poly {
            if !point_in_convex_inclusive(p, &stock.poly, stock.orient_sign) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    for &p in poly {
        if !point_in_polygon_inclusive(p, &stock.poly) {
            return false;
        }
    }

    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        let a = poly[i];
        let b = poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()];
        for &(c, d) in &stock.edges {
            if segments_proper_intersect(a, b, c, d) {
                return false;
            }
        }
    }

    true
}

fn polygons_overlap(a: &[Pt], b: &[Pt]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..a.len() {
        let a0 = a[i];
        let a1 = a[(i + 1) % a.len()];
        for j in 0..b.len() {
            let b0 = b[j];
            let b1 = b[(j + 1) % b.len()];
            if segments_proper_intersect(a0, a1, b0, b1) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }

    for &p in a {
        if point_in_polygon_strict(p, b) {
            return true;
        }
    }

    for &p in b {
        if point_in_polygon_strict(p, a) {
            return true;
        }
    }

    false
}

fn rotate_point(p: Pt, cos_a: f64, sin_a: f64) -> Pt {
    Pt::new(cos_a * p.x - sin_a * p.y, sin_a * p.x + cos_a * p.y)
}

fn dedup_refs(mut refs: Vec<Pt>, max_refs: usize) -> Vec<Pt> {
    let mut out: Vec<Pt> = Vec::with_capacity(refs.len());
    for p in refs.drain(..) {
        let mut dup = false;
        for q in &out {
            if (p.x - q.x).abs() <= 1e-8 && (p.y - q.y).abs() <= 1e-8 {
                dup = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if !dup {
            out.push(p);
            if out.len() >= max_refs {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    out
}

fn generate_variants(piece: &Piece, angles: &[f64], max_refs: usize) -> Vec<Variant> {
    let mut vars = Vec::with_capacity(angles.len());

    for &ang in angles {
        let (sin_a, cos_a) = ang.sin_cos();
        let mut verts = Vec::with_capacity(piece.verts.len());
        for &p in &piece.verts {
            verts.push(rotate_point(p, cos_a, sin_a));
        }
        let bbox = Aabb::from_points(&verts);
        let centroid = rotate_point(piece.centroid, cos_a, sin_a);

        let mut low_idx = 0usize;
        let mut left_idx = 0usize;
        for i in 1..verts.len() {
            if cmp_pt(verts[i], verts[low_idx]) == Ordering::Less {
                low_idx = i;
            }
            let lx = cmp_f64(verts[i].x, verts[left_idx].x);
            if lx == Ordering::Less
                || (lx == Ordering::Equal && cmp_f64(verts[i].y, verts[left_idx].y) == Ordering::Less)
            {
                left_idx = i;
            }
        }

        let mut refs = Vec::with_capacity(4);
        refs.push(Pt::new(bbox.minx, bbox.miny));
        if max_refs >= 2 {
            refs.push(verts[low_idx]);
        }
        if max_refs >= 3 {
            refs.push(verts[left_idx]);
        }
        refs = dedup_refs(refs, max_refs.max(1));

        vars.push(Variant {
            angle: ang,
            verts,
            bbox,
            centroid,
            refs,
        });
    }

    vars.sort_by(|a, b| {
        let ah = a.bbox.height();
        let bh = b.bbox.height();
        let oy = cmp_f64(ah, bh);
        if oy != Ordering::Equal {
            oy
        } else {
            cmp_f64(a.bbox.width(), b.bbox.width())
        }
    });

    vars
}

fn quantize_anchor(p: Pt) -> (i64, i64) {
    let s = 1_000_000.0;
    ((p.x * s).round() as i64, (p.y * s).round() as i64)
}

fn pack_cell(ix: i32, iy: i32) -> u64 {
    ((ix as u32 as u64) << 32) | (iy as u32 as u64)
}

impl StockState {
    fn new(stock: &StockGeom, max_anchors: usize) -> Self {
        let bbox = stock.bbox;
        let diag_scale = (bbox.width().abs() * bbox.height().abs()).sqrt();
        let cell_size = (diag_scale / 40.0).max(1e-6);
        let mut s = Self {
            placed: Vec::new(),
            anchors: Vec::new(),
            anchor_set: HashSet::new(),
            grid: HashMap::new(),
            cell_size,
            origin: Pt::new(bbox.minx, bbox.miny),
            used_area: 0.0,
            max_anchors,
        };

        s.add_anchor(Pt::new(bbox.minx, bbox.miny));
        for &v in &stock.vertices {
            s.add_anchor(v);
        }

        s
    }

    fn add_anchor(&mut self, p: Pt) {
        if !p.x.is_finite() || !p.y.is_finite() {
            return;
        }
        if self.anchors.len() >= self.max_anchors {
            return;
        }
        let k = quantize_anchor(p);
        if !self.anchor_set.insert(k) {
            return;
        }
        let pos = self
            .anchors
            .binary_search_by(|q| cmp_pt(*q, p))
            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e);
        self.anchors.insert(pos, p);
    }

    fn cell_range(&self, bbox: &Aabb) -> (i32, i32, i32, i32) {
        let inv = 1.0 / self.cell_size;
        let ix0 = ((bbox.minx - self.origin.x) * inv).floor() as i32;
        let iy0 = ((bbox.miny - self.origin.y) * inv).floor() as i32;
        let ix1 = ((bbox.maxx - self.origin.x) * inv).floor() as i32;
        let iy1 = ((bbox.maxy - self.origin.y) * inv).floor() as i32;
        (ix0, iy0, ix1, iy1)
    }

    fn query_candidates(&self, bbox: &Aabb) -> Vec<usize> {
        let (ix0, iy0, ix1, iy1) = self.cell_range(bbox);
        let mut out = Vec::new();
        for ix in ix0..=ix1 {
            for iy in iy0..=iy1 {
                if let Some(v) = self.grid.get(&pack_cell(ix, iy)) {
                    out.extend_from_slice(v);
                }
            }
        }
        if out.len() > 1 {
            out.sort_unstable();
            out.dedup();
        }
        out
    }

    fn insert_placed(&mut self, placed: PlacedPoly) {
        let idx = self.placed.len();
        let (ix0, iy0, ix1, iy1) = self.cell_range(&placed.bbox);
        for ix in ix0..=ix1 {
            for iy in iy0..=iy1 {
                self.grid.entry(pack_cell(ix, iy)).or_default().push(idx);
            }
        }
        self.placed.push(placed);
    }
}

fn has_overlap(stock_state: &StockState, poly: &[Pt], bbox: &Aabb) -> bool {
    if stock_state.placed.is_empty() {
        return false;
    }
    let candidates = stock_state.query_candidates(bbox);
    for idx in candidates {
        let other = &stock_state.placed[idx];
        if !bbox.overlaps(&other.bbox) {
            continue;
        }
        if polygons_overlap(poly, &other.verts) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn transform_variant(variant: &Variant, tx: f64, ty: f64, out: &mut Vec<Pt>) {
    out.clear();
    if out.capacity() < variant.verts.len() {
        out.reserve(variant.verts.len() - out.capacity());
    }
    for &p in &variant.verts {
        out.push(Pt::new(p.x + tx, p.y + ty));
    }
}

fn add_new_anchors(stock_state: &mut StockState, poly: &[Pt], bbox: &Aabb) {
    stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(bbox.maxx, bbox.miny));
    stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(bbox.minx, bbox.maxy));
    stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(bbox.maxx, bbox.maxy));

    let stride = (poly.len() / 6).max(1);
    for i in (0..poly.len()).step_by(stride) {
        let p = poly[i];
        stock_state.add_anchor(p);
        stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(p.x + 1e-7, p.y));
        stock_state.add_anchor(Pt::new(p.x, p.y + 1e-7));
    }
}

fn try_candidate(
    stock_geom: &StockGeom,
    stock_state: &StockState,
    variant: &Variant,
    tx: f64,
    ty: f64,
    temp_poly: &mut Vec<Pt>,
) -> Option<Aabb> {
    let bbox = variant.bbox.shift(tx, ty);
    if !bbox.within(&stock_geom.bbox) {
        return None;
    }

    transform_variant(variant, tx, ty, temp_poly);
    if !polygon_within_stock(temp_poly, stock_geom) {
        return None;
    }

    if has_overlap(stock_state, temp_poly, &bbox) {
        return None;
    }

    Some(bbox)
}

fn try_place_in_stock(
    stock_geom: &StockGeom,
    stock_state: &mut StockState,
    piece: &Piece,
    variants: &[Variant],
    params: &Params,
    rng: &mut Lcg,
) -> Option<Placement> {
    let mut temp_poly = Vec::<Pt>::with_capacity(piece.verts.len());

    let anchor_limit = stock_state.anchors.len().min(params.anchor_try);
    for ai in 0..anchor_limit {
        let anchor = stock_state.anchors[ai];
        for v in variants {
            let ref_limit = v.refs.len().min(params.max_refs.max(1));
            for ri in 0..ref_limit {
                let rp = v.refs[ri];
                let tx = anchor.x - rp.x;
                let ty = anchor.y - rp.y;

                if let Some(bbox) = try_candidate(stock_geom, stock_state, v, tx, ty, &mut temp_poly) {
                    let placed = PlacedPoly {
                        verts: temp_poly.clone(),
                        bbox,
                    };
                    stock_state.insert_placed(placed);
                    stock_state.used_area += piece.area;
                    add_new_anchors(stock_state, &temp_poly, &bbox);
                    return Some(Placement {
                        stock: 0,
                        tx,
                        ty,
                        rot: v.angle,
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if stock_state.placed.is_empty() {
        for v in variants {
            for &sp in &stock_geom.sample_points {
                let tx = sp.x - v.centroid.x;
                let ty = sp.y - v.centroid.y;
                if let Some(bbox) = try_candidate(stock_geom, stock_state, v, tx, ty, &mut temp_poly) {
                    let placed = PlacedPoly {
                        verts: temp_poly.clone(),
                        bbox,
                    };
                    stock_state.insert_placed(placed);
                    stock_state.used_area += piece.area;
                    add_new_anchors(stock_state, &temp_poly, &bbox);
                    return Some(Placement {
                        stock: 0,
                        tx,
                        ty,
                        rot: v.angle,
                    });
                }
            }
        }

        for v in variants {
            let step = (v.verts.len() / 8).max(1);
            for &sv in &stock_geom.vertices {
                for pi in (0..v.verts.len()).step_by(step) {
                    let pv = v.verts[pi];
                    let tx = sv.x - pv.x;
                    let ty = sv.y - pv.y;
                    if let Some(bbox) = try_candidate(stock_geom, stock_state, v, tx, ty, &mut temp_poly) {
                        let placed = PlacedPoly {
                            verts: temp_poly.clone(),
                            bbox,
                        };
                        stock_state.insert_placed(placed);
                        stock_state.used_area += piece.area;
                        add_new_anchors(stock_state, &temp_poly, &bbox);
                        return Some(Placement {
                            stock: 0,
                            tx,
                            ty,
                            rot: v.angle,
                        });
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        for _ in 0..params.random_samples {
            let x = stock_geom.bbox.minx + rng.next_f64() * stock_geom.bbox.width();
            let y = stock_geom.bbox.miny + rng.next_f64() * stock_geom.bbox.height();
            let p = Pt::new(x, y);
            if !point_in_polygon_inclusive(p, &stock_geom.poly) {
                continue;
            }

            for v in variants {
                let tx = p.x - v.centroid.x;
                let ty = p.y - v.centroid.y;
                if let Some(bbox) = try_candidate(stock_geom, stock_state, v, tx, ty, &mut temp_poly) {
                    let placed = PlacedPoly {
                        verts: temp_poly.clone(),
                        bbox,
                    };
                    stock_state.insert_placed(placed);
                    stock_state.used_area += piece.area;
                    add_new_anchors(stock_state, &temp_poly, &bbox);
                    return Some(Placement {
                        stock: 0,
                        tx,
                        ty,
                        rot: v.angle,
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    }

    None
}

fn build_angles(k: usize) -> Vec<f64> {
    let kk = k.max(1);
    let mut out = Vec::with_capacity(kk);
    for i in 0..kk {
        out.push((2.0 * PI * (i as f64)) / (kk as f64));
    }
    out
}

fn choose_params(np: usize, avg_verts: f64) -> Params {
    let mut base_angles = if np <= 20 {
        36
    } else if np <= 100 {
        24
    } else if np <= 400 {
        16
    } else if np <= 1200 {
        10
    } else if np <= 3000 {
        6
    } else {
        4
    };

    if avg_verts > 120.0 && base_angles > 4 {
        base_angles -= 2;
    }

    let stock_try_limit = if np <= 100 {
        40
    } else if np <= 500 {
        24
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        12
    } else {
        8
    };

    let anchor_try = if np <= 100 {
        600
    } else if np <= 500 {
        250
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        80
    } else {
        25
    };

    let max_anchors = if np <= 100 {
        4000
    } else if np <= 500 {
        1800
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        600
    } else {
        250
    };

    let sample_grid = if np <= 100 {
        24
    } else if np <= 500 {
        16
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        10
    } else {
        8
    };

    let random_samples = if np <= 500 { 256 } else { 96 };

    let max_refs = if np <= 500 {
        3
    } else if np <= 2000 {
        2
    } else {
        1
    };

    Params {
        base_angles,
        stock_try_limit,
        anchor_try,
        max_anchors,
        sample_grid,
        random_samples,
        max_refs,
    }
}

fn angle_count_for_piece(base_k: usize, np: usize, verts: usize) -> usize {
    let mut k = base_k;
    if verts > 120 && k > 6 {
        k -= 2;
    }
    if verts > 300 && k > 4 {
        k = 4;
    }
    if np > 3000 && k > 4 {
        k = 4;
    }
    k.max(1)
}

fn build_sample_points(stock_poly: &[Pt], bbox: Aabb, grid: usize) -> Vec<Pt> {
    let mut pts = Vec::new();
    let mut seen: HashSet<(i64, i64)> = HashSet::new();

    let add_pt = |p: Pt, pts: &mut Vec<Pt>, seen: &mut HashSet<(i64, i64)>| {
        if !p.x.is_finite() || !p.y.is_finite() {
            return;
        }
        if !point_in_polygon_inclusive(p, stock_poly) {
            return;
        }
        let k = quantize_anchor(p);
        if seen.insert(k) {
            pts.push(p);
        }
    };

    add_pt(polygon_centroid(stock_poly), &mut pts, &mut seen);
    for &v in stock_poly {
        add_pt(v, &mut pts, &mut seen);
    }

    let gx = grid.max(2);
    let gy = grid.max(2);
    let w = bbox.width().max(EPS);
    let h = bbox.height().max(EPS);

    for iy in 0..gy {
        for ix in 0..gx {
            let x = bbox.minx + (ix as f64 + 0.5) * w / (gx as f64);
            let y = bbox.miny + (iy as f64 + 0.5) * h / (gy as f64);
            add_pt(Pt::new(x, y), &mut pts, &mut seen);
        }
    }

    pts.sort_by(|a, b| cmp_pt(*a, *b));
    pts
}

fn build_stock_geom(stock_poly: Vec<Pt>, sample_grid: usize) -> StockGeom {
    let bbox = Aabb::from_points(&stock_poly);
    let area_signed = polygon_signed_area(&stock_poly);
    let area = area_signed.abs();
    let convex = is_convex_polygon(&stock_poly);
    let orient_sign = if area_signed >= 0.0 { 1.0 } else { -1.0 };

    let mut edges = Vec::with_capacity(stock_poly.len());
    for i in 0..stock_poly.len() {
        edges.push((stock_poly[i], stock_poly[(i + 1) % stock_poly.len()]));
    }

    let sample_points = build_sample_points(&stock_poly, bbox, sample_grid);

    StockGeom {
        poly: stock_poly.clone(),
        edges,
        vertices: stock_poly,
        bbox,
        area,
        convex,
        orient_sign,
        sample_points,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut sc = Scanner::new();
    let sv = sc.next_usize();
    let np = sc.next_usize();

    let mut stock_poly = Vec::with_capacity(sv);
    for _ in 0..sv {
        let x = sc.next_f64();
        let y = sc.next_f64();
        stock_poly.push(Pt::new(x, y));
    }

    let mut pieces = Vec::with_capacity(np);
    let mut total_piece_vertices = 0usize;

    for id in 0..np {
        let pv = sc.next_usize();
        total_piece_vertices += pv;
        let mut verts = Vec::with_capacity(pv);
        for _ in 0..pv {
            let x = sc.next_f64();
            let y = sc.next_f64();
            verts.push(Pt::new(x, y));
        }
        let area = polygon_signed_area(&verts).abs();
        let centroid = polygon_centroid(&verts);
        pieces.push(Piece {
            id,
            verts,
            area,
            centroid,
        });
    }

    let avg_verts = if np == 0 {
        0.0
    } else {
        total_piece_vertices as f64 / np as f64
    };

    let params = choose_params(np, avg_verts);
    let stock_geom = build_stock_geom(stock_poly, params.sample_grid);

    let mut order: Vec<usize> = (0..np).collect();
    order.sort_by(|&a, &b| {
        let oa = cmp_f64(pieces[b].area, pieces[a].area);
        if oa != Ordering::Equal {
            oa
        } else {
            pieces[a].id.cmp(&pieces[b].id)
        }
    });

    let seed = (np as u64)
        ^ (sv as u64).wrapping_mul(0x9E3779B97F4A7C15)
        ^ (stock_geom.area.to_bits());
    let mut rng = Lcg::new(seed);

    let mut stocks: Vec<StockState> = Vec::new();
    let mut placements: Vec<Option<Placement>> = vec![None; np];

    for pid in order {
        let piece = &pieces[pid];
        let k = angle_count_for_piece(params.base_angles, np, piece.verts.len());
        let angles = build_angles(k);
        let variants = generate_variants(piece, &angles, params.max_refs);

        let mut placed = false;
        let stock_limit = stocks.len().min(params.stock_try_limit);

        for si in 0..stock_limit {
            if stocks[si].used_area + piece.area > stock_geom.area * 1.01 {
                continue;
            }

            if let Some(mut pl) = try_place_in_stock(
                &stock_geom,
                &mut stocks[si],
                piece,
                &variants,
                &params,
                &mut rng,
            ) {
                pl.stock = si;
                placements[piece.id] = Some(pl);
                placed = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        if !placed {
            let mut new_stock = StockState::new(&stock_geom, params.max_anchors);
            if let Some(mut pl) =
                try_place_in_stock(&stock_geom, &mut new_stock, piece, &variants, &params, &mut rng)
            {
                let si = stocks.len();
                pl.stock = si;
                placements[piece.id] = Some(pl);
                stocks.push(new_stock);
            } else {
                let si = stocks.len();
                stocks.push(new_stock);
                placements[piece.id] = Some(Placement {
                    stock: si,
                    tx: 0.0,
                    ty: 0.0,
                    rot: 0.0,
                });
            }
        }
    }

    let num_stocks = stocks.len().max(1);
    let mut out = String::new();
    out.push_str(&format!("{}\n", num_stocks));

    for i in 0..np {
        let p = placements[i].unwrap_or(Placement {
            stock: 0,
            tx: 0.0,
            ty: 0.0,
            rot: 0.0,
        });
        out.push_str(&format!("{} {:.9} {:.9} {:.9}\n", p.stock, p.tx, p.ty, p.rot));
    }

    print!("{}", out);
}
