Test 12: 3D Bin Packing - Polyhedra in Box (C#) Score: 0.50 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are solving a 3D Bin Packing problem in C#.

You must write a C# solver that can handle ANY problem size from trivial to ludicrous scale:
- **Trivial**: Small containers (5x5x5), simple polyhedra
- **Medium**: Medium containers (10x10x10-20x20x20)
- **Large**: Large containers (50x50x50-100x100x100)
- **Extreme**: Massive containers (200x200x200-500x500x500)

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: V F (vertex/face count of the polyhedron)
Next V lines: x y z (polyhedron vertices)
Next F lines: a b c (polyhedron face indices)
Last line: W H D (container width, height, depth)
Container origin at (0,0,0), extends to (W,H,D).

**Output format (stdout):**
Line 1: count (number of polyhedra packed)
Next count lines: tx ty tz qw qx qy qz
tx,ty,tz: translation
qw,qx,qy,qz: rotation quaternion (w is scalar part)

**Quaternion Rotation Reference:**
- Identity (no rotation): 1 0 0 0
- 90° around Z: 0.707 0 0 0.707
- To rotate a point: p' = q * p * q^(-1)

**Critical Requirements:**
1. **Scalability**: Your algorithm must adapt based on container size and polyhedron complexity
2. **Performance**: Must complete within 5 minutes even for massive containers
3. **Quality**: Maximize packing count while ensuring valid placements

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14

Write complete, compilable C# code with a static void Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Pack as many copies of an irregular 3D shape into a box as possible, without any overlaps or pieces poking outside. The shapes can be rotated freely, so finding the best orientations is part of the puzzle.

The AI must handle 3D collision detection and spatial reasoning. Subpasses use increasingly awkward shapes that resist neat stacking. The baseline uses a simple grid placement without rotation optimisation.

 0.5000
[2x2x2 boxes in 10x10x10 container] Packed: 27, Baseline: 64, Time: 0.1s - low (42% of baseline) .

3D Bin Packing - 2x2x2 boxes in 10x10x10 container

View Code (30601 chars)
﻿using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;

public static class Program
{
    private const double Eps = 1e-9;

    public static void Main()
    {
        var scanner = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        if (!scanner.TryNextInt(out int vertexCount))
        {
            return;
        }

        int faceCount = scanner.NextInt();

        var vertices = new Vec3[vertexCount];
        for (int i = 0; i < vertexCount; i++)
        {
            double x = scanner.NextDouble();
            double y = scanner.NextDouble();
            double z = scanner.NextDouble();
            vertices[i] = new Vec3(x, y, z);
        }

        // Faces are not directly needed for this fast packing heuristic, but we parse them to consume input correctly.
        for (int i = 0; i < faceCount; i++)
        {
            scanner.NextInt();
            scanner.NextInt();
            scanner.NextInt();
        }

        double containerW = scanner.NextDouble();
        double containerH = scanner.NextDouble();
        double containerD = scanner.NextDouble();

        var container = new Container(containerW, containerH, containerD);
        var scale = ProblemScaleClassifier.Classify(container, vertexCount, faceCount);

        var orientations = OrientationGenerator.Generate(vertices, scale);
        if (orientations.Count == 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            return;
        }

        var planner = new Planner(container, scale);
        PackingPlan bestPlan = planner.BuildBestPlan(orientations);

        if (bestPlan == null || bestPlan.Count <= 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            return;
        }

        bestPlan.Write(Console.Out);
    }

    private static long FloorToLong(double value)
    {
        if (value <= 0.0)
        {
            return 0;
        }

        long n = (long)Math.Floor(value + Eps);
        return n < 0 ? 0 : n;
    }

    private enum ProblemScale
    {
        Trivial,
        Medium,
        Large,
        Extreme
    }

    private readonly struct Container
    {
        public readonly double W;
        public readonly double H;
        public readonly double D;

        public Container(double w, double h, double d)
        {
            W = Math.Max(0.0, w);
            H = Math.Max(0.0, h);
            D = Math.Max(0.0, d);
        }

        public double AxisLength(int axis)
        {
            if (axis == 0) return W;
            if (axis == 1) return H;
            return D;
        }
    }

    private static class ProblemScaleClassifier
    {
        public static ProblemScale Classify(Container c, int vertexCount, int faceCount)
        {
            double maxDim = Math.Max(c.W, Math.Max(c.H, c.D));
            double volume = c.W * c.H * c.D;

            if (maxDim <= 25.0 && volume <= 20_000.0 && vertexCount <= 500 && faceCount <= 1_000)
            {
                return ProblemScale.Trivial;
            }

            if (maxDim <= 120.0 && volume <= 4_000_000.0 && vertexCount <= 5_000)
            {
                return ProblemScale.Medium;
            }

            if (maxDim <= 260.0 && volume <= 40_000_000.0)
            {
                return ProblemScale.Large;
            }

            return ProblemScale.Extreme;
        }
    }

    private readonly struct Vec3
    {
        public readonly double X;
        public readonly double Y;
        public readonly double Z;

        public Vec3(double x, double y, double z)
        {
            X = x;
            Y = y;
            Z = z;
        }
    }

    private readonly struct Mat3
    {
        public readonly double M00;
        public readonly double M01;
        public readonly double M02;
        public readonly double M10;
        public readonly double M11;
        public readonly double M12;
        public readonly double M20;
        public readonly double M21;
        public readonly double M22;

        public Mat3(
            double m00, double m01, double m02,
            double m10, double m11, double m12,
            double m20, double m21, double m22)
        {
            M00 = m00; M01 = m01; M02 = m02;
            M10 = m10; M11 = m11; M12 = m12;
            M20 = m20; M21 = m21; M22 = m22;
        }

        public Vec3 Mul(in Vec3 v)
        {
            double x = M00 * v.X + M01 * v.Y + M02 * v.Z;
            double y = M10 * v.X + M11 * v.Y + M12 * v.Z;
            double z = M20 * v.X + M21 * v.Y + M22 * v.Z;
            return new Vec3(x, y, z);
        }
    }

    private readonly struct QuaternionD
    {
        public readonly double W;
        public readonly double X;
        public readonly double Y;
        public readonly double Z;

        public QuaternionD(double w, double x, double y, double z)
        {
            W = w;
            X = x;
            Y = y;
            Z = z;
        }

        public QuaternionD Normalize()
        {
            double n2 = W * W + X * X + Y * Y + Z * Z;
            if (n2 <= Eps)
            {
                return new QuaternionD(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
            }

            double inv = 1.0 / Math.Sqrt(n2);
            return new QuaternionD(W * inv, X * inv, Y * inv, Z * inv);
        }

        public Mat3 ToMatrix()
        {
            double xx = X * X;
            double yy = Y * Y;
            double zz = Z * Z;
            double xy = X * Y;
            double xz = X * Z;
            double yz = Y * Z;
            double wx = W * X;
            double wy = W * Y;
            double wz = W * Z;

            return new Mat3(
                1.0 - 2.0 * (yy + zz), 2.0 * (xy - wz), 2.0 * (xz + wy),
                2.0 * (xy + wz), 1.0 - 2.0 * (xx + zz), 2.0 * (yz - wx),
                2.0 * (xz - wy), 2.0 * (yz + wx), 1.0 - 2.0 * (xx + yy)
            );
        }

        public static QuaternionD FromMatrix(in Mat3 m)
        {
            double trace = m.M00 + m.M11 + m.M22;
            double w, x, y, z;

            if (trace > 0.0)
            {
                double s = Math.Sqrt(trace + 1.0) * 2.0;
                w = 0.25 * s;
                x = (m.M21 - m.M12) / s;
                y = (m.M02 - m.M20) / s;
                z = (m.M10 - m.M01) / s;
            }
            else if (m.M00 > m.M11 && m.M00 > m.M22)
            {
                double s = Math.Sqrt(1.0 + m.M00 - m.M11 - m.M22) * 2.0;
                w = (m.M21 - m.M12) / s;
                x = 0.25 * s;
                y = (m.M01 + m.M10) / s;
                z = (m.M02 + m.M20) / s;
            }
            else if (m.M11 > m.M22)
            {
                double s = Math.Sqrt(1.0 + m.M11 - m.M00 - m.M22) * 2.0;
                w = (m.M02 - m.M20) / s;
                x = (m.M01 + m.M10) / s;
                y = 0.25 * s;
                z = (m.M12 + m.M21) / s;
            }
            else
            {
                double s = Math.Sqrt(1.0 + m.M22 - m.M00 - m.M11) * 2.0;
                w = (m.M10 - m.M01) / s;
                x = (m.M02 + m.M20) / s;
                y = (m.M12 + m.M21) / s;
                z = 0.25 * s;
            }

            return new QuaternionD(w, x, y, z).Normalize();
        }
    }

    private sealed class Orientation
    {
        public QuaternionD Q;
        public Mat3 M;
        public double MinX;
        public double MaxX;
        public double MinY;
        public double MaxY;
        public double MinZ;
        public double MaxZ;
        public double Dx;
        public double Dy;
        public double Dz;

        public string QwText = "1";
        public string QxText = "0";
        public string QyText = "0";
        public string QzText = "0";

        public double AxisDim(int axis)
        {
            if (axis == 0) return Dx;
            if (axis == 1) return Dy;
            return Dz;
        }

        public static Orientation? Create(QuaternionD q, Vec3[] vertices)
        {
            q = q.Normalize();
            Mat3 m = q.ToMatrix();

            double minX = double.PositiveInfinity;
            double minY = double.PositiveInfinity;
            double minZ = double.PositiveInfinity;
            double maxX = double.NegativeInfinity;
            double maxY = double.NegativeInfinity;
            double maxZ = double.NegativeInfinity;

            for (int i = 0; i < vertices.Length; i++)
            {
                Vec3 rv = m.Mul(vertices[i]);
                if (rv.X < minX) minX = rv.X;
                if (rv.Y < minY) minY = rv.Y;
                if (rv.Z < minZ) minZ = rv.Z;
                if (rv.X > maxX) maxX = rv.X;
                if (rv.Y > maxY) maxY = rv.Y;
                if (rv.Z > maxZ) maxZ = rv.Z;
            }

            double dx = maxX - minX;
            double dy = maxY - minY;
            double dz = maxZ - minZ;
            if (dx <= Eps || dy <= Eps || dz <= Eps)
            {
                return null;
            }

            var o = new Orientation
            {
                Q = q,
                M = m,
                MinX = minX,
                MaxX = maxX,
                MinY = minY,
                MaxY = maxY,
                MinZ = minZ,
                MaxZ = maxZ,
                Dx = dx,
                Dy = dy,
                Dz = dz
            };

            o.QwText = FormatFloat(o.Q.W);
            o.QxText = FormatFloat(o.Q.X);
            o.QyText = FormatFloat(o.Q.Y);
            o.QzText = FormatFloat(o.Q.Z);
            return o;
        }

        private static string FormatFloat(double value)
        {
            if (Math.Abs(value) < 5e-16) value = 0.0;
            return value.ToString("G17", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        }

        public string SignatureKey()
        {
            return string.Concat(
                Quant(Dx), "|", Quant(Dy), "|", Quant(Dz), "|",
                Quant(MinX), "|", Quant(MinY), "|", Quant(MinZ)
            );
        }

        private static string Quant(double x)
        {
            long q = (long)Math.Round(x * 1_000_000.0);
            return q.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        }
    }

    private static class OrientationGenerator
    {
        public static List<Orientation> Generate(Vec3[] vertices, ProblemScale scale)
        {
            var result = new List<Orientation>(256);
            var seen = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.Ordinal);

            AddAxisAligned24(vertices, result, seen);

            int randomTarget = scale switch
            {
                ProblemScale.Trivial => 180,
                ProblemScale.Medium => 96,
                ProblemScale.Large => 36,
                _ => 0,
            };

            if (randomTarget > 0)
            {
                var rng = new Random(123456789);
                int attempts = randomTarget * 6;
                int added = 0;

                for (int i = 0; i < attempts && added < randomTarget; i++)
                {
                    QuaternionD q = RandomUnitQuaternion(rng);
                    Orientation? o = Orientation.Create(q, vertices);
                    if (o == null)
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    string key = o.SignatureKey();
                    if (seen.Add(key))
                    {
                        result.Add(o);
                        added++;
                    }
                }
            }

            return result;
        }

        private static void AddAxisAligned24(Vec3[] vertices, List<Orientation> result, HashSet<string> seen)
        {
            int[][] perms =
            {
                new[] { 0, 1, 2 },
                new[] { 0, 2, 1 },
                new[] { 1, 0, 2 },
                new[] { 1, 2, 0 },
                new[] { 2, 0, 1 },
                new[] { 2, 1, 0 }
            };

            int[] signs = { -1, 1 };
            foreach (int[] p in perms)
            {
                int permParity = PermutationParity(p);
                foreach (int sx in signs)
                {
                    foreach (int sy in signs)
                    {
                        foreach (int sz in signs)
                        {
                            int det = permParity * sx * sy * sz;
                            if (det != 1)
                            {
                                continue;
                            }

                            double m00 = p[0] == 0 ? sx : 0.0;
                            double m01 = p[0] == 1 ? sx : 0.0;
                            double m02 = p[0] == 2 ? sx : 0.0;

                            double m10 = p[1] == 0 ? sy : 0.0;
                            double m11 = p[1] == 1 ? sy : 0.0;
                            double m12 = p[1] == 2 ? sy : 0.0;

                            double m20 = p[2] == 0 ? sz : 0.0;
                            double m21 = p[2] == 1 ? sz : 0.0;
                            double m22 = p[2] == 2 ? sz : 0.0;

                            var m = new Mat3(m00, m01, m02, m10, m11, m12, m20, m21, m22);
                            QuaternionD q = QuaternionD.FromMatrix(m);

                            Orientation? o = Orientation.Create(q, vertices);
                            if (o == null)
                            {
                                continue;
                            }

                            string key = o.SignatureKey();
                            if (seen.Add(key))
                            {
                                result.Add(o);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        private static int PermutationParity(int[] p)
        {
            int inv = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < p.Length; i++)
            {
                for (int j = i + 1; j < p.Length; j++)
                {
                    if (p[i] > p[j]) inv++;
                }
            }
            return (inv & 1) == 0 ? 1 : -1;
        }

        private static QuaternionD RandomUnitQuaternion(Random rng)
        {
            double u1 = rng.NextDouble();
            double u2 = rng.NextDouble();
            double u3 = rng.NextDouble();

            double sqrt1 = Math.Sqrt(1.0 - u1);
            double sqrt2 = Math.Sqrt(u1);
            double t1 = 2.0 * Math.PI * u2;
            double t2 = 2.0 * Math.PI * u3;

            // Shoemake method, returned as (w, x, y, z).
            double x = sqrt1 * Math.Sin(t1);
            double y = sqrt1 * Math.Cos(t1);
            double z = sqrt2 * Math.Sin(t2);
            double w = sqrt2 * Math.Cos(t2);

            return new QuaternionD(w, x, y, z).Normalize();
        }
    }

    private readonly struct SingleScore
    {
        public readonly Orientation Orientation;
        public readonly long Nx;
        public readonly long Ny;
        public readonly long Nz;
        public readonly long Count;

        public SingleScore(Orientation orientation, long nx, long ny, long nz, long count)
        {
            Orientation = orientation;
            Nx = nx;
            Ny = ny;
            Nz = nz;
            Count = count;
        }
    }

    private sealed class Planner
    {
        private readonly Container _container;
        private readonly ProblemScale _scale;

        public Planner(Container container, ProblemScale scale)
        {
            _container = container;
            _scale = scale;
        }

        public PackingPlan BuildBestPlan(List<Orientation> orientations)
        {
            var singleScores = new List<SingleScore>(orientations.Count);
            PackingPlan? bestPlan = null;
            long bestCount = 0;

            for (int i = 0; i < orientations.Count; i++)
            {
                Orientation o = orientations[i];
                long nx = FloorToLong(_container.W / o.Dx);
                long ny = FloorToLong(_container.H / o.Dy);
                long nz = FloorToLong(_container.D / o.Dz);

                if (nx <= 0 || ny <= 0 || nz <= 0)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                long count = SafeMul3(nx, ny, nz);
                if (count <= 0)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                singleScores.Add(new SingleScore(o, nx, ny, nz, count));

                if (count > bestCount)
                {
                    bestCount = count;
                    bestPlan = new SinglePlan(o, nx, ny, nz, count);
                }
            }

            if (singleScores.Count == 0)
            {
                return new EmptyPlan();
            }

            singleScores.Sort((a, b) => b.Count.CompareTo(a.Count));

            int topK = _scale switch
            {
                ProblemScale.Trivial => 28,
                ProblemScale.Medium => 22,
                ProblemScale.Large => 12,
                _ => 6
            };

            if (topK > singleScores.Count)
            {
                topK = singleScores.Count;
            }

            // Medium and smaller problems use extra combinational search.
            if (_scale != ProblemScale.Extreme)
            {
                int exhaustiveLimit = _scale switch
                {
                    ProblemScale.Trivial => 5000,
                    ProblemScale.Medium => 2000,
                    _ => 600
                };

                int sampleCount = _scale switch
                {
                    ProblemScale.Trivial => 512,
                    ProblemScale.Medium => 384,
                    _ => 192
                };

                for (int axis = 0; axis < 3; axis++)
                {
                    for (int i = 0; i < topK; i++)
                    {
                        for (int j = 0; j < topK; j++)
                        {
                            Orientation a = singleScores[i].Orientation;
                            Orientation b = singleScores[j].Orientation;
                            SplitPlan? candidate = TryBuildBestSplit(axis, a, b, exhaustiveLimit, sampleCount);
                            if (candidate != null && candidate.Count > bestCount)
                            {
                                bestCount = candidate.Count;
                                bestPlan = candidate;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            return bestPlan ?? new EmptyPlan();
        }

        private SplitPlan? TryBuildBestSplit(int axis, Orientation a, Orientation b, int exhaustiveLimit, int sampleCount)
        {
            double containerAxis = _container.AxisLength(axis);
            double aLen = a.AxisDim(axis);
            double bLen = b.AxisDim(axis);
            if (aLen <= Eps || bLen <= Eps)
            {
                return null;
            }

            long crossA = CrossCount(a, axis);
            long crossB = CrossCount(b, axis);
            if (crossA <= 0 && crossB <= 0)
            {
                return null;
            }

            long nAMax = FloorToLong(containerAxis / aLen);
            if (nAMax < 0)
            {
                return null;
            }

            long bestNA = 0;
            long bestNB = FloorToLong(containerAxis / bLen);
            long bestTotal = SafeAdd(SafeMul(bestNA, crossA), SafeMul(bestNB, crossB));

            if (nAMax <= exhaustiveLimit)
            {
                for (long nA = 0; nA <= nAMax; nA++)
                {
                    EvaluateSplitCandidate(nA);
                }
            }
            else
            {
                var tested = new HashSet<long>();

                // Coarse scan across the whole range.
                long step = Math.Max(1L, nAMax / Math.Max(1, sampleCount));
                for (long nA = 0; nA <= nAMax; nA += step)
                {
                    if (tested.Add(nA))
                    {
                        EvaluateSplitCandidate(nA);
                    }
                }

                // Refine near boundaries where floor transitions usually matter most.
                long window = Math.Min(256L, nAMax);
                for (long i = 0; i <= window; i++)
                {
                    long low = i;
                    long high = nAMax - i;
                    if (tested.Add(low)) EvaluateSplitCandidate(low);
                    if (tested.Add(high)) EvaluateSplitCandidate(high);
                }
            }

            if (bestTotal <= 0)
            {
                return null;
            }

            return new SplitPlan(_container, axis, a, b, bestNA, bestNB, bestTotal);

            void EvaluateSplitCandidate(long nA)
            {
                double used = nA * aLen;
                double rem = containerAxis - used;
                if (rem < -Eps)
                {
                    return;
                }

                if (rem < 0.0)
                {
                    rem = 0.0;
                }

                long nB = FloorToLong(rem / bLen);
                long total = SafeAdd(SafeMul(nA, crossA), SafeMul(nB, crossB));
                if (total > bestTotal)
                {
                    bestTotal = total;
                    bestNA = nA;
                    bestNB = nB;
                }
            }
        }

        private long CrossCount(Orientation o, int axis)
        {
            if (axis == 0)
            {
                long ny = FloorToLong(_container.H / o.Dy);
                long nz = FloorToLong(_container.D / o.Dz);
                return SafeMul(ny, nz);
            }

            if (axis == 1)
            {
                long nx = FloorToLong(_container.W / o.Dx);
                long nz = FloorToLong(_container.D / o.Dz);
                return SafeMul(nx, nz);
            }

            {
                long nx = FloorToLong(_container.W / o.Dx);
                long ny = FloorToLong(_container.H / o.Dy);
                return SafeMul(nx, ny);
            }
        }

        private static long SafeMul(long a, long b)
        {
            if (a == 0 || b == 0)
            {
                return 0;
            }

            if (a > long.MaxValue / b)
            {
                return long.MaxValue;
            }

            return a * b;
        }

        private static long SafeMul3(long a, long b, long c)
        {
            return SafeMul(SafeMul(a, b), c);
        }

        private static long SafeAdd(long a, long b)
        {
            if (long.MaxValue - a < b)
            {
                return long.MaxValue;
            }

            return a + b;
        }
    }

    private abstract class PackingPlan
    {
        public long Count { get; protected set; }

        public abstract void Write(TextWriter writer);

        protected static void EmitRegion(
            PlacementWriter pw,
            Orientation o,
            double regionStartX,
            double regionStartY,
            double regionStartZ,
            long nx,
            long ny,
            long nz)
        {
            if (nx <= 0 || ny <= 0 || nz <= 0)
            {
                return;
            }

            double baseX = regionStartX - o.MinX;
            double baseY = regionStartY - o.MinY;
            double baseZ = regionStartZ - o.MinZ;

            for (long ix = 0; ix < nx; ix++)
            {
                double tx = baseX + ix * o.Dx;
                for (long iy = 0; iy < ny; iy++)
                {
                    double ty = baseY + iy * o.Dy;
                    for (long iz = 0; iz < nz; iz++)
                    {
                        double tz = baseZ + iz * o.Dz;
                        pw.WritePlacement(tx, ty, tz, o);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private sealed class EmptyPlan : PackingPlan
    {
        public EmptyPlan()
        {
            Count = 0;
        }

        public override void Write(TextWriter writer)
        {
            writer.WriteLine("0");
        }
    }

    private sealed class SinglePlan : PackingPlan
    {
        private readonly Orientation _orientation;
        private readonly long _nx;
        private readonly long _ny;
        private readonly long _nz;

        public SinglePlan(Orientation orientation, long nx, long ny, long nz, long count)
        {
            _orientation = orientation;
            _nx = nx;
            _ny = ny;
            _nz = nz;
            Count = count;
        }

        public override void Write(TextWriter writer)
        {
            writer.WriteLine(Count.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
            var pw = new PlacementWriter(writer);
            EmitRegion(pw, _orientation, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, _nx, _ny, _nz);
            pw.Flush();
        }
    }

    private sealed class SplitPlan : PackingPlan
    {
        private readonly Container _container;
        private readonly int _axis;
        private readonly Orientation _a;
        private readonly Orientation _b;
        private readonly long _nA;
        private readonly long _nB;

        public SplitPlan(Container container, int axis, Orientation a, Orientation b, long nA, long nB, long count)
        {
            _container = container;
            _axis = axis;
            _a = a;
            _b = b;
            _nA = nA;
            _nB = nB;
            Count = count;
        }

        public override void Write(TextWriter writer)
        {
            writer.WriteLine(Count.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
            var pw = new PlacementWriter(writer);

            if (_axis == 0)
            {
                long nyA = FloorToLong(_container.H / _a.Dy);
                long nzA = FloorToLong(_container.D / _a.Dz);
                EmitRegion(pw, _a, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, _nA, nyA, nzA);

                double startX = _nA * _a.Dx;
                long nyB = FloorToLong(_container.H / _b.Dy);
                long nzB = FloorToLong(_container.D / _b.Dz);
                EmitRegion(pw, _b, startX, 0.0, 0.0, _nB, nyB, nzB);
            }
            else if (_axis == 1)
            {
                long nxA = FloorToLong(_container.W / _a.Dx);
                long nzA = FloorToLong(_container.D / _a.Dz);
                EmitRegion(pw, _a, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, nxA, _nA, nzA);

                double startY = _nA * _a.Dy;
                long nxB = FloorToLong(_container.W / _b.Dx);
                long nzB = FloorToLong(_container.D / _b.Dz);
                EmitRegion(pw, _b, 0.0, startY, 0.0, nxB, _nB, nzB);
            }
            else
            {
                long nxA = FloorToLong(_container.W / _a.Dx);
                long nyA = FloorToLong(_container.H / _a.Dy);
                EmitRegion(pw, _a, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, nxA, nyA, _nA);

                double startZ = _nA * _a.Dz;
                long nxB = FloorToLong(_container.W / _b.Dx);
                long nyB = FloorToLong(_container.H / _b.Dy);
                EmitRegion(pw, _b, 0.0, 0.0, startZ, nxB, nyB, _nB);
            }

            pw.Flush();
        }
    }

    private sealed class PlacementWriter
    {
        private readonly TextWriter _writer;
        private readonly StringBuilder _sb;

        public PlacementWriter(TextWriter writer)
        {
            _writer = writer;
            _sb = new StringBuilder(1 << 20);
        }

        public void WritePlacement(double tx, double ty, double tz, Orientation o)
        {
            AppendFloat(tx);
            _sb.Append(' ');
            AppendFloat(ty);
            _sb.Append(' ');
            AppendFloat(tz);
            _sb.Append(' ');
            _sb.Append(o.QwText);
            _sb.Append(' ');
            _sb.Append(o.QxText);
            _sb.Append(' ');
            _sb.Append(o.QyText);
            _sb.Append(' ');
            _sb.Append(o.QzText);
            _sb.Append('\n');

            if (_sb.Length >= (1 << 20))
            {
                Flush();
            }
        }

        public void Flush()
        {
            if (_sb.Length == 0)
            {
                return;
            }

            _writer.Write(_sb.ToString());
            _sb.Clear();
        }

        private void AppendFloat(double value)
        {
            if (Math.Abs(value) < 5e-16)
            {
                value = 0.0;
            }

            _sb.Append(value.ToString("G17", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
        }
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream _stream;
        private readonly byte[] _buffer;
        private int _len;
        private int _ptr;

        public FastScanner(Stream stream)
        {
            _stream = stream;
            _buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
            _len = 0;
            _ptr = 0;
        }

        public bool TryNextInt(out int value)
        {
            string? token = NextToken();
            if (token == null)
            {
                value = 0;
                return false;
            }

            value = int.Parse(token, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
            return true;
        }

        public int NextInt()
        {
            string token = NextToken() ?? throw new EndOfStreamException();
            return int.Parse(token, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        }

        public double NextDouble()
        {
            string token = NextToken() ?? throw new EndOfStreamException();
            return double.Parse(token, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        }

        private string? NextToken()
        {
            int c;
            do
            {
                c = Read();
                if (c < 0)
                {
                    return null;
                }
            }
            while (c <= 32);

            var sb = new StringBuilder();
            while (c > 32)
            {
                sb.Append((char)c);
                c = Read();
                if (c < 0)
                {
                    break;
                }
            }

            return sb.ToString();
        }

        private int Read()
        {
            if (_ptr >= _len)
            {
                _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
                _ptr = 0;
                if (_len <= 0)
                {
                    return -1;
                }
            }

            return _buffer[_ptr++];
        }
    }
}

Test 13: Longest Common Substring (C++) Score: 0.00 / 12
Typical Prompt:
You are solving the Longest Common Substring problem in C++.

You must write a C++ solver that can handle ANY problem size from trivial to ludicrous scale:
- **Trivial**: 2-3 short strings (10-50 chars each)
- **Medium**: 3-5 medium strings (100-500 chars each)
- **Large**: 5-10 long strings (1000-5000 chars each)
- **Extreme**: 100 very long strings (10MB+ each), massive search space

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: N (number of strings)
Next N lines: one string per line

**Output format (stdout):**
One line: the longest common substring
If no common substring exists, output an empty line.

**Example:**
Input:
3
abcdef
xbcdey
zbcdew

Output:
bcde

**Critical Requirements:**
1. **Scalability**: Your algorithm must adapt based on number and length of strings
2. **Performance**: Must complete within 300 seconds even for very long strings
3. **Correctness**: Must find the actual longest common substring

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Given several strings, find the longest chunk of text that appears identically in every one of them. For example, if the strings are “abcdef” and “xbcdey”, the answer is “bcde”.

Naïve approaches check every possible substring and become far too slow on large inputs. Subpasses increase the string lengths into the millions, so the AI must use efficient data structures or hashing. The baseline uses a simple library call that times out on the bigger cases.

 0.0000
[3 short strings (7 chars)] Invalid: Result must be string, got dict

Longest Common Substring - 3 short strings (7 chars)

View Code (12862 chars)
#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

namespace {

void trim_cr(std::string& s) {
    if (!s.empty() && s.back() == '\r') {
        s.pop_back();
    }
}

std::string lcs_two_small_dp(const std::string& a, const std::string& b) {
    if (a.empty() || b.empty()) {
        return "";
    }

    std::vector<int> prev(b.size() + 1, 0), cur(b.size() + 1, 0);
    std::size_t best_len = 0;
    std::size_t best_end = 0;

    for (std::size_t i = 1; i <= a.size(); ++i) {
        for (std::size_t j = 1; j <= b.size(); ++j) {
            if (a[i - 1] == b[j - 1]) {
                cur[j] = prev[j - 1] + 1;
                if (static_cast<std::size_t>(cur[j]) > best_len) {
                    best_len = static_cast<std::size_t>(cur[j]);
                    best_end = i;
                }
            } else {
                cur[j] = 0;
            }
        }
        std::swap(prev, cur);
        std::fill(cur.begin(), cur.end(), 0);
    }

    return a.substr(best_end - best_len, best_len);
}

class DenseSAM {
public:
    explicit DenseSAM(const std::string& base) : base_(base) {
        states_.reserve(base.size() * 2 + 1);
        states_.push_back(State{});
        last_ = 0;

        for (unsigned char c : base) {
            extend(c);
        }

        build_order();
        for (auto& st : states_) {
            st.best = st.len;
        }
    }

    void process_string(const std::string& t) {
        int v = 0;
        int l = 0;

        for (unsigned char c : t) {
            while (v != 0 && states_[v].next[c] == -1) {
                v = states_[v].link;
                l = states_[v].len;
            }

            int nx = states_[v].next[c];
            if (nx != -1) {
                v = nx;
                ++l;
            } else {
                v = 0;
                l = 0;
            }

            if (l > states_[v].cur) {
                states_[v].cur = l;
            }
        }

        for (int i = static_cast<int>(order_.size()) - 1; i > 0; --i) {
            int s = order_[i];
            int p = states_[s].link;
            if (p >= 0) {
                int push_len = std::min(states_[s].cur, states_[p].len);
                if (push_len > states_[p].cur) {
                    states_[p].cur = push_len;
                }
            }
        }

        for (auto& st : states_) {
            st.best = std::min(st.best, st.cur);
            st.cur = 0;
        }
    }

    std::string answer() const {
        int best_len = 0;
        int best_state = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(states_.size()); ++i) {
            if (states_[i].best > best_len) {
                best_len = states_[i].best;
                best_state = i;
            }
        }

        if (best_len <= 0) {
            return "";
        }

        int end_pos = states_[best_state].first_pos;
        int start = end_pos - best_len + 1;
        if (start < 0) {
            start = 0;
        }
        return base_.substr(static_cast<std::size_t>(start), static_cast<std::size_t>(best_len));
    }

private:
    struct State {
        int len = 0;
        int link = -1;
        int best = 0;
        int cur = 0;
        int first_pos = -1;
        std::array<int, 256> next{};

        State() {
            next.fill(-1);
        }
    };

    std::string base_;
    std::vector<State> states_;
    std::vector<int> order_;
    int last_ = 0;

    int make_state(int len) {
        states_.push_back(State{});
        states_.back().len = len;
        return static_cast<int>(states_.size()) - 1;
    }

    void extend(unsigned char c) {
        int cur = make_state(states_[last_].len + 1);
        states_[cur].first_pos = states_[cur].len - 1;

        int p = last_;
        while (p != -1 && states_[p].next[c] == -1) {
            states_[p].next[c] = cur;
            p = states_[p].link;
        }

        if (p == -1) {
            states_[cur].link = 0;
        } else {
            int q = states_[p].next[c];
            if (states_[p].len + 1 == states_[q].len) {
                states_[cur].link = q;
            } else {
                int clone = make_state(states_[p].len + 1);
                states_[clone].next = states_[q].next;
                states_[clone].link = states_[q].link;
                states_[clone].first_pos = states_[q].first_pos;

                while (p != -1 && states_[p].next[c] == q) {
                    states_[p].next[c] = clone;
                    p = states_[p].link;
                }

                states_[q].link = clone;
                states_[cur].link = clone;
            }
        }

        last_ = cur;
    }

    void build_order() {
        int max_len = 0;
        for (const auto& st : states_) {
            if (st.len > max_len) {
                max_len = st.len;
            }
        }

        std::vector<int> cnt(static_cast<std::size_t>(max_len) + 1, 0);
        for (const auto& st : states_) {
            ++cnt[static_cast<std::size_t>(st.len)];
        }

        for (int i = 1; i <= max_len; ++i) {
            cnt[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)] += cnt[static_cast<std::size_t>(i - 1)];
        }

        order_.assign(states_.size(), 0);
        for (int i = static_cast<int>(states_.size()) - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
            int len = states_[i].len;
            order_[--cnt[static_cast<std::size_t>(len)]] = i;
        }
    }
};

class SparseSAM {
public:
    explicit SparseSAM(const std::string& base) : base_(base) {
        states_.reserve(base.size() * 2 + 1);
        edges_.reserve(base.size() * 3 + 5);

        states_.push_back(State{});
        last_ = 0;

        for (unsigned char c : base) {
            extend(c);
        }

        build_order();
        for (auto& st : states_) {
            st.best = st.len;
        }
    }

    void process_string(const std::string& t) {
        int v = 0;
        int l = 0;

        for (unsigned char c : t) {
            while (v != 0 && get_next(v, c) == -1) {
                v = states_[v].link;
                l = states_[v].len;
            }

            int nx = get_next(v, c);
            if (nx != -1) {
                v = nx;
                ++l;
            } else {
                v = 0;
                l = 0;
            }

            if (l > states_[v].cur) {
                states_[v].cur = l;
            }
        }

        for (int i = static_cast<int>(order_.size()) - 1; i > 0; --i) {
            int s = order_[i];
            int p = states_[s].link;
            if (p >= 0) {
                int push_len = std::min(states_[s].cur, states_[p].len);
                if (push_len > states_[p].cur) {
                    states_[p].cur = push_len;
                }
            }
        }

        for (auto& st : states_) {
            st.best = std::min(st.best, st.cur);
            st.cur = 0;
        }
    }

    std::string answer() const {
        int best_len = 0;
        int best_state = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(states_.size()); ++i) {
            if (states_[i].best > best_len) {
                best_len = states_[i].best;
                best_state = i;
            }
        }

        if (best_len <= 0) {
            return "";
        }

        int end_pos = states_[best_state].first_pos;
        int start = end_pos - best_len + 1;
        if (start < 0) {
            start = 0;
        }
        return base_.substr(static_cast<std::size_t>(start), static_cast<std::size_t>(best_len));
    }

private:
    struct Edge {
        int to = -1;
        int next = -1;
        unsigned char ch = 0;
    };

    struct State {
        int len = 0;
        int link = -1;
        int head = -1;
        int best = 0;
        int cur = 0;
        int first_pos = -1;
    };

    std::string base_;
    std::vector<State> states_;
    std::vector<Edge> edges_;
    std::vector<int> order_;
    int last_ = 0;

    int make_state(int len) {
        states_.push_back(State{});
        states_.back().len = len;
        return static_cast<int>(states_.size()) - 1;
    }

    int get_next(int s, unsigned char c) const {
        for (int e = states_[s].head; e != -1; e = edges_[e].next) {
            if (edges_[e].ch == c) {
                return edges_[e].to;
            }
        }
        return -1;
    }

    void set_next(int s, unsigned char c, int to) {
        for (int e = states_[s].head; e != -1; e = edges_[e].next) {
            if (edges_[e].ch == c) {
                edges_[e].to = to;
                return;
            }
        }
        Edge ne;
        ne.to = to;
        ne.ch = c;
        ne.next = states_[s].head;
        edges_.push_back(ne);
        states_[s].head = static_cast<int>(edges_.size()) - 1;
    }

    void clone_transitions(int from, int to) {
        std::vector<std::pair<unsigned char, int>> tmp;
        for (int e = states_[from].head; e != -1; e = edges_[e].next) {
            tmp.push_back({edges_[e].ch, edges_[e].to});
        }
        for (const auto& kv : tmp) {
            set_next(to, kv.first, kv.second);
        }
    }

    void extend(unsigned char c) {
        int cur = make_state(states_[last_].len + 1);
        states_[cur].first_pos = states_[cur].len - 1;

        int p = last_;
        while (p != -1 && get_next(p, c) == -1) {
            set_next(p, c, cur);
            p = states_[p].link;
        }

        if (p == -1) {
            states_[cur].link = 0;
        } else {
            int q = get_next(p, c);
            if (states_[p].len + 1 == states_[q].len) {
                states_[cur].link = q;
            } else {
                int clone = make_state(states_[p].len + 1);
                states_[clone].link = states_[q].link;
                states_[clone].first_pos = states_[q].first_pos;
                clone_transitions(q, clone);

                while (p != -1 && get_next(p, c) == q) {
                    set_next(p, c, clone);
                    p = states_[p].link;
                }

                states_[q].link = clone;
                states_[cur].link = clone;
            }
        }

        last_ = cur;
    }

    void build_order() {
        int max_len = 0;
        for (const auto& st : states_) {
            if (st.len > max_len) {
                max_len = st.len;
            }
        }

        std::vector<int> cnt(static_cast<std::size_t>(max_len) + 1, 0);
        for (const auto& st : states_) {
            ++cnt[static_cast<std::size_t>(st.len)];
        }

        for (int i = 1; i <= max_len; ++i) {
            cnt[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)] += cnt[static_cast<std::size_t>(i - 1)];
        }

        order_.assign(states_.size(), 0);
        for (int i = static_cast<int>(states_.size()) - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
            int len = states_[i].len;
            order_[--cnt[static_cast<std::size_t>(len)]] = i;
        }
    }
};

} // namespace

int main() {
    std::ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n = 0;
    if (!(std::cin >> n)) {
        return 0;
    }

    std::string dummy;
    std::getline(std::cin, dummy);

    if (n <= 0) {
        std::cout << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    std::vector<std::string> s(static_cast<std::size_t>(n));
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        std::getline(std::cin, s[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)]);
        trim_cr(s[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)]);
    }

    int shortest = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (s[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)].size() < s[static_cast<std::size_t>(shortest)].size()) {
            shortest = i;
        }
    }

    if (s[static_cast<std::size_t>(shortest)].empty()) {
        std::cout << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    if (shortest != 0) {
        std::swap(s[0], s[static_cast<std::size_t>(shortest)]);
    }

    if (n == 1) {
        std::cout << s[0] << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    const std::size_t len0 = s[0].size();
    const std::size_t len1 = s[1].size();

    // Strategy A: tiny 2-string case -> classic DP.
    if (n == 2 && len0 <= 10000 && len1 <= 10000 && len0 * len1 <= 25000000ULL) {
        std::cout << lcs_two_small_dp(s[0], s[1]) << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    // Strategy B/C: scalable suffix automaton, dense for moderate base size, sparse for very large base.
    const std::size_t dense_threshold = 180000;

    std::string ans;
    if (s[0].size() <= dense_threshold) {
        DenseSAM sam(s[0]);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            sam.process_string(s[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)]);
        }
        ans = sam.answer();
    } else {
        SparseSAM sam(s[0]);
        for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
            sam.process_string(s[static_cast<std::size_t>(i)]);
        }
        ans = sam.answer();
    }

    std::cout << ans << '\n';
    return 0;
}

Test 14: Minesweeper Solver (C#) Score: 10.00 / 10
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a Minesweeper solver in C# that must handle ANY board complexity from trivial to ludicrous scale.

- **Trivial**: Small boards (5x5-8x8), simple patterns, few mines
- **Extreme**: Massive boards (10000x10000), very complex constraint satisfaction problems

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: H W (height and width)
Next H lines: the board row strings (each W characters)

**Cell meanings:**
- ' ' (space): Unknown/unrevealed cell - could be mine or safe
- '0'-'8': Revealed safe cell showing count of adjacent mines (8 neighbors)
- '*': Flagged mine (known mine location)

**Output format (stdout):**
Line 1: N (number of safe cells found)
Next N lines: x y (column row, 0-indexed)
Only output cells that are currently unknown (' ') and provably safe.
Do NOT guess - only return cells you can prove are safe.

**Example:**
For a board where cell (0,0) shows '1' and has one adjacent mine at (1,0):
Neighbors (0,1) and (0,2) are guaranteed safe.

**Constraints:**
- Return as many provably safe cells as possible
- Never return a cell that could be a mine
- Must handle varying board sizes and mine densities efficiently

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14

Write complete, compilable C# code with a static void Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on board complexity.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Given a partially-revealed Minesweeper board, deduce which hidden cells are safe to click and which contain mines. Each visible number tells you exactly how many of its neighbours are mined — the AI must combine these clues to make guaranteed-safe moves without guessing.

Larger boards and denser mine layouts make the logic harder. The problem is NP-complete in general, but clever constraint reasoning can solve most practical boards. The baseline uses only the simplest single-cell deduction rules.

 1.0000
[8x8 board, 10 mines] Found: 27 safe, Baseline: 23, Total safe: 33, Time: 0.1s - excellent (≥ baseline)

Minesweeper Solver - 8x8 board, 10 mines

View Code (22430 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text;

public static class Program
{
    private readonly struct Clue
    {
        public readonly int Target;
        public readonly int StaticFlags;
        public readonly int[] Unknowns;

        public Clue(int target, int staticFlags, int[] unknowns)
        {
            Target = target;
            StaticFlags = staticFlags;
            Unknowns = unknowns;
        }
    }

    private sealed class Constraint
    {
        public readonly int Need;
        public readonly int[] Vars;

        public Constraint(int need, int[] vars)
        {
            Need = need;
            Vars = vars;
        }
    }

    private static int _h;
    private static int _w;
    private static string[] _board = Array.Empty<string>();

    public static void Main()
    {
        string? first = Console.ReadLine();
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(first))
        {
            Console.Write("0\n");
            return;
        }

        string[] dims = first.Split((char[]?)null, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        if (dims.Length < 2 || !int.TryParse(dims[0], out _h) || !int.TryParse(dims[1], out _w) || _h <= 0 || _w <= 0)
        {
            Console.Write("0\n");
            return;
        }

        _board = new string[_h];
        for (int r = 0; r < _h; r++)
        {
            string line = Console.ReadLine() ?? string.Empty;
            if (line.Length < _w)
            {
                line = line.PadRight(_w, ' ');
            }
            else if (line.Length > _w)
            {
                line = line.Substring(0, _w);
            }

            _board[r] = line;
        }

        List<Clue> clues = BuildClues();
        var knownSafe = new HashSet<int>();
        var knownMines = new HashSet<int>();

        long cells = (long)_h * _w;

        // Adaptive strategy selection based on board scale.
        bool enableSubset = cells <= 50_000_000L && clues.Count > 0;
        int subsetConstraintLimit = cells <= 1_000_000L ? 200_000 : (cells <= 25_000_000L ? 80_000 : 20_000);

        bool enableExact = cells <= 4_000_000L && clues.Count <= 300_000;
        int maxExactVars = cells <= 400_000L ? 26 : (cells <= 1_500_000L ? 22 : 18);
        int maxExactConstraints = maxExactVars * 3;
        int exactNodeLimit = 2_000_000;

        int rounds = enableExact ? 6 : 1;
        for (int round = 0; round < rounds; round++)
        {
            RunLocalToFixpoint(clues, knownSafe, knownMines, enableSubset, subsetConstraintLimit);

            if (!enableExact)
            {
                break;
            }

            bool exactChanged = ApplyExactComponents(clues, knownSafe, knownMines, maxExactVars, maxExactConstraints, exactNodeLimit);
            if (!exactChanged)
            {
                break;
            }
        }

        RunLocalToFixpoint(clues, knownSafe, knownMines, enableSubset, subsetConstraintLimit);
        WriteSafeCells(knownSafe);
    }

    private static List<Clue> BuildClues()
    {
        var clues = new List<Clue>();

        for (int r = 0; r < _h; r++)
        {
            string row = _board[r];
            for (int c = 0; c < _w; c++)
            {
                char ch = row[c];
                if (!IsDigit(ch))
                {
                    continue;
                }

                int target = ch - '0';
                int staticFlags = 0;
                int[] tempUnknowns = new int[8];
                int count = 0;

                for (int dr = -1; dr <= 1; dr++)
                {
                    int nr = r + dr;
                    if ((uint)nr >= (uint)_h)
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    for (int dc = -1; dc <= 1; dc++)
                    {
                        if (dr == 0 && dc == 0)
                        {
                            continue;
                        }

                        int nc = c + dc;
                        if ((uint)nc >= (uint)_w)
                        {
                            continue;
                        }

                        char n = _board[nr][nc];
                        if (n == '*')
                        {
                            staticFlags++;
                        }
                        else if (n == ' ')
                        {
                            tempUnknowns[count++] = ToId(nr, nc);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if (count == 0)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                int[] unknowns = new int[count];
                for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
                {
                    unknowns[i] = tempUnknowns[i];
                }

                clues.Add(new Clue(target, staticFlags, unknowns));
            }
        }

        return clues;
    }

    private static void RunLocalToFixpoint(
        List<Clue> clues,
        HashSet<int> knownSafe,
        HashSet<int> knownMines,
        bool enableSubset,
        int subsetConstraintLimit)
    {
        while (true)
        {
            bool changed = ApplyLocalAndSubset(clues, knownSafe, knownMines, enableSubset, subsetConstraintLimit);
            if (!changed)
            {
                return;
            }
        }
    }

    private static bool ApplyLocalAndSubset(
        List<Clue> clues,
        HashSet<int> knownSafe,
        HashSet<int> knownMines,
        bool enableSubset,
        int subsetConstraintLimit)
    {
        bool changed = false;
        var active = enableSubset ? new List<Constraint>(Math.Min(clues.Count, subsetConstraintLimit)) : null;
        bool collectForSubset = enableSubset;

        foreach (Clue clue in clues)
        {
            int need = clue.Target - clue.StaticFlags;
            int[] pending = new int[8];
            int pCount = 0;

            int[] unknowns = clue.Unknowns;
            for (int i = 0; i < unknowns.Length; i++)
            {
                int id = unknowns[i];
                if (knownSafe.Contains(id))
                {
                    continue;
                }

                if (knownMines.Contains(id))
                {
                    need--;
                    continue;
                }

                pending[pCount++] = id;
            }

            if (pCount == 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            if (need == 0)
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < pCount; i++)
                {
                    changed |= MarkSafe(pending[i], knownSafe, knownMines);
                }

                continue;
            }

            if (need == pCount)
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < pCount; i++)
                {
                    changed |= MarkMine(pending[i], knownSafe, knownMines);
                }

                continue;
            }

            if (need <= 0 || need >= pCount || !collectForSubset || active is null)
            {
                continue;
            }

            int[] vars = new int[pCount];
            for (int i = 0; i < pCount; i++)
            {
                vars[i] = pending[i];
            }

            Array.Sort(vars);
            active.Add(new Constraint(need, vars));

            if (active.Count > subsetConstraintLimit)
            {
                active.Clear();
                collectForSubset = false;
            }
        }

        if (collectForSubset && active is not null && active.Count > 1)
        {
            changed |= ApplySubset(active, knownSafe, knownMines);
        }

        return changed;
    }

    private static bool ApplySubset(List<Constraint> active, HashSet<int> knownSafe, HashSet<int> knownMines)
    {
        bool changed = false;
        var varToConstraints = new Dictionary<int, List<int>>(active.Count * 2);

        for (int i = 0; i < active.Count; i++)
        {
            int[] vars = active[i].Vars;
            for (int j = 0; j < vars.Length; j++)
            {
                int v = vars[j];
                if (!varToConstraints.TryGetValue(v, out List<int>? list))
                {
                    list = new List<int>(4);
                    varToConstraints[v] = list;
                }

                list.Add(i);
            }
        }

        var seenPairs = new HashSet<long>();
        foreach (KeyValuePair<int, List<int>> kv in varToConstraints)
        {
            List<int> list = kv.Value;
            for (int i = 0; i < list.Count; i++)
            {
                for (int j = i + 1; j < list.Count; j++)
                {
                    int a = list[i];
                    int b = list[j];
                    if (a > b)
                    {
                        (a, b) = (b, a);
                    }

                    long key = ((long)a << 32) ^ (uint)b;
                    if (!seenPairs.Add(key))
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    Constraint c1 = active[a];
                    Constraint c2 = active[b];
                    changed |= DeduceFromSubsetPair(c1, c2, knownSafe, knownMines);
                }
            }
        }

        return changed;
    }

    private static bool DeduceFromSubsetPair(Constraint a, Constraint b, HashSet<int> knownSafe, HashSet<int> knownMines)
    {
        bool changed = false;

        Span<int> diff = stackalloc int[8];

        if (TrySubset(a.Vars, b.Vars, diff, out int diffCountAB))
        {
            int mineDiff = b.Need - a.Need;
            if (mineDiff == 0)
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < diffCountAB; i++)
                {
                    changed |= MarkSafe(diff[i], knownSafe, knownMines);
                }
            }
            else if (mineDiff == diffCountAB)
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < diffCountAB; i++)
                {
                    changed |= MarkMine(diff[i], knownSafe, knownMines);
                }
            }
        }

        if (TrySubset(b.Vars, a.Vars, diff, out int diffCountBA))
        {
            int mineDiff = a.Need - b.Need;
            if (mineDiff == 0)
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < diffCountBA; i++)
                {
                    changed |= MarkSafe(diff[i], knownSafe, knownMines);
                }
            }
            else if (mineDiff == diffCountBA)
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < diffCountBA; i++)
                {
                    changed |= MarkMine(diff[i], knownSafe, knownMines);
                }
            }
        }

        return changed;
    }

    private static bool TrySubset(int[] maybeSubset, int[] maybeSuperset, Span<int> diff, out int diffCount)
    {
        diffCount = 0;
        if (maybeSubset.Length > maybeSuperset.Length)
        {
            return false;
        }

        int i = 0;
        int j = 0;

        while (i < maybeSubset.Length && j < maybeSuperset.Length)
        {
            int a = maybeSubset[i];
            int b = maybeSuperset[j];

            if (a == b)
            {
                i++;
                j++;
            }
            else if (a > b)
            {
                diff[diffCount++] = b;
                j++;
            }
            else
            {
                return false;
            }
        }

        if (i != maybeSubset.Length)
        {
            return false;
        }

        while (j < maybeSuperset.Length)
        {
            diff[diffCount++] = maybeSuperset[j++];
        }

        return true;
    }

    private static bool ApplyExactComponents(
        List<Clue> clues,
        HashSet<int> knownSafe,
        HashSet<int> knownMines,
        int maxExactVars,
        int maxExactConstraints,
        int nodeLimit)
    {
        var active = BuildUnresolvedConstraints(clues, knownSafe, knownMines);
        if (active.Count == 0)
        {
            return false;
        }

        var varToConstraints = new Dictionary<int, List<int>>(active.Count * 2);
        for (int ci = 0; ci < active.Count; ci++)
        {
            int[] vars = active[ci].Vars;
            for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
            {
                int v = vars[i];
                if (!varToConstraints.TryGetValue(v, out List<int>? list))
                {
                    list = new List<int>(4);
                    varToConstraints[v] = list;
                }

                list.Add(ci);
            }
        }

        bool changed = false;
        bool[] visitedConstraints = new bool[active.Count];
        var queue = new Queue<int>();

        for (int start = 0; start < active.Count; start++)
        {
            if (visitedConstraints[start])
            {
                continue;
            }

            queue.Clear();
            queue.Enqueue(start);
            visitedConstraints[start] = true;

            var componentConstraints = new List<int>();
            var componentVarSet = new HashSet<int>();

            while (queue.Count > 0)
            {
                int cIdx = queue.Dequeue();
                componentConstraints.Add(cIdx);

                int[] vars = active[cIdx].Vars;
                for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                {
                    int v = vars[i];
                    if (!componentVarSet.Add(v))
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    if (!varToConstraints.TryGetValue(v, out List<int>? neighbors))
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    for (int k = 0; k < neighbors.Count; k++)
                    {
                        int next = neighbors[k];
                        if (!visitedConstraints[next])
                        {
                            visitedConstraints[next] = true;
                            queue.Enqueue(next);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            if (componentVarSet.Count == 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            if (componentVarSet.Count > maxExactVars || componentConstraints.Count > maxExactConstraints)
            {
                continue;
            }

            int[] varIds = new int[componentVarSet.Count];
            componentVarSet.CopyTo(varIds);
            Array.Sort(varIds);

            var localIndex = new Dictionary<int, int>(varIds.Length);
            for (int i = 0; i < varIds.Length; i++)
            {
                localIndex[varIds[i]] = i;
            }

            var localConstraints = new List<Constraint>(componentConstraints.Count);
            for (int i = 0; i < componentConstraints.Count; i++)
            {
                Constraint g = active[componentConstraints[i]];
                int[] localVars = new int[g.Vars.Length];
                for (int k = 0; k < g.Vars.Length; k++)
                {
                    localVars[k] = localIndex[g.Vars[k]];
                }

                Array.Sort(localVars);
                localConstraints.Add(new Constraint(g.Need, localVars));
            }

            if (!EnumerateComponent(varIds.Length, localConstraints, nodeLimit, out bool[] canBeSafe, out bool[] canBeMine))
            {
                continue;
            }

            for (int i = 0; i < varIds.Length; i++)
            {
                int id = varIds[i];
                if (canBeSafe[i] && !canBeMine[i])
                {
                    changed |= MarkSafe(id, knownSafe, knownMines);
                }
                else if (canBeMine[i] && !canBeSafe[i])
                {
                    changed |= MarkMine(id, knownSafe, knownMines);
                }
            }
        }

        return changed;
    }

    private static List<Constraint> BuildUnresolvedConstraints(List<Clue> clues, HashSet<int> knownSafe, HashSet<int> knownMines)
    {
        var active = new List<Constraint>(Math.Min(clues.Count, 200_000));

        foreach (Clue clue in clues)
        {
            int need = clue.Target - clue.StaticFlags;
            int[] pending = new int[8];
            int count = 0;

            int[] unknowns = clue.Unknowns;
            for (int i = 0; i < unknowns.Length; i++)
            {
                int id = unknowns[i];
                if (knownSafe.Contains(id))
                {
                    continue;
                }

                if (knownMines.Contains(id))
                {
                    need--;
                    continue;
                }

                pending[count++] = id;
            }

            if (count <= 1)
            {
                continue;
            }

            if (need <= 0 || need >= count)
            {
                continue;
            }

            int[] vars = new int[count];
            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
            {
                vars[i] = pending[i];
            }

            Array.Sort(vars);
            active.Add(new Constraint(need, vars));
        }

        return active;
    }

    private static bool EnumerateComponent(
        int variableCount,
        List<Constraint> constraints,
        int nodeLimit,
        out bool[] canBeSafe,
        out bool[] canBeMine)
    {
        bool[] safePossible = new bool[variableCount];
        bool[] minePossible = new bool[variableCount];

        int constraintCount = constraints.Count;
        var varToConstraints = new List<int>[variableCount];
        for (int i = 0; i < variableCount; i++)
        {
            varToConstraints[i] = new List<int>(4);
        }

        int[] need = new int[constraintCount];
        int[] remaining = new int[constraintCount];
        int[] mines = new int[constraintCount];

        for (int c = 0; c < constraintCount; c++)
        {
            Constraint constraint = constraints[c];
            need[c] = constraint.Need;
            remaining[c] = constraint.Vars.Length;

            int[] vars = constraint.Vars;
            for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
            {
                varToConstraints[vars[i]].Add(c);
            }
        }

        int[] order = new int[variableCount];
        for (int i = 0; i < variableCount; i++)
        {
            order[i] = i;
        }

        Array.Sort(order, (a, b) => varToConstraints[b].Count.CompareTo(varToConstraints[a].Count));

        int[] assignment = new int[variableCount];
        Array.Fill(assignment, -1);

        long nodes = 0;
        int solutions = 0;
        bool aborted = false;

        void Dfs(int pos)
        {
            if (aborted)
            {
                return;
            }

            nodes++;
            if (nodes > nodeLimit)
            {
                aborted = true;
                return;
            }

            if (pos == variableCount)
            {
                for (int c = 0; c < constraintCount; c++)
                {
                    if (mines[c] != need[c])
                    {
                        return;
                    }
                }

                solutions++;
                for (int v = 0; v < variableCount; v++)
                {
                    if (assignment[v] == 1)
                    {
                        minePossible[v] = true;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        safePossible[v] = true;
                    }
                }

                return;
            }

            int var = order[pos];

            TryAssign(pos, var, 0);
            if (!aborted)
            {
                TryAssign(pos, var, 1);
            }
        }

        void TryAssign(int pos, int var, int value)
        {
            assignment[var] = value;
            List<int> links = varToConstraints[var];
            bool valid = true;

            for (int i = 0; i < links.Count; i++)
            {
                int c = links[i];
                remaining[c]--;
                if (value == 1)
                {
                    mines[c]++;
                }

                if (mines[c] > need[c] || mines[c] + remaining[c] < need[c])
                {
                    valid = false;
                }
            }

            if (valid)
            {
                Dfs(pos + 1);
            }

            for (int i = links.Count - 1; i >= 0; i--)
            {
                int c = links[i];
                if (value == 1)
                {
                    mines[c]--;
                }

                remaining[c]++;
            }

            assignment[var] = -1;
        }

        Dfs(0);

        if (aborted || solutions == 0)
        {
            canBeSafe = safePossible;
            canBeMine = minePossible;
            return false;
        }

        canBeSafe = safePossible;
        canBeMine = minePossible;
        return true;
    }

    private static bool MarkSafe(int id, HashSet<int> knownSafe, HashSet<int> knownMines)
    {
        if (knownMines.Contains(id))
        {
            return false;
        }

        return knownSafe.Add(id);
    }

    private static bool MarkMine(int id, HashSet<int> knownSafe, HashSet<int> knownMines)
    {
        if (knownSafe.Contains(id))
        {
            return false;
        }

        return knownMines.Add(id);
    }

    private static void WriteSafeCells(HashSet<int> knownSafe)
    {
        var safeIds = new List<int>(knownSafe.Count);
        foreach (int id in knownSafe)
        {
            int r = id / _w;
            int c = id % _w;
            if ((uint)r < (uint)_h && (uint)c < (uint)_w && _board[r][c] == ' ')
            {
                safeIds.Add(id);
            }
        }

        safeIds.Sort();

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine(safeIds.Count.ToString());
        for (int i = 0; i < safeIds.Count; i++)
        {
            int id = safeIds[i];
            int r = id / _w;
            int c = id % _w;
            sb.Append(c).Append(' ').Append(r).Append('\n');
        }

        Console.Write(sb.ToString());
    }

    private static bool IsDigit(char ch)
    {
        return ch >= '0' && ch <= '8';
    }

    private static int ToId(int r, int c)
    {
        return r * _w + c;
    }
}
