Subpass 2: 1000 nodes, 8000 edges

Score: 1.00

Details: [1000 nodes, 8000 edges] Cut size: 5, Known min: 12, Time: 1.10s - optimal

C++ Code 
#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdio>
#include <cstdint>
#include <fstream>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <numeric>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct EdgePair {
    int u;
    int v;
};

struct WeightedEdge {
    int u;
    int v;
    long long w;
};

static uint64_t pack_key(int a, int b) {
    if (a > b) {
        std::swap(a, b);
    }
    return (static_cast<uint64_t>(static_cast<uint32_t>(a)) << 32) |
           static_cast<uint32_t>(b);
}

static pair<long long, vector<int>> stoer_wagner_dense(int n, const vector<EdgePair>& edges) {
    vector<vector<long long>> w(n, vector<long long>(n, 0));
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++w[e.u][e.v];
        ++w[e.v][e.u];
    }

    vector<int> verts(n);
    iota(verts.begin(), verts.end(), 0);

    vector<vector<int>> groups(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        groups[i].push_back(i);
    }

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    vector<int> best_side;

    int active_count = n;
    while (active_count > 1) {
        vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
        vector<char> added(n, 0);
        int prev = -1;

        for (int it = 0; it < active_count; ++it) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                int v = verts[i];
                if (!added[v] && (sel == -1 || weight[v] > weight[sel])) {
                    sel = v;
                }
            }

            if (it == active_count - 1) {
                long long cut_value = weight[sel];
                if (cut_value < best) {
                    best = cut_value;
                    best_side = groups[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                        int v = verts[i];
                        if (v == sel || v == prev) continue;
                        w[prev][v] += w[sel][v];
                        w[v][prev] = w[prev][v];
                    }

                    groups[prev].insert(groups[prev].end(), groups[sel].begin(), groups[sel].end());
                    groups[sel].clear();

                    auto pos_it = find(verts.begin(), verts.begin() + active_count, sel);
                    iter_swap(pos_it, verts.begin() + active_count - 1);
                    --active_count;
                }
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            prev = sel;

            for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                int v = verts[i];
                if (!added[v]) {
                    weight[v] += w[sel][v];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if (best_side.empty() && n > 0) {
        best_side.push_back(0);
        best = 0;
    }
    return {best, best_side};
}

static pair<long long, vector<int>> stoer_wagner_sparse(int n, const vector<WeightedEdge>& wedges) {
    vector<unordered_map<int, long long>> adj(n);
    adj.reserve(n);

    for (const auto& e : wedges) {
        if (e.u == e.v || e.w == 0) continue;
        adj[e.u][e.v] += e.w;
        adj[e.v][e.u] += e.w;
    }

    vector<char> alive(n, 1);
    int active_count = n;

    vector<vector<int>> groups(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) groups[i].push_back(i);

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    vector<int> best_side;

    while (active_count > 1) {
        vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
        vector<char> added(n, 0);
        int prev = -1;

        for (int it = 0; it < active_count; ++it) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
                if (!alive[v] || added[v]) continue;
                if (sel == -1 || weight[v] > weight[sel]) sel = v;
            }

            if (sel == -1) {
                active_count = 1;
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;

            if (it == active_count - 1) {
                long long cut_value = weight[sel];
                if (cut_value < best) {
                    best = cut_value;
                    best_side = groups[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (const auto& kv : adj[sel]) {
                        int to = kv.first;
                        long long cap = kv.second;
                        if (!alive[to] || to == prev) continue;

                        adj[prev][to] += cap;
                        adj[to][prev] += cap;
                        adj[to].erase(sel);
                    }
                    adj[prev].erase(sel);
                    adj[sel].clear();

                    groups[prev].insert(groups[prev].end(), groups[sel].begin(), groups[sel].end());
                    groups[sel].clear();

                    alive[sel] = 0;
                    --active_count;
                }
                break;
            }

            prev = sel;
            for (const auto& kv : adj[sel]) {
                int to = kv.first;
                if (alive[to] && !added[to]) {
                    weight[to] += kv.second;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if (best_side.empty() && n > 0) {
        best_side.push_back(0);
        best = 0;
    }
    return {best, best_side};
}

static vector<EdgePair> build_cut_from_side(const vector<EdgePair>& edges, const vector<int>& side, int n) {
    vector<char> in_side(n, 0);
    for (int v : side) {
        if (v >= 0 && v < n) in_side[v] = 1;
    }

    vector<EdgePair> cut;
    cut.reserve(edges.size() / 8 + 8);
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        if (in_side[e.u] != in_side[e.v]) {
            cut.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    return cut;
}

static vector<EdgePair> cut_by_isolating_vertex_from_file(const string& path, int isolate_v) {
    vector<EdgePair> cut;
    ifstream fin(path, ios::binary);
    if (!fin) return cut;

    EdgePair e{};
    while (fin.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&e), sizeof(e))) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        if (e.u == isolate_v || e.v == isolate_v) {
            cut.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    return cut;
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n = 0;
    uint64_t m = 0;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m)) {
        return 0;
    }

    if (n <= 1) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    const uint64_t MAX_IN_MEMORY_EDGES = 20000000ULL;
    const int DENSE_N_LIMIT = 900;
    const uint64_t MAX_EXACT_EDGES = 3000000ULL;
    const int MAX_EXACT_N = 7000;

    const bool spill_to_disk = (m > MAX_IN_MEMORY_EDGES);

    vector<int> degree(n, 0);
    int min_deg_vertex = 0;

    vector<EdgePair> edges;
    edges.reserve(spill_to_disk ? 1024 : static_cast<size_t>(m));

    string temp_file = "edges_spill.bin";
    ofstream spill_out;
    if (spill_to_disk) {
        spill_out.open(temp_file, ios::binary | ios::trunc);
        if (!spill_out) {
            return 1;
        }
    }

    for (uint64_t i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u = 0, v = 0;
        cin >> u >> v;
        EdgePair e{u, v};

        if (u >= 0 && u < n && v >= 0 && v < n && u != v) {
            ++degree[u];
            ++degree[v];
        }

        if (spill_to_disk) {
            spill_out.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&e), sizeof(e));
        } else {
            edges.push_back(e);
        }
    }

    if (spill_to_disk) {
        spill_out.close();
    }

    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < degree[min_deg_vertex]) {
            min_deg_vertex = i;
        }
    }

    vector<EdgePair> answer_cut;

    const bool use_fallback = spill_to_disk || n > MAX_EXACT_N || m > MAX_EXACT_EDGES;

    if (use_fallback) {
        if (spill_to_disk) {
            answer_cut = cut_by_isolating_vertex_from_file(temp_file, min_deg_vertex);
            std::remove(temp_file.c_str());
        } else {
            answer_cut.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(degree[min_deg_vertex]));
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                if (e.u == min_deg_vertex || e.v == min_deg_vertex) {
                    answer_cut.push_back(e);
                }
            }
        }
    } else {
        vector<int> best_side;

        if (n <= DENSE_N_LIMIT) {
            auto [best_value, side] = stoer_wagner_dense(n, edges);
            (void)best_value;
            best_side = std::move(side);
        } else {
            unordered_map<uint64_t, long long> cap;
            cap.reserve(edges.size() * 2 + 1);
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                ++cap[pack_key(e.u, e.v)];
            }

            vector<WeightedEdge> wedges;
            wedges.reserve(cap.size());
            for (const auto& kv : cap) {
                int u = static_cast<int>(kv.first >> 32);
                int v = static_cast<int>(kv.first & 0xffffffffu);
                wedges.push_back({u, v, kv.second});
            }

            auto [best_value, side] = stoer_wagner_sparse(n, wedges);
            (void)best_value;
            best_side = std::move(side);
        }

        answer_cut = build_cut_from_side(edges, best_side, n);

        if (answer_cut.empty()) {
            answer_cut.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(degree[min_deg_vertex]));
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                if (e.u == min_deg_vertex || e.v == min_deg_vertex) {
                    answer_cut.push_back(e);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    cout << answer_cut.size() << '\n';
    for (const auto& e : answer_cut) {
        cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}

#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdio>
#include <cstdint>
#include <fstream>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <numeric>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct EdgePair {
    int u;
    int v;
};

struct WeightedEdge {
    int u;
    int v;
    long long w;
};

static uint64_t pack_key(int a, int b) {
    if (a > b) {
        std::swap(a, b);
    }
    return (static_cast<uint64_t>(static_cast<uint32_t>(a)) << 32) |
           static_cast<uint32_t>(b);
}

static pair<long long, vector<int>> stoer_wagner_dense(int n, const vector<EdgePair>& edges) {
    vector<vector<long long>> w(n, vector<long long>(n, 0));
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++w[e.u][e.v];
        ++w[e.v][e.u];
    }

    vector<int> verts(n);
    iota(verts.begin(), verts.end(), 0);

    vector<vector<int>> groups(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        groups[i].push_back(i);
    }

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    vector<int> best_side;

    int active_count = n;
    while (active_count > 1) {
        vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
        vector<char> added(n, 0);
        int prev = -1;

        for (int it = 0; it < active_count; ++it) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                int v = verts[i];
                if (!added[v] && (sel == -1 || weight[v] > weight[sel])) {
                    sel = v;
                }
            }

            if (it == active_count - 1) {
                long long cut_value = weight[sel];
                if (cut_value < best) {
                    best = cut_value;
                    best_side = groups[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                        int v = verts[i];
                        if (v == sel || v == prev) continue;
                        w[prev][v] += w[sel][v];
                        w[v][prev] = w[prev][v];
                    }

                    groups[prev].insert(groups[prev].end(), groups[sel].begin(), groups[sel].end());
                    groups[sel].clear();

                    auto pos_it = find(verts.begin(), verts.begin() + active_count, sel);
                    iter_swap(pos_it, verts.begin() + active_count - 1);
                    --active_count;
                }
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            prev = sel;

            for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                int v = verts[i];
                if (!added[v]) {
                    weight[v] += w[sel][v];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if (best_side.empty() && n > 0) {
        best_side.push_back(0);
        best = 0;
    }
    return {best, best_side};
}

static pair<long long, vector<int>> stoer_wagner_sparse(int n, const vector<WeightedEdge>& wedges) {
    vector<unordered_map<int, long long>> adj(n);
    adj.reserve(n);

    for (const auto& e : wedges) {
        if (e.u == e.v || e.w == 0) continue;
        adj[e.u][e.v] += e.w;
        adj[e.v][e.u] += e.w;
    }

    vector<char> alive(n, 1);
    int active_count = n;

    vector<vector<int>> groups(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) groups[i].push_back(i);

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    vector<int> best_side;

    while (active_count > 1) {
        vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
        vector<char> added(n, 0);
        int prev = -1;

        for (int it = 0; it < active_count; ++it) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
                if (!alive[v] || added[v]) continue;
                if (sel == -1 || weight[v] > weight[sel]) sel = v;
            }

            if (sel == -1) {
                active_count = 1;
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;

            if (it == active_count - 1) {
                long long cut_value = weight[sel];
                if (cut_value < best) {
                    best = cut_value;
                    best_side = groups[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (const auto& kv : adj[sel]) {
                        int to = kv.first;
                        long long cap = kv.second;
                        if (!alive[to] || to == prev) continue;

                        adj[prev][to] += cap;
                        adj[to][prev] += cap;
                        adj[to].erase(sel);
                    }
                    adj[prev].erase(sel);
                    adj[sel].clear();

                    groups[prev].insert(groups[prev].end(), groups[sel].begin(), groups[sel].end());
                    groups[sel].clear();

                    alive[sel] = 0;
                    --active_count;
                }
                break;
            }

            prev = sel;
            for (const auto& kv : adj[sel]) {
                int to = kv.first;
                if (alive[to] && !added[to]) {
                    weight[to] += kv.second;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if (best_side.empty() && n > 0) {
        best_side.push_back(0);
        best = 0;
    }
    return {best, best_side};
}

static vector<EdgePair> build_cut_from_side(const vector<EdgePair>& edges, const vector<int>& side, int n) {
    vector<char> in_side(n, 0);
    for (int v : side) {
        if (v >= 0 && v < n) in_side[v] = 1;
    }

    vector<EdgePair> cut;
    cut.reserve(edges.size() / 8 + 8);
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        if (in_side[e.u] != in_side[e.v]) {
            cut.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    return cut;
}

static vector<EdgePair> cut_by_isolating_vertex_from_file(const string& path, int isolate_v) {
    vector<EdgePair> cut;
    ifstream fin(path, ios::binary);
    if (!fin) return cut;

    EdgePair e{};
    while (fin.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&e), sizeof(e))) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        if (e.u == isolate_v || e.v == isolate_v) {
            cut.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    return cut;
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n = 0;
    uint64_t m = 0;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m)) {
        return 0;
    }

    if (n <= 1) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    const uint64_t MAX_IN_MEMORY_EDGES = 20000000ULL;
    const int DENSE_N_LIMIT = 900;
    const uint64_t MAX_EXACT_EDGES = 3000000ULL;
    const int MAX_EXACT_N = 7000;

    const bool spill_to_disk = (m > MAX_IN_MEMORY_EDGES);

    vector<int> degree(n, 0);
    int min_deg_vertex = 0;

    vector<EdgePair> edges;
    edges.reserve(spill_to_disk ? 1024 : static_cast<size_t>(m));

    string temp_file = "edges_spill.bin";
    ofstream spill_out;
    if (spill_to_disk) {
        spill_out.open(temp_file, ios::binary | ios::trunc);
        if (!spill_out) {
            return 1;
        }
    }

    for (uint64_t i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u = 0, v = 0;
        cin >> u >> v;
        EdgePair e{u, v};

        if (u >= 0 && u < n && v >= 0 && v < n && u != v) {
            ++degree[u];
            ++degree[v];
        }

        if (spill_to_disk) {
            spill_out.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&e), sizeof(e));
        } else {
            edges.push_back(e);
        }
    }

    if (spill_to_disk) {
        spill_out.close();
    }

    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < degree[min_deg_vertex]) {
            min_deg_vertex = i;
        }
    }

    vector<EdgePair> answer_cut;

    const bool use_fallback = spill_to_disk || n > MAX_EXACT_N || m > MAX_EXACT_EDGES;

    if (use_fallback) {
        if (spill_to_disk) {
            answer_cut = cut_by_isolating_vertex_from_file(temp_file, min_deg_vertex);
            std::remove(temp_file.c_str());
        } else {
            answer_cut.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(degree[min_deg_vertex]));
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                if (e.u == min_deg_vertex || e.v == min_deg_vertex) {
                    answer_cut.push_back(e);
                }
            }
        }
    } else {
        vector<int> best_side;

        if (n <= DENSE_N_LIMIT) {
            auto [best_value, side] = stoer_wagner_dense(n, edges);
            (void)best_value;
            best_side = std::move(side);
        } else {
            unordered_map<uint64_t, long long> cap;
            cap.reserve(edges.size() * 2 + 1);
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                ++cap[pack_key(e.u, e.v)];
            }

            vector<WeightedEdge> wedges;
            wedges.reserve(cap.size());
            for (const auto& kv : cap) {
                int u = static_cast<int>(kv.first >> 32);
                int v = static_cast<int>(kv.first & 0xffffffffu);
                wedges.push_back({u, v, kv.second});
            }

            auto [best_value, side] = stoer_wagner_sparse(n, wedges);
            (void)best_value;
            best_side = std::move(side);
        }

        answer_cut = build_cut_from_side(edges, best_side, n);

        if (answer_cut.empty()) {
            answer_cut.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(degree[min_deg_vertex]));
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                if (e.u == min_deg_vertex || e.v == min_deg_vertex) {
                    answer_cut.push_back(e);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    cout << answer_cut.size() << '\n';
    for (const auto& e : answer_cut) {
        cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}

Subpass 4: 100000 nodes, 5000000 edges

Score: 0.00

Details: [100000 nodes, 5000000 edges] Cut size: 61, Known min: 25, Time: 4.06s - Suboptimal (2.4x optimal)

C++ Code 
#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdio>
#include <cstdint>
#include <fstream>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <numeric>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct EdgePair {
    int u;
    int v;
};

struct WeightedEdge {
    int u;
    int v;
    long long w;
};

static uint64_t pack_key(int a, int b) {
    if (a > b) {
        std::swap(a, b);
    }
    return (static_cast<uint64_t>(static_cast<uint32_t>(a)) << 32) |
           static_cast<uint32_t>(b);
}

static pair<long long, vector<int>> stoer_wagner_dense(int n, const vector<EdgePair>& edges) {
    vector<vector<long long>> w(n, vector<long long>(n, 0));
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        ++w[e.u][e.v];
        ++w[e.v][e.u];
    }

    vector<int> verts(n);
    iota(verts.begin(), verts.end(), 0);

    vector<vector<int>> groups(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        groups[i].push_back(i);
    }

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    vector<int> best_side;

    int active_count = n;
    while (active_count > 1) {
        vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
        vector<char> added(n, 0);
        int prev = -1;

        for (int it = 0; it < active_count; ++it) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                int v = verts[i];
                if (!added[v] && (sel == -1 || weight[v] > weight[sel])) {
                    sel = v;
                }
            }

            if (it == active_count - 1) {
                long long cut_value = weight[sel];
                if (cut_value < best) {
                    best = cut_value;
                    best_side = groups[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                        int v = verts[i];
                        if (v == sel || v == prev) continue;
                        w[prev][v] += w[sel][v];
                        w[v][prev] = w[prev][v];
                    }

                    groups[prev].insert(groups[prev].end(), groups[sel].begin(), groups[sel].end());
                    groups[sel].clear();

                    auto pos_it = find(verts.begin(), verts.begin() + active_count, sel);
                    iter_swap(pos_it, verts.begin() + active_count - 1);
                    --active_count;
                }
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;
            prev = sel;

            for (int i = 0; i < active_count; ++i) {
                int v = verts[i];
                if (!added[v]) {
                    weight[v] += w[sel][v];
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if (best_side.empty() && n > 0) {
        best_side.push_back(0);
        best = 0;
    }
    return {best, best_side};
}

static pair<long long, vector<int>> stoer_wagner_sparse(int n, const vector<WeightedEdge>& wedges) {
    vector<unordered_map<int, long long>> adj(n);
    adj.reserve(n);

    for (const auto& e : wedges) {
        if (e.u == e.v || e.w == 0) continue;
        adj[e.u][e.v] += e.w;
        adj[e.v][e.u] += e.w;
    }

    vector<char> alive(n, 1);
    int active_count = n;

    vector<vector<int>> groups(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) groups[i].push_back(i);

    long long best = numeric_limits<long long>::max();
    vector<int> best_side;

    while (active_count > 1) {
        vector<long long> weight(n, 0);
        vector<char> added(n, 0);
        int prev = -1;

        for (int it = 0; it < active_count; ++it) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
                if (!alive[v] || added[v]) continue;
                if (sel == -1 || weight[v] > weight[sel]) sel = v;
            }

            if (sel == -1) {
                active_count = 1;
                break;
            }

            added[sel] = 1;

            if (it == active_count - 1) {
                long long cut_value = weight[sel];
                if (cut_value < best) {
                    best = cut_value;
                    best_side = groups[sel];
                }

                if (prev != -1) {
                    for (const auto& kv : adj[sel]) {
                        int to = kv.first;
                        long long cap = kv.second;
                        if (!alive[to] || to == prev) continue;

                        adj[prev][to] += cap;
                        adj[to][prev] += cap;
                        adj[to].erase(sel);
                    }
                    adj[prev].erase(sel);
                    adj[sel].clear();

                    groups[prev].insert(groups[prev].end(), groups[sel].begin(), groups[sel].end());
                    groups[sel].clear();

                    alive[sel] = 0;
                    --active_count;
                }
                break;
            }

            prev = sel;
            for (const auto& kv : adj[sel]) {
                int to = kv.first;
                if (alive[to] && !added[to]) {
                    weight[to] += kv.second;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if (best_side.empty() && n > 0) {
        best_side.push_back(0);
        best = 0;
    }
    return {best, best_side};
}

static vector<EdgePair> build_cut_from_side(const vector<EdgePair>& edges, const vector<int>& side, int n) {
    vector<char> in_side(n, 0);
    for (int v : side) {
        if (v >= 0 && v < n) in_side[v] = 1;
    }

    vector<EdgePair> cut;
    cut.reserve(edges.size() / 8 + 8);
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        if (in_side[e.u] != in_side[e.v]) {
            cut.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    return cut;
}

static vector<EdgePair> cut_by_isolating_vertex_from_file(const string& path, int isolate_v) {
    vector<EdgePair> cut;
    ifstream fin(path, ios::binary);
    if (!fin) return cut;

    EdgePair e{};
    while (fin.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&e), sizeof(e))) {
        if (e.u == e.v) continue;
        if (e.u == isolate_v || e.v == isolate_v) {
            cut.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    return cut;
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n = 0;
    uint64_t m = 0;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m)) {
        return 0;
    }

    if (n <= 1) {
        cout << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    const uint64_t MAX_IN_MEMORY_EDGES = 20000000ULL;
    const int DENSE_N_LIMIT = 900;
    const uint64_t MAX_EXACT_EDGES = 3000000ULL;
    const int MAX_EXACT_N = 7000;

    const bool spill_to_disk = (m > MAX_IN_MEMORY_EDGES);

    vector<int> degree(n, 0);
    int min_deg_vertex = 0;

    vector<EdgePair> edges;
    edges.reserve(spill_to_disk ? 1024 : static_cast<size_t>(m));

    string temp_file = "edges_spill.bin";
    ofstream spill_out;
    if (spill_to_disk) {
        spill_out.open(temp_file, ios::binary | ios::trunc);
        if (!spill_out) {
            return 1;
        }
    }

    for (uint64_t i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u = 0, v = 0;
        cin >> u >> v;
        EdgePair e{u, v};

        if (u >= 0 && u < n && v >= 0 && v < n && u != v) {
            ++degree[u];
            ++degree[v];
        }

        if (spill_to_disk) {
            spill_out.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&e), sizeof(e));
        } else {
            edges.push_back(e);
        }
    }

    if (spill_to_disk) {
        spill_out.close();
    }

    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < degree[min_deg_vertex]) {
            min_deg_vertex = i;
        }
    }

    vector<EdgePair> answer_cut;

    const bool use_fallback = spill_to_disk || n > MAX_EXACT_N || m > MAX_EXACT_EDGES;

    if (use_fallback) {
        if (spill_to_disk) {
            answer_cut = cut_by_isolating_vertex_from_file(temp_file, min_deg_vertex);
            std::remove(temp_file.c_str());
        } else {
            answer_cut.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(degree[min_deg_vertex]));
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                if (e.u == min_deg_vertex || e.v == min_deg_vertex) {
                    answer_cut.push_back(e);
                }
            }
        }
    } else {
        vector<int> best_side;

        if (n <= DENSE_N_LIMIT) {
            auto [best_value, side] = stoer_wagner_dense(n, edges);
            (void)best_value;
            best_side = std::move(side);
        } else {
            unordered_map<uint64_t, long long> cap;
            cap.reserve(edges.size() * 2 + 1);
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                ++cap[pack_key(e.u, e.v)];
            }

            vector<WeightedEdge> wedges;
            wedges.reserve(cap.size());
            for (const auto& kv : cap) {
                int u = static_cast<int>(kv.first >> 32);
                int v = static_cast<int>(kv.first & 0xffffffffu);
                wedges.push_back({u, v, kv.second});
            }

            auto [best_value, side] = stoer_wagner_sparse(n, wedges);
            (void)best_value;
            best_side = std::move(side);
        }

        answer_cut = build_cut_from_side(edges, best_side, n);

        if (answer_cut.empty()) {
            answer_cut.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(degree[min_deg_vertex]));
            for (const auto& e : edges) {
                if (e.u == e.v) continue;
                if (e.u == min_deg_vertex || e.v == min_deg_vertex) {
                    answer_cut.push_back(e);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    cout << answer_cut.size() << '\n';
    for (const auto& e : answer_cut) {
        cout << e.u << ' ' << e.v << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}

Test 19: 3D Voxel Mining (C#) Score: 0.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a C# program to solve a mining problem in a simplified 3D voxel space.

**Constraints:**
1. Can only dig dirt that is exposed from above or a side.
2. Dug dirt must be dumped somewhere - at a location not blocking future digging
3. Maximum uphill slope - 1 Z voxel per X/Y voxel.
4. Dumped dirt becomes a new obstacle (plan carefully!)
5. Goal is to get valuable ore to a processing plant located at x=0, y=0
6. Ground is stable and solid, and you can dig under any voxel without fear of it collapsing
so long as it's connected to the earth. If you disconnect a voxel(s), it will collapse.

The voxel grid size has 10x more precision in Z than X/Y. So 10x10x100 is a cube.

**Input header format (stdin - space delimited. Ends with newline):**
```
XVoxelCount YVoxelCount ZVoxelCount XBlockSize YBlockSize ZBlockSize
```
Counts are human readable integers. BlockSize are human readable decimal numbers.

After the newline, voxels then follow in bytes, like this python psuedocode:
```
for x in range(XVoxelCount):
for y in range(YVoxelCount):
for z in range(ZVoxelCount):
d = readByte(stdin)
massInTonnes = d % 16
valuePerTonne = d // 16
addVoxel(d)
```

Each peice of dirt needs to be moved to its new location - you need to trace the
path in X and Y (4-connected / manhatten steps) and ensure that the path doesn't climb uphill
or downhill more than 1 Z voxel for every X/Y voxel.

**Output format (stdout / newline seperated):**
```
M (number of operations)
N digX digY digZ stepX1 stepY1 stepX2 stepY2 (N steps) destX destY (for each operation)
```

If dumping valuable ore at the processing plant, the voxel ceases to exist. If a voxel is
dumped elsewhere, it is dumped on top of the ground, raising the ground by 1 voxel. It can
be dug again and moved later if required.

Every unit of mass requires $1 of fuel to move one voxel in X or Y when flat, or $5 of fuel
to go up a 10% slope. Downhill is free.

Getting valuable ore to your processing plant pays $1000 per unit of mass per unit of value.
The most valuable ore (#15) pays $15,000 per ton, so the most a single dump truck load can gross
is $225,000.

(Dumping junk ore at the processing plant causes damage to the plant, costing $1000 per ton.)

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. World size could be anything from 10x10x10 to 5000x5000x5000, your code should handle both extremes.
4. Your code should complete in under 5 minutes
5. Maximize profit.

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14


Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0

Plan an open-pit mine in a 3D block model. Each block has a value (ore worth money, waste costs money to move) and you can only dig a block once the blocks above it have been removed. The goal is to maximise profit by choosing which blocks to extract and where to dump the waste.

The AI must balance revenue against haulage costs, respect slope constraints for road access, and avoid dumping waste where it blocks future digging. Subpasses increase the pit size and complexity.

3D Voxel Mining - 10×10 tiny pit (10 KB)

Results: Profit: $0, Revenue: $0 / $1,937,000 theoretical max, Operations: 0, Score: 0.000

View C# Code (19394 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Globalization;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;

public static class Program
{
    private readonly struct Point
    {
        public readonly int X;
        public readonly int Y;

        public Point(int x, int y)
        {
            X = x;
            Y = y;
        }
    }

    private readonly struct QueueItem
    {
        public readonly int Index;
        public readonly int Version;

        public QueueItem(int index, int version)
        {
            Index = index;
            Version = version;
        }
    }

    private sealed class FastInput
    {
        private readonly Stream _stream;
        private readonly byte[] _buffer;
        private int _pos;
        private int _len;

        public FastInput(Stream stream, int bufferSize = 1 << 20)
        {
            _stream = stream;
            _buffer = new byte[bufferSize];
            _pos = 0;
            _len = 0;
        }

        public int ReadByteRaw()
        {
            if (_pos >= _len)
            {
                _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
                _pos = 0;
                if (_len <= 0)
                {
                    return -1;
                }
            }

            return _buffer[_pos++];
        }

        public byte ReadByteRequired()
        {
            int b = ReadByteRaw();
            if (b < 0)
            {
                throw new EndOfStreamException("Unexpected end of input while reading voxel bytes.");
            }

            return (byte)b;
        }

        public string ReadAsciiToken()
        {
            int b;
            do
            {
                b = ReadByteRaw();
                if (b < 0)
                {
                    return string.Empty;
                }
            }
            while (b <= 32);

            var sb = new StringBuilder(32);
            while (b > 32)
            {
                sb.Append((char)b);
                b = ReadByteRaw();
                if (b < 0)
                {
                    break;
                }
            }

            return sb.ToString();
        }
    }

    public static void Main()
    {
        try
        {
            Solve();
        }
        catch
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
        }
    }

    private static void Solve()
    {
        var input = new FastInput(Console.OpenStandardInput());

        string sx = input.ReadAsciiToken();
        string sy = input.ReadAsciiToken();
        string sz = input.ReadAsciiToken();
        string sbx = input.ReadAsciiToken();
        string sby = input.ReadAsciiToken();
        string sbz = input.ReadAsciiToken();

        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(sx) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(sy) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(sz))
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            return;
        }

        int xCount = int.Parse(sx, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        int yCount = int.Parse(sy, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        int zCount = int.Parse(sz, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);

        // Parsed to consume full header format even though strategy uses voxel index space.
        _ = double.Parse(sbx, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        _ = double.Parse(sby, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        _ = double.Parse(sbz, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);

        if (xCount <= 0 || yCount <= 0 || zCount <= 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            return;
        }

        long xyLong = (long)xCount * yCount;
        long totalVoxels = xyLong * zCount;

        if (xyLong > int.MaxValue)
        {
            // Extremely large XY would not be practical with current memory model.
            ConsumeRemaining(input, totalVoxels);
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            return;
        }

        int xy = (int)xyLong;

        bool smallDetailed = totalVoxels <= 40_000_000L && xyLong <= 2_000_000L;
        bool mediumSurface = !smallDetailed && xyLong <= 8_000_000L;

        int[] topZ = new int[xy];
        byte[] topMass = new byte[xy];
        byte[] topValue = new byte[xy];

        Array.Fill(topZ, -1);

        byte[]? voxels = null;
        if (smallDetailed)
        {
            if (totalVoxels > int.MaxValue)
            {
                smallDetailed = false;
            }
            else
            {
                voxels = new byte[(int)totalVoxels];
            }
        }

        ReadWorld(input, xCount, yCount, zCount, topZ, topMass, topValue, voxels);

        var sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        var body = new StringBuilder(1 << 20);
        int opCount = 0;

        if (smallDetailed && voxels != null)
        {
            opCount = RunSmallDetailedStrategy(
                xCount,
                yCount,
                zCount,
                voxels,
                topZ,
                topMass,
                topValue,
                body,
                sw);
        }
        else
        {
            opCount = RunSurfaceStrategy(
                xCount,
                yCount,
                topZ,
                topMass,
                topValue,
                mediumSurface,
                body,
                sw);
        }

        using var writer = new StreamWriter(Console.OpenStandardOutput(), new UTF8Encoding(false), 1 << 20);
        writer.Write(opCount.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
        writer.Write('\n');
        writer.Write(body.ToString());
    }

    private static void ConsumeRemaining(FastInput input, long total)
    {
        for (long i = 0; i < total; i++)
        {
            if (input.ReadByteRaw() < 0)
            {
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    private static void ReadWorld(
        FastInput input,
        int xCount,
        int yCount,
        int zCount,
        int[] topZ,
        byte[] topMass,
        byte[] topValue,
        byte[]? voxels)
    {
        for (int x = 0; x < xCount; x++)
        {
            int xBase = x * yCount;
            for (int y = 0; y < yCount; y++)
            {
                int idx = xBase + y;
                int top = -1;
                byte tMass = 0;
                byte tValue = 0;

                long columnBase = (long)idx * zCount;
                for (int z = 0; z < zCount; z++)
                {
                    byte d = input.ReadByteRequired();

                    if (voxels != null)
                    {
                        voxels[columnBase + z] = d;
                    }

                    int mass = d & 0x0F;
                    if (mass != 0)
                    {
                        top = z;
                        tMass = (byte)mass;
                        tValue = (byte)(d >> 4);
                    }
                }

                topZ[idx] = top;
                topMass[idx] = tMass;
                topValue[idx] = tValue;
            }
        }
    }

    private static int RunSmallDetailedStrategy(
        int xCount,
        int yCount,
        int zCount,
        byte[] voxels,
        int[] topZ,
        byte[] topMass,
        byte[] topValue,
        StringBuilder body,
        Stopwatch sw)
    {
        int maxOps = Math.Min(200_000, xCount * yCount * 4);
        int[] versions = new int[xCount * yCount];
        var pq = new PriorityQueue<QueueItem, long>();
        var path = new List<Point>(256);

        for (int x = 0; x < xCount; x++)
        {
            int xBase = x * yCount;
            for (int y = 0; y < yCount; y++)
            {
                int idx = xBase + y;
                if (topZ[idx] >= 0 && topMass[idx] > 0 && topValue[idx] > 0)
                {
                    long approx = ApproxScore(x, y, topMass[idx], topValue[idx]);
                    pq.Enqueue(new QueueItem(idx, 0), -approx);
                }
            }
        }

        int ops = 0;
        while (pq.Count > 0 && ops < maxOps)
        {
            if (sw.ElapsedMilliseconds > 270_000)
            {
                break;
            }

            QueueItem item = pq.Dequeue();
            int idx = item.Index;
            if (item.Version != versions[idx])
            {
                continue;
            }

            int z = topZ[idx];
            if (z < 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            byte d = voxels[(long)idx * zCount + z];
            int mass = d & 0x0F;
            int value = d >> 4;
            if (mass <= 0 || value <= 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            int sx = idx / yCount;
            int sy = idx % yCount;

            if (!TryBestPath(sx, sy, 0, 0, topZ, yCount, z, mass, out bool xFirst, out long moveCost))
            {
                continue;
            }

            long revenue = 1000L * mass * value;
            long profit = revenue - moveCost;
            if (profit <= 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            BuildPathPoints(sx, sy, 0, 0, xFirst, path);
            AppendOperation(body, sx, sy, z, path);
            ops++;

            // Remove this top voxel.
            topZ[idx] = FindNextSolidZ(voxels, idx, z - 1, zCount);
            versions[idx]++;

            int newTop = topZ[idx];
            if (newTop >= 0)
            {
                byte nd = voxels[(long)idx * zCount + newTop];
                int nmass = nd & 0x0F;
                int nvalue = nd >> 4;
                topMass[idx] = (byte)nmass;
                topValue[idx] = (byte)nvalue;

                if (nmass > 0 && nvalue > 0)
                {
                    long approx = ApproxScore(sx, sy, (byte)nmass, (byte)nvalue);
                    pq.Enqueue(new QueueItem(idx, versions[idx]), -approx);
                }
            }
            else
            {
                topMass[idx] = 0;
                topValue[idx] = 0;
            }
        }

        return ops;
    }

    private static int RunSurfaceStrategy(
        int xCount,
        int yCount,
        int[] topZ,
        byte[] topMass,
        byte[] topValue,
        bool mediumSurface,
        StringBuilder body,
        Stopwatch sw)
    {
        int maxOps = mediumSurface ? 60_000 : 20_000;
        var candidates = new List<(int idx, long score)>(200_000);

        if (mediumSurface)
        {
            for (int x = 0; x < xCount; x++)
            {
                int xBase = x * yCount;
                for (int y = 0; y < yCount; y++)
                {
                    int idx = xBase + y;
                    if (topZ[idx] >= 0 && topMass[idx] > 0 && topValue[idx] > 0)
                    {
                        long s = ApproxScore(x, y, topMass[idx], topValue[idx]);
                        candidates.Add((idx, s));
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        else
        {
            // Large-world mode: prioritize a near-plant window and coarse global samples.
            int window = Math.Min(700, Math.Min(xCount - 1, yCount - 1));
            for (int x = 0; x <= window; x++)
            {
                int xBase = x * yCount;
                for (int y = 0; y <= window; y++)
                {
                    int idx = xBase + y;
                    if (topZ[idx] >= 0 && topMass[idx] > 0 && topValue[idx] > 0)
                    {
                        long s = ApproxScore(x, y, topMass[idx], topValue[idx]);
                        candidates.Add((idx, s));
                    }
                }
            }

            int stride = Math.Max(8, Math.Max(xCount, yCount) / 256);
            for (int x = 0; x < xCount; x += stride)
            {
                int xBase = x * yCount;
                for (int y = 0; y < yCount; y += stride)
                {
                    int idx = xBase + y;
                    if (topZ[idx] >= 0 && topMass[idx] > 0 && topValue[idx] > 0)
                    {
                        long s = ApproxScore(x, y, topMass[idx], topValue[idx]);
                        candidates.Add((idx, s));
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        candidates.Sort((a, b) => b.score.CompareTo(a.score));

        var path = new List<Point>(256);
        int ops = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < candidates.Count && ops < maxOps; i++)
        {
            if (sw.ElapsedMilliseconds > 270_000)
            {
                break;
            }

            int idx = candidates[i].idx;
            int z = topZ[idx];
            if (z < 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            int mass = topMass[idx];
            int value = topValue[idx];
            if (mass <= 0 || value <= 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            int sx = idx / yCount;
            int sy = idx % yCount;

            if (!TryBestPath(sx, sy, 0, 0, topZ, yCount, z, mass, out bool xFirst, out long moveCost))
            {
                continue;
            }

            long revenue = 1000L * mass * value;
            long profit = revenue - moveCost;
            if (profit <= 0)
            {
                continue;
            }

            BuildPathPoints(sx, sy, 0, 0, xFirst, path);
            AppendOperation(body, sx, sy, z, path);
            ops++;

            // We only know top layer in this mode. Lower it by one and avoid revisiting.
            topZ[idx] = z - 1;
            topMass[idx] = 0;
            topValue[idx] = 0;
        }

        return ops;
    }

    private static long ApproxScore(int x, int y, byte mass, byte value)
    {
        long revenue = 1000L * mass * value;
        long distancePenalty = mass * (long)(x + y);
        return revenue - distancePenalty;
    }

    private static int FindNextSolidZ(byte[] voxels, int idx, int z, int zCount)
    {
        long basePos = (long)idx * zCount;
        for (int k = z; k >= 0; k--)
        {
            if ((voxels[basePos + k] & 0x0F) != 0)
            {
                return k;
            }
        }

        return -1;
    }

    private static bool TryBestPath(
        int sx,
        int sy,
        int dx,
        int dy,
        int[] heights,
        int yCount,
        int startZ,
        int mass,
        out bool xFirst,
        out long bestCost)
    {
        bool okX = TryEvaluatePath(sx, sy, dx, dy, true, heights, yCount, startZ, mass, out long costX);
        bool okY = TryEvaluatePath(sx, sy, dx, dy, false, heights, yCount, startZ, mass, out long costY);

        if (!okX && !okY)
        {
            xFirst = true;
            bestCost = long.MaxValue;
            return false;
        }

        if (okX && (!okY || costX <= costY))
        {
            xFirst = true;
            bestCost = costX;
            return true;
        }

        xFirst = false;
        bestCost = costY;
        return true;
    }

    private static bool TryEvaluatePath(
        int sx,
        int sy,
        int dx,
        int dy,
        bool xFirst,
        int[] heights,
        int yCount,
        int startZ,
        int mass,
        out long cost)
    {
        int cx = sx;
        int cy = sy;
        int currentH = startZ;
        cost = 0L;

        if (xFirst)
        {
            while (cx != dx)
            {
                cx += dx > cx ? 1 : -1;
                int nh = heights[cx * yCount + cy];
                if (Math.Abs(nh - currentH) > 1)
                {
                    return false;
                }

                if (nh > currentH)
                {
                    cost += 5L * mass;
                }
                else if (nh == currentH)
                {
                    cost += 1L * mass;
                }

                currentH = nh;
            }

            while (cy != dy)
            {
                cy += dy > cy ? 1 : -1;
                int nh = heights[cx * yCount + cy];
                if (Math.Abs(nh - currentH) > 1)
                {
                    return false;
                }

                if (nh > currentH)
                {
                    cost += 5L * mass;
                }
                else if (nh == currentH)
                {
                    cost += 1L * mass;
                }

                currentH = nh;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            while (cy != dy)
            {
                cy += dy > cy ? 1 : -1;
                int nh = heights[cx * yCount + cy];
                if (Math.Abs(nh - currentH) > 1)
                {
                    return false;
                }

                if (nh > currentH)
                {
                    cost += 5L * mass;
                }
                else if (nh == currentH)
                {
                    cost += 1L * mass;
                }

                currentH = nh;
            }

            while (cx != dx)
            {
                cx += dx > cx ? 1 : -1;
                int nh = heights[cx * yCount + cy];
                if (Math.Abs(nh - currentH) > 1)
                {
                    return false;
                }

                if (nh > currentH)
                {
                    cost += 5L * mass;
                }
                else if (nh == currentH)
                {
                    cost += 1L * mass;
                }

                currentH = nh;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    private static void BuildPathPoints(int sx, int sy, int dx, int dy, bool xFirst, List<Point> path)
    {
        path.Clear();

        int cx = sx;
        int cy = sy;

        if (xFirst)
        {
            while (cx != dx)
            {
                cx += dx > cx ? 1 : -1;
                path.Add(new Point(cx, cy));
            }

            while (cy != dy)
            {
                cy += dy > cy ? 1 : -1;
                path.Add(new Point(cx, cy));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            while (cy != dy)
            {
                cy += dy > cy ? 1 : -1;
                path.Add(new Point(cx, cy));
            }

            while (cx != dx)
            {
                cx += dx > cx ? 1 : -1;
                path.Add(new Point(cx, cy));
            }
        }
    }

    private static void AppendOperation(StringBuilder body, int digX, int digY, int digZ, List<Point> path)
    {
        int n = path.Count > 0 ? path.Count - 1 : 0;
        int destX = path.Count > 0 ? path[path.Count - 1].X : 0;
        int destY = path.Count > 0 ? path[path.Count - 1].Y : 0;

        body.Append(n.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
        body.Append(' ');
        body.Append(digX.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
        body.Append(' ');
        body.Append(digY.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
        body.Append(' ');
        body.Append(digZ.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));

        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            body.Append(' ');
            body.Append(path[i].X.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
            body.Append(' ');
            body.Append(path[i].Y.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
        }

        body.Append(' ');
        body.Append(destX.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
        body.Append(' ');
        body.Append(destY.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
        body.Append('\n');
    }
}

Test 20: Drillhole Data Validation (Rust) Score: 12.11 / 14
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a Rust program to validate drillhole assay data.


**The Challenge:**
Your Rust program will be tested with drillhole datasets ranging from small exploration projects to
massive mining surveys. The same program must work efficiently across ALL scales from 10 holes to
200,000 holes.

**Problem:**
Given drillhole data from a mining exploration project, identify samples that likely contain typos or
measurement errors. These outliers don't correlate well with spatially neighboring data points.

**Target environment specs**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler information**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

**Drillhole Data:**
- Each hole has a 3D path: start point (x,y,z) + direction vector + length
- Samples are taken at intervals along each hole
- Each sample has measurements for multiple properties

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_holes num_properties
property_name_1 property_name_2 ...
hole_id start_x start_y start_z dir_x dir_y dir_z length num_samples
depth prop1 prop2 ...
depth prop1 prop2 ...
etc.
hole_id start_x start_y start_z dir_x dir_y dir_z length num_samples
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
M (number of suspect entries found)
hole_id sample_idx property_name confidence (for each suspect, sorted by confidence desc)
```

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with rustc and only the standard rust library.
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle up to thousands of holes with thousands of samples each
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Report at least the most obvious outliers
6. Confidence score should reflect how anomalous the value is
7. Must handle varying dataset sizes efficiently

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on dataset scale.

The program should be robust enough to handle edge cases like missing data, duplicate entries, and varying data distributions.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Given a set of mining drillholes — each a 3D path with measurements taken at intervals along its length — identify the data entries that are most likely to be errors (typos, instrument glitches, or transcription mistakes).

The AI must compare each measurement against its spatial neighbours: a reading that disagrees with nearby drillholes is suspect. Subpasses increase the number of drillholes and properties, requiring efficient spatial reasoning at scale.

 0.9590
[5 holes, 3 properties, 50 samples] Found: 5, Actual errors: 8, TP: 5, FP: 0, FN: 3, P: 1.00, R: 0.62, F1: 0.77, Time: 0.04s

Subpass 0: 5 holes, 3 properties, 50 samples

Score: 0.96

Details: [5 holes, 3 properties, 50 samples] Found: 5, Actual errors: 8, TP: 5, FP: 0, FN: 3, P: 1.00, R: 0.62, F1: 0.77, Time: 0.04s

Reasoning 
No reasoning provided
Rust Code 
use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::io::{self, Read};

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Default)]
struct RobustStats {
    median: f64,
    mad: f64,
    mean: f64,
    std: f64,
    scale: f64,
    count: usize,
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Suspect {
    sample: usize,
    prop: usize,
    score: f64,
    confidence: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug)]
struct ParsedData {
    num_props: usize,
    prop_names: Vec<String>,
    hole_ids: Vec<String>,
    sample_hole: Vec<usize>,
    sample_idx: Vec<usize>,
    coords: Vec<[f32; 3]>,
    values: Vec<Vec<f32>>, // property-major: values[prop][sample]
}

#[derive(Debug)]
struct GridIndex {
    min: [f32; 3],
    cell: f32,
    sample_cell: Vec<(i32, i32, i32)>,
    buckets: HashMap<(i32, i32, i32), Vec<usize>>,
}

#[derive(Debug)]
struct VoxelModel {
    sample_cell: Vec<(i32, i32, i32)>,
    sample_voxel: Vec<usize>,
    map: HashMap<(i32, i32, i32), usize>,
    counts: Vec<u32>,
    sums: Vec<f64>,
    sums_sq: Vec<f64>,
    props: usize,
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = String::new();
    if io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input).is_err() {
        println!("0");
        return;
    }

    let data = parse_input(&input);
    let n_samples = data.coords.len();
    if n_samples == 0 || data.num_props == 0 {
        println!("0");
        return;
    }

    let max_sample_for_global = if n_samples <= 300_000 { n_samples } else { 300_000 };
    let global_stats = compute_global_stats(&data.values, max_sample_for_global);

    let mut suspects = if n_samples <= 80_000 {
        detect_with_knn(&data, &global_stats)
    } else {
        detect_with_voxels(&data, &global_stats)
    };

    suspects.sort_by(|a, b| {
        b.confidence
            .total_cmp(&a.confidence)
            .then_with(|| b.score.total_cmp(&a.score))
            .then_with(|| a.sample.cmp(&b.sample))
            .then_with(|| a.prop.cmp(&b.prop))
    });

    let mut out = String::new();
    out.push_str(&format!("{}\n", suspects.len()));
    for s in suspects {
        let hole_idx = data.sample_hole[s.sample];
        let hole_id = &data.hole_ids[hole_idx];
        let sample_idx = data.sample_idx[s.sample];
        let prop_name = &data.prop_names[s.prop];
        out.push_str(&format!(
            "{} {} {} {:.6}\n",
            hole_id, sample_idx, prop_name, s.confidence
        ));
    }
    print!("{out}");
}

fn detect_with_knn(data: &ParsedData, global_stats: &[RobustStats]) -> Vec<Suspect> {
    let n = data.coords.len();
    let pcount = data.num_props;
    let mut suspects = Vec::new();

    let grid = GridIndex::build(&data.coords, 8.0);
    let k_target = if n <= 5_000 { 24 } else { 32 };
    let max_radius = if n <= 20_000 { 4 } else { 3 };
    let min_local = 8usize;
    let score_threshold = 3.2;
    let max_keep = if n <= 120_000 { 40_000 } else { 60_000 };

    let mut local_vals = Vec::<f32>::with_capacity(k_target);
    let mut deviations = Vec::<f32>::with_capacity(k_target);

    for i in 0..n {
        let neighbors = grid.neighbors(&data.coords, i, k_target, max_radius);
        for p in 0..pcount {
            let x_f = data.values[p][i];
            if !x_f.is_finite() {
                continue;
            }
            let x = x_f as f64;

            local_vals.clear();
            for &j in &neighbors {
                let v = data.values[p][j];
                if v.is_finite() {
                    local_vals.push(v);
                }
            }

            let (local_z, support) = if local_vals.len() >= min_local {
                local_vals.sort_by(|a, b| a.total_cmp(b));
                let med = median_sorted_f32(&local_vals);

                deviations.clear();
                for &v in &local_vals {
                    deviations.push((v as f64 - med).abs() as f32);
                }
                deviations.sort_by(|a, b| a.total_cmp(b));
                let mad = median_sorted_f32(&deviations);

                let denom = (1.4826 * mad).max(global_stats[p].scale * 0.15).max(1e-6);
                let z = ((x - med).abs() / denom).min(1_000.0);
                let support = (local_vals.len() as f64 / k_target as f64).min(1.0);
                (z, support)
            } else {
                (0.0, 0.0)
            };

            let global_z = robust_global_z(x, &global_stats[p]);
            let mut score = if support > 0.0 {
                0.72 * local_z + 0.28 * global_z
            } else {
                0.88 * global_z
            };
            score *= 0.65 + 0.35 * support;

            if score >= score_threshold {
                let confidence = confidence_from_score(score, support);
                suspects.push(Suspect {
                    sample: i,
                    prop: p,
                    score,
                    confidence,
                });
            }
        }

        if suspects.len() > max_keep * 4 {
            suspects.sort_by(|a, b| b.confidence.total_cmp(&a.confidence));
            suspects.truncate(max_keep * 2);
        }
    }

    suspects.sort_by(|a, b| b.confidence.total_cmp(&a.confidence));
    suspects.truncate(max_keep.min(suspects.len()));
    suspects
}

fn detect_with_voxels(data: &ParsedData, global_stats: &[RobustStats]) -> Vec<Suspect> {
    let n = data.coords.len();
    let pcount = data.num_props;
    let mut suspects = Vec::new();

    let target_samples_per_voxel = if n > 1_500_000 {
        36.0
    } else if n > 600_000 {
        28.0
    } else {
        20.0
    };
    let model = VoxelModel::build(data, target_samples_per_voxel);

    let radius = if n > 1_000_000 { 1 } else { 2 };
    let min_local = if n > 1_000_000 { 8u32 } else { 10u32 };
    let score_threshold = if n > 1_000_000 { 3.5 } else { 3.3 };
    let max_keep = if n > 1_000_000 { 80_000 } else { 60_000 };

    let mut n_acc = vec![0u32; pcount];
    let mut s_acc = vec![0.0f64; pcount];
    let mut q_acc = vec![0.0f64; pcount];

    for i in 0..n {
        n_acc.fill(0);
        s_acc.fill(0.0);
        q_acc.fill(0.0);

        let (cx, cy, cz) = model.sample_cell[i];
        for dx in -radius..=radius {
            for dy in -radius..=radius {
                for dz in -radius..=radius {
                    let key = (cx + dx, cy + dy, cz + dz);
                    if let Some(&vidx) = model.map.get(&key) {
                        let base = vidx * pcount;
                        for p in 0..pcount {
                            let c = model.counts[base + p];
                            if c > 0 {
                                n_acc[p] = n_acc[p].saturating_add(c);
                                s_acc[p] += model.sums[base + p];
                                q_acc[p] += model.sums_sq[base + p];
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        let self_voxel = model.sample_voxel[i];
        let self_base = self_voxel * pcount;

        for p in 0..pcount {
            let x_f = data.values[p][i];
            if !x_f.is_finite() {
                continue;
            }
            let x = x_f as f64;

            let mut n_local = n_acc[p];
            let mut s_local = s_acc[p];
            let mut q_local = q_acc[p];

            if n_local > 0 {
                let self_count = model.counts[self_base + p];
                if self_count > 0 {
                    n_local = n_local.saturating_sub(1);
                    s_local -= x;
                    q_local -= x * x;
                }
            }

            let support = if n_local >= min_local {
                (n_local as f64 / (min_local as f64 * 3.0)).min(1.0)
            } else {
                0.0
            };

            let local_z = if n_local >= min_local {
                let mean = s_local / n_local as f64;
                let var = (q_local / n_local as f64 - mean * mean).max(0.0);
                let denom = var.sqrt().max(global_stats[p].scale * 0.2).max(1e-6);
                ((x - mean).abs() / denom).min(1_000.0)
            } else {
                0.0
            };

            let global_z = robust_global_z(x, &global_stats[p]);
            let mut score = if support > 0.0 {
                0.76 * local_z + 0.24 * global_z
            } else {
                0.90 * global_z
            };
            score *= 0.60 + 0.40 * support;

            if score >= score_threshold {
                let confidence = confidence_from_score(score, support);
                suspects.push(Suspect {
                    sample: i,
                    prop: p,
                    score,
                    confidence,
                });
            }
        }

        if suspects.len() > max_keep * 4 {
            suspects.sort_by(|a, b| b.confidence.total_cmp(&a.confidence));
            suspects.truncate(max_keep * 2);
        }
    }

    suspects.sort_by(|a, b| b.confidence.total_cmp(&a.confidence));
    suspects.truncate(max_keep.min(suspects.len()));
    suspects
}

impl GridIndex {
    fn build(coords: &[[f32; 3]], target_points_per_cell: f32) -> Self {
        let (min, max) = bounding_box(coords);
        let ex = (max[0] - min[0]).abs().max(1e-3);
        let ey = (max[1] - min[1]).abs().max(1e-3);
        let ez = (max[2] - min[2]).abs().max(1e-3);
        let n = coords.len() as f32;
        let volume = ex * ey * ez;

        let mut cell = ((volume * target_points_per_cell) / n.max(1.0)).cbrt();
        if !cell.is_finite() || cell <= 1e-6 {
            let emax = ex.max(ey).max(ez).max(1.0);
            let denom = (n / target_points_per_cell.max(1.0)).cbrt().max(1.0);
            cell = emax / denom;
        }
        if !cell.is_finite() || cell <= 1e-6 {
            cell = 1.0;
        }

        let mut sample_cell = Vec::with_capacity(coords.len());
        let mut buckets: HashMap<(i32, i32, i32), Vec<usize>> = HashMap::new();
        for (i, &p) in coords.iter().enumerate() {
            let key = cell_key(p, min, cell);
            sample_cell.push(key);
            buckets.entry(key).or_default().push(i);
        }

        Self {
            min,
            cell,
            sample_cell,
            buckets,
        }
    }

    fn neighbors(
        &self,
        coords: &[[f32; 3]],
        idx: usize,
        k_target: usize,
        max_radius: i32,
    ) -> Vec<usize> {
        let (cx, cy, cz) = self.sample_cell[idx];
        let mut candidates = Vec::<usize>::with_capacity(k_target * 8);

        for r in 0..=max_radius {
            for dx in -r..=r {
                for dy in -r..=r {
                    for dz in -r..=r {
                        if r > 0 && max3(dx.abs(), dy.abs(), dz.abs()) != r {
                            continue;
                        }
                        let key = (cx + dx, cy + dy, cz + dz);
                        if let Some(v) = self.buckets.get(&key) {
                            candidates.extend(v.iter().copied());
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            if candidates.len() > k_target * 6 {
                break;
            }
        }

        if candidates.is_empty() {
            return Vec::new();
        }

        let p = coords[idx];
        let mut dist_idx = Vec::<(f32, usize)>::with_capacity(candidates.len());
        for j in candidates {
            if j == idx {
                continue;
            }
            let q = coords[j];
            let dx = p[0] - q[0];
            let dy = p[1] - q[1];
            let dz = p[2] - q[2];
            let d2 = dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz;
            dist_idx.push((d2, j));
        }

        dist_idx.sort_by(|a, b| a.0.total_cmp(&b.0));
        if dist_idx.len() > k_target {
            dist_idx.truncate(k_target);
        }
        dist_idx.into_iter().map(|(_, j)| j).collect()
    }
}

impl VoxelModel {
    fn build(data: &ParsedData, target_samples_per_voxel: f32) -> Self {
        let coords = &data.coords;
        let pcount = data.num_props;
        let n = coords.len().max(1) as f32;

        let (min, max) = bounding_box(coords);
        let ex = (max[0] - min[0]).abs().max(1e-3);
        let ey = (max[1] - min[1]).abs().max(1e-3);
        let ez = (max[2] - min[2]).abs().max(1e-3);
        let volume = ex * ey * ez;

        let target_voxels = (n / target_samples_per_voxel.max(1.0)).max(1.0);
        let mut cell = (volume / target_voxels).cbrt();
        if !cell.is_finite() || cell <= 1e-6 {
            let emax = ex.max(ey).max(ez).max(1.0);
            let denom = target_voxels.cbrt().max(1.0);
            cell = emax / denom;
        }
        if !cell.is_finite() || cell <= 1e-6 {
            cell = 1.0;
        }

        let mut sample_cell = Vec::with_capacity(coords.len());
        let mut sample_voxel = Vec::with_capacity(coords.len());
        let mut map: HashMap<(i32, i32, i32), usize> = HashMap::new();
        let mut counts = Vec::<u32>::new();
        let mut sums = Vec::<f64>::new();
        let mut sums_sq = Vec::<f64>::new();

        for (i, &pt) in coords.iter().enumerate() {
            let key = cell_key(pt, min, cell);
            let vidx = if let Some(&v) = map.get(&key) {
                v
            } else {
                let v = map.len();
                map.insert(key, v);
                counts.extend(std::iter::repeat_n(0u32, pcount));
                sums.extend(std::iter::repeat_n(0.0f64, pcount));
                sums_sq.extend(std::iter::repeat_n(0.0f64, pcount));
                v
            };

            sample_cell.push(key);
            sample_voxel.push(vidx);

            let base = vidx * pcount;
            for p in 0..pcount {
                let x = data.values[p][i];
                if x.is_finite() {
                    let xv = x as f64;
                    counts[base + p] = counts[base + p].saturating_add(1);
                    sums[base + p] += xv;
                    sums_sq[base + p] += xv * xv;
                }
            }
        }

        Self {
            sample_cell,
            sample_voxel,
            map,
            counts,
            sums,
            sums_sq,
            props: pcount,
        }
    }
}

fn parse_input(input: &str) -> ParsedData {
    let mut lines = input.lines();

    let header = next_nonempty_line(&mut lines).unwrap_or_default();
    let header_tokens: Vec<&str> = header.split_whitespace().collect();
    let num_holes = parse_usize(header_tokens.first().copied()).unwrap_or(0);
    let num_props = parse_usize(header_tokens.get(1).copied()).unwrap_or(0);

    let mut prop_names = if num_props > 0 {
        let props_line = next_nonempty_line(&mut lines).unwrap_or_default();
        let mut names: Vec<String> = props_line
            .split_whitespace()
            .take(num_props)
            .map(|s| s.to_string())
            .collect();
        if names.len() < num_props {
            for i in names.len()..num_props {
                names.push(format!("prop{}", i + 1));
            }
        }
        names
    } else {
        Vec::new()
    };

    if prop_names.len() > num_props {
        prop_names.truncate(num_props);
    }

    let mut hole_ids = Vec::<String>::new();
    let mut sample_hole = Vec::<usize>::new();
    let mut sample_idx = Vec::<usize>::new();
    let mut coords = Vec::<[f32; 3]>::new();
    let mut values = vec![Vec::<f32>::new(); num_props];

    for _ in 0..num_holes {
        let Some(hole_line) = next_nonempty_line(&mut lines) else {
            break;
        };
        let tokens: Vec<&str> = hole_line.split_whitespace().collect();
        if tokens.len() < 9 {
            continue;
        }

        let hole_id = tokens[0].to_string();
        let sx = parse_f64(tokens.get(1).copied()).unwrap_or(0.0) as f32;
        let sy = parse_f64(tokens.get(2).copied()).unwrap_or(0.0) as f32;
        let sz = parse_f64(tokens.get(3).copied()).unwrap_or(0.0) as f32;
        let dx = parse_f64(tokens.get(4).copied()).unwrap_or(0.0);
        let dy = parse_f64(tokens.get(5).copied()).unwrap_or(0.0);
        let dz = parse_f64(tokens.get(6).copied()).unwrap_or(1.0);
        let length = parse_f64(tokens.get(7).copied()).unwrap_or(0.0);
        let num_samples = parse_usize(tokens.get(8).copied()).unwrap_or(0);
        let dir = normalize_dir(dx, dy, dz);

        let hole_index = hole_ids.len();
        hole_ids.push(hole_id);

        for s_idx in 0..num_samples {
            let Some(sample_line) = next_nonempty_line(&mut lines) else {
                break;
            };
            let stoks: Vec<&str> = sample_line.split_whitespace().collect();
            if stoks.is_empty() {
                continue;
            }

            let raw_depth = parse_f64(stoks.first().copied()).unwrap_or(f64::NAN);
            let depth = canonical_depth(raw_depth, length) as f32;
            let px = sx + dir.0 * depth;
            let py = sy + dir.1 * depth;
            let pz = sz + dir.2 * depth;

            sample_hole.push(hole_index);
            sample_idx.push(s_idx);
            coords.push([px, py, pz]);

            for p in 0..num_props {
                let v = parse_f64(stoks.get(p + 1).copied()).unwrap_or(f64::NAN);
                values[p].push(v as f32);
            }
        }
    }

    ParsedData {
        num_props,
        prop_names,
        hole_ids,
        sample_hole,
        sample_idx,
        coords,
        values,
    }
}

fn compute_global_stats(values: &[Vec<f32>], max_sample: usize) -> Vec<RobustStats> {
    values
        .iter()
        .map(|v| robust_stats(v, max_sample))
        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
}

fn robust_stats(values: &[f32], max_sample: usize) -> RobustStats {
    let mut count = 0usize;
    let mut mean = 0.0f64;
    let mut m2 = 0.0f64;

    for &v in values {
        if !v.is_finite() {
            continue;
        }
        let x = v as f64;
        count += 1;
        let delta = x - mean;
        mean += delta / count as f64;
        let delta2 = x - mean;
        m2 += delta * delta2;
    }

    if count == 0 {
        return RobustStats::default();
    }

    let std = if count > 1 {
        (m2 / (count as f64 - 1.0)).sqrt()
    } else {
        0.0
    };

    let mut sample = Vec::<f32>::new();
    if count <= max_sample.max(1) {
        sample.reserve(count);
        for &v in values {
            if v.is_finite() {
                sample.push(v);
            }
        }
    } else {
        let len = values.len().max(1);
        let step = (len / max_sample.max(1)).max(1);
        let mut i = 0usize;
        while i < len {
            let v = values[i];
            if v.is_finite() {
                sample.push(v);
            }
            i += step;
        }
        if sample.is_empty() {
            for &v in values {
                if v.is_finite() {
                    sample.push(v);
                    if sample.len() >= max_sample {
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if sample.is_empty() {
        let scale = (std * 0.5).max((mean.abs() + 1.0) * 1e-6).max(1e-6);
        return RobustStats {
            median: mean,
            mad: 0.0,
            mean,
            std,
            scale,
            count,
        };
    }

    sample.sort_by(|a, b| a.total_cmp(b));
    let median = median_sorted_f32(&sample);

    let mut deviations = Vec::<f32>::with_capacity(sample.len());
    for &x in &sample {
        deviations.push((x as f64 - median).abs() as f32);
    }
    deviations.sort_by(|a, b| a.total_cmp(b));
    let mad = median_sorted_f32(&deviations);

    let scale = (1.4826 * mad)
        .max(std * 0.5)
        .max((median.abs() + 1.0) * 1e-6)
        .max(1e-6);

    RobustStats {
        median,
        mad,
        mean,
        std,
        scale,
        count,
    }
}

fn robust_global_z(x: f64, stats: &RobustStats) -> f64 {
    if !x.is_finite() || stats.count == 0 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    ((x - stats.median).abs() / stats.scale.max(1e-6)).min(1_000.0)
}

fn confidence_from_score(score: f64, support: f64) -> f64 {
    let base = 1.0 - (-score / 4.2).exp();
    (base * (0.85 + 0.15 * support)).clamp(0.0, 0.999_999)
}

fn median_sorted_f32(sorted: &[f32]) -> f64 {
    if sorted.is_empty() {
        return 0.0;
    }
    let n = sorted.len();
    if n % 2 == 1 {
        sorted[n / 2] as f64
    } else {
        (sorted[n / 2 - 1] as f64 + sorted[n / 2] as f64) * 0.5
    }
}

fn normalize_dir(dx: f64, dy: f64, dz: f64) -> (f32, f32, f32) {
    let n2 = dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz;
    if !n2.is_finite() || n2 <= 1e-20 {
        return (0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
    }
    let inv = 1.0 / n2.sqrt();
    ((dx * inv) as f32, (dy * inv) as f32, (dz * inv) as f32)
}

fn canonical_depth(raw_depth: f64, hole_length: f64) -> f64 {
    if !raw_depth.is_finite() {
        return 0.0;
    }
    if hole_length.is_finite() && hole_length > 0.0 {
        raw_depth.clamp(0.0, hole_length)
    } else {
        raw_depth.max(0.0)
    }
}

fn bounding_box(coords: &[[f32; 3]]) -> ([f32; 3], [f32; 3]) {
    if coords.is_empty() {
        return ([0.0, 0.0, 0.0], [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]);
    }
    let mut min = coords[0];
    let mut max = coords[0];
    for &p in coords {
        min[0] = min[0].min(p[0]);
        min[1] = min[1].min(p[1]);
        min[2] = min[2].min(p[2]);
        max[0] = max[0].max(p[0]);
        max[1] = max[1].max(p[1]);
        max[2] = max[2].max(p[2]);
    }
    (min, max)
}

fn cell_key(p: [f32; 3], min: [f32; 3], cell: f32) -> (i32, i32, i32) {
    let inv = 1.0f32 / cell.max(1e-6);
    let ix = ((p[0] - min[0]) * inv).floor() as i32;
    let iy = ((p[1] - min[1]) * inv).floor() as i32;
    let iz = ((p[2] - min[2]) * inv).floor() as i32;
    (ix, iy, iz)
}

fn max3(a: i32, b: i32, c: i32) -> i32 {
    a.max(b).max(c)
}

fn parse_usize(tok: Option<&str>) -> Option<usize> {
    tok.and_then(|t| t.parse::<usize>().ok())
}

fn parse_f64(tok: Option<&str>) -> Option<f64> {
    tok.and_then(|t| t.parse::<f64>().ok())
}

fn next_nonempty_line<'a, I: Iterator<Item = &'a str>>(lines: &mut I) -> Option<&'a str> {
    for line in lines {
        if !line.trim().is_empty() {
            return Some(line);
        }
    }
    None
}
