#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>
#include <deque>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <queue>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using Point = std::vector<int>;

struct PointHash {
    std::size_t operator()(const Point& p) const noexcept {
        std::size_t h = 1469598103934665603ull;
        for (int x : p) {
            std::size_t v = static_cast<std::size_t>(static_cast<std::uint64_t>(x) ^ 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15ull);
            h ^= v + 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15ull + (h << 6) + (h >> 2);
        }
        return h;
    }
};

using PointSet = std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash>;
using PointCountMap = std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash>;

static inline bool samePoint(const Point& a, const Point& b) {
    return a == b;
}

static inline bool inBounds(const Point& p, const std::vector<int>& bounds) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < p.size(); ++i) {
        if (p[i] < 0 || p[i] >= bounds[i]) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

static inline int manhattan(const Point& a, const Point& b) {
    long long sum = 0;
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < a.size(); ++i) {
        sum += std::llabs(static_cast<long long>(a[i]) - static_cast<long long>(b[i]));
    }
    if (sum > std::numeric_limits<int>::max()) return std::numeric_limits<int>::max();
    return static_cast<int>(sum);
}

struct AStarNode {
    int f;
    int g;
    Point p;
};

struct AStarCmp {
    bool operator()(const AStarNode& a, const AStarNode& b) const {
        if (a.f != b.f) return a.f > b.f;
        return a.g < b.g;
    }
};

static std::vector<Point> reconstructPath(
    const Point& start,
    const Point& goal,
    const std::unordered_map<Point, Point, PointHash>& parent
) {
    std::vector<Point> path;
    Point cur = goal;
    path.push_back(cur);
    while (!samePoint(cur, start)) {
        auto it = parent.find(cur);
        if (it == parent.end()) {
            return {};
        }
        cur = it->second;
        path.push_back(cur);
    }
    std::reverse(path.begin(), path.end());
    return path;
}

static std::vector<Point> boundedAStar(
    const Point& start,
    const Point& goal,
    const std::vector<int>& bounds,
    const PointSet& obstacles,
    const PointCountMap& occ,
    const Point& tail,
    int nodeLimit
) {
    if (samePoint(start, goal)) return {start};

    std::priority_queue<AStarNode, std::vector<AStarNode>, AStarCmp> pq;
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> gScore;
    std::unordered_map<Point, Point, PointHash> parent;
    gScore.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(nodeLimit) * 2ull + 64ull);
    parent.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(nodeLimit) * 2ull + 64ull);

    gScore[start] = 0;
    pq.push(AStarNode{manhattan(start, goal), 0, start});

    int expanded = 0;
    const int D = static_cast<int>(start.size());

    while (!pq.empty() && expanded < nodeLimit) {
        AStarNode cur = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        auto git = gScore.find(cur.p);
        if (git == gScore.end() || git->second != cur.g) continue;
        if (samePoint(cur.p, goal)) {
            return reconstructPath(start, goal, parent);
        }

        ++expanded;

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point np = cur.p;
                np[axis] += dir;
                if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
                if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;

                auto oit = occ.find(np);
                if (oit != occ.end() && !samePoint(np, tail) && !samePoint(np, goal)) {
                    continue;
                }

                int ng = cur.g + 1;
                auto ngit = gScore.find(np);
                if (ngit == gScore.end() || ng < ngit->second) {
                    gScore[np] = ng;
                    parent[np] = cur.p;
                    int h = manhattan(np, goal);
                    int f = (h >= std::numeric_limits<int>::max() - ng) ? std::numeric_limits<int>::max() : (ng + h);
                    pq.push(AStarNode{f, ng, std::move(np)});
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return {};
}

static std::vector<Point> topKNearestFoods(const Point& head, const PointSet& foods, int k) {
    std::vector<std::pair<int, Point>> best;
    best.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(k));

    for (const Point& f : foods) {
        int d = manhattan(head, f);
        if (static_cast<int>(best.size()) < k) {
            best.push_back({d, f});
            continue;
        }

        int worstIdx = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < k; ++i) {
            if (best[i].first > best[worstIdx].first) worstIdx = i;
        }
        if (d < best[worstIdx].first) {
            best[worstIdx] = {d, f};
        }
    }

    std::sort(best.begin(), best.end(), [](const auto& a, const auto& b) {
        return a.first < b.first;
    });

    std::vector<Point> out;
    out.reserve(best.size());
    for (auto& p : best) out.push_back(std::move(p.second));
    return out;
}

static int nearestFoodDistance(const Point& p, const PointSet& foods) {
    if (foods.empty()) return 0;
    int best = std::numeric_limits<int>::max();
    for (const Point& f : foods) {
        best = std::min(best, manhattan(p, f));
    }
    return best;
}

static bool occupiedAfterMove(
    const Point& cell,
    const Point& nextHead,
    bool grow,
    const Point& oldTail,
    const PointCountMap& occ
) {
    if (samePoint(cell, nextHead)) return true;
    auto it = occ.find(cell);
    if (it == occ.end()) return false;
    if (!grow && samePoint(cell, oldTail)) return false;
    return true;
}

static int floodFreedomAfterMove(
    const Point& nextHead,
    bool grow,
    const std::vector<int>& bounds,
    const PointSet& obstacles,
    const PointCountMap& occ,
    const Point& oldTail,
    int cap
) {
    std::queue<Point> q;
    PointSet seen;
    seen.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(cap) * 2ull + 64ull);

    q.push(nextHead);
    seen.insert(nextHead);

    const int D = static_cast<int>(nextHead.size());

    while (!q.empty() && static_cast<int>(seen.size()) < cap) {
        Point cur = q.front();
        q.pop();

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point np = cur;
                np[axis] += dir;
                if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
                if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;
                if (occupiedAfterMove(np, nextHead, grow, oldTail, occ)) continue;
                if (seen.insert(np).second) {
                    q.push(std::move(np));
                    if (static_cast<int>(seen.size()) >= cap) break;
                }
            }
            if (static_cast<int>(seen.size()) >= cap) break;
        }
    }

    return static_cast<int>(seen.size());
}

static int openNeighborsAfterMove(
    const Point& nextHead,
    bool grow,
    const std::vector<int>& bounds,
    const PointSet& obstacles,
    const PointCountMap& occ,
    const Point& oldTail
) {
    int count = 0;
    const int D = static_cast<int>(nextHead.size());

    for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
        for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
            Point np = nextHead;
            np[axis] += dir;
            if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
            if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;
            if (occupiedAfterMove(np, nextHead, grow, oldTail, occ)) continue;
            ++count;
        }
    }

    return count;
}

struct MoveOption {
    int axis;
    int dir;
    Point next;
    int score;
};

int main() {
    std::ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);

    int D = 0;
    int maxTurns = 0;
    if (!(std::cin >> D >> maxTurns)) {
        return 0;
    }

    std::vector<int> bounds(D);
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) std::cin >> bounds[i];

    int snakeLengthInput = 1;
    Point start(D);
    std::cin >> snakeLengthInput;
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) std::cin >> start[i];

    int F = 0;
    std::cin >> F;
    PointSet foods;
    foods.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(F) * 2ull + 64ull);
    for (int i = 0; i < F; ++i) {
        Point p(D);
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) std::cin >> p[j];
        foods.insert(std::move(p));
    }

    int O = 0;
    std::cin >> O;
    PointSet obstacles;
    obstacles.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(O) * 2ull + 64ull);
    for (int i = 0; i < O; ++i) {
        Point p(D);
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) std::cin >> p[j];
        obstacles.insert(std::move(p));
    }

    // Build a deterministic initial body from head + length when only head is provided.
    // If a full initial body is not available in input, this gives us a valid internal state.
    std::deque<Point> snake;
    PointCountMap occ;
    occ.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(std::max(16, snakeLengthInput * 2 + 16)));

    snake.push_back(start);
    occ[start] = 1;

    for (int seg = 1; seg < snakeLengthInput; ++seg) {
        const Point& tail = snake.back();
        bool placed = false;

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D && !placed; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point np = tail;
                np[axis] += dir;
                if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
                if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;
                if (occ.find(np) != occ.end()) continue;

                snake.push_back(np);
                occ[np] = 1;
                placed = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (!placed) break;
    }

    // Any food currently occupied by body is considered unavailable.
    for (const Point& part : snake) {
        auto it = foods.find(part);
        if (it != foods.end()) foods.erase(it);
    }

    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> outputs;
    outputs.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(std::max(0, maxTurns)));

    for (int turn = 0; turn < maxTurns; ++turn) {
        if (foods.empty()) break;

        const Point& head = snake.front();
        const Point& oldTail = snake.back();

        std::vector<MoveOption> options;
        options.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(2 * D));

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point np = head;
                np[axis] += dir;

                if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
                if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;

                bool grow = (foods.find(np) != foods.end());
                auto oit = occ.find(np);
                if (oit != occ.end()) {
                    bool canUseTail = (!grow && samePoint(np, oldTail));
                    if (!canUseTail) continue;
                }

                options.push_back(MoveOption{axis, dir, std::move(np), std::numeric_limits<int>::min()});
            }
        }

        if (options.empty()) break;

        // Try to get a planned first step from bounded A* toward one of the nearest foods.
        bool hasPathStep = false;
        Point plannedStep;
        {
            int k = std::min<int>(6, static_cast<int>(foods.size()));
            if (k > 0) {
                std::vector<Point> candidates = topKNearestFoods(head, foods, k);
                int nodeLimit = 2000 + D * 300 + static_cast<int>(snake.size()) * 8;
                if (nodeLimit > 50000) nodeLimit = 50000;

                for (const Point& goal : candidates) {
                    std::vector<Point> path = boundedAStar(head, goal, bounds, obstacles, occ, oldTail, nodeLimit);
                    if (path.size() >= 2) {
                        plannedStep = path[1];
                        hasPathStep = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        int bestIdx = 0;
        int bestScore = std::numeric_limits<int>::min();

        for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(options.size()); ++i) {
            MoveOption& m = options[i];
            bool grow = (foods.find(m.next) != foods.end());

            int freedomCap = std::max(80, std::min(8000, static_cast<int>(snake.size()) * 4 + 256));
            int freedom = floodFreedomAfterMove(m.next, grow, bounds, obstacles, occ, oldTail, freedomCap);
            int degree = openNeighborsAfterMove(m.next, grow, bounds, obstacles, occ, oldTail);
            int dist = nearestFoodDistance(m.next, foods);

            int score = 0;
            if (grow) score += 200000;
            if (hasPathStep && samePoint(m.next, plannedStep)) score += 60000;
            score += freedom * 8;
            score += degree * 1200;
            score -= dist * 25;

            if (!grow && degree == 0) score -= 120000;
            if (!grow && freedom < static_cast<int>(snake.size() / 2)) score -= 20000;

            m.score = score;

            if (score > bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                bestIdx = i;
            }
        }

        const MoveOption& chosen = options[bestIdx];
        outputs.push_back({chosen.axis, chosen.dir});

        bool grow = (foods.find(chosen.next) != foods.end());

        snake.push_front(chosen.next);
        ++occ[chosen.next];

        if (grow) {
            foods.erase(chosen.next);
        } else {
            Point tail = snake.back();
            snake.pop_back();
            auto it = occ.find(tail);
            if (it != occ.end()) {
                --(it->second);
                if (it->second <= 0) occ.erase(it);
            }
        }
    }

    for (const auto& mv : outputs) {
        std::cout << mv.first << ' ' << mv.second << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}
Subpass 10
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought
 1.0000
[20D 3^20, 60 food, 1000 obstacles] Food: 0/0, Turns: 0, End: won, Time: 0.01s

N-Dimensional Snake - 20D 3^20, 60 food, 1000 obstacles

View C++ Code (13639 chars)
#include <algorithm>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>
#include <deque>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <queue>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

using Point = std::vector<int>;

struct PointHash {
    std::size_t operator()(const Point& p) const noexcept {
        std::size_t h = 1469598103934665603ull;
        for (int x : p) {
            std::size_t v = static_cast<std::size_t>(static_cast<std::uint64_t>(x) ^ 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15ull);
            h ^= v + 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15ull + (h << 6) + (h >> 2);
        }
        return h;
    }
};

using PointSet = std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash>;
using PointCountMap = std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash>;

static inline bool samePoint(const Point& a, const Point& b) {
    return a == b;
}

static inline bool inBounds(const Point& p, const std::vector<int>& bounds) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < p.size(); ++i) {
        if (p[i] < 0 || p[i] >= bounds[i]) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

static inline int manhattan(const Point& a, const Point& b) {
    long long sum = 0;
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < a.size(); ++i) {
        sum += std::llabs(static_cast<long long>(a[i]) - static_cast<long long>(b[i]));
    }
    if (sum > std::numeric_limits<int>::max()) return std::numeric_limits<int>::max();
    return static_cast<int>(sum);
}

struct AStarNode {
    int f;
    int g;
    Point p;
};

struct AStarCmp {
    bool operator()(const AStarNode& a, const AStarNode& b) const {
        if (a.f != b.f) return a.f > b.f;
        return a.g < b.g;
    }
};

static std::vector<Point> reconstructPath(
    const Point& start,
    const Point& goal,
    const std::unordered_map<Point, Point, PointHash>& parent
) {
    std::vector<Point> path;
    Point cur = goal;
    path.push_back(cur);
    while (!samePoint(cur, start)) {
        auto it = parent.find(cur);
        if (it == parent.end()) {
            return {};
        }
        cur = it->second;
        path.push_back(cur);
    }
    std::reverse(path.begin(), path.end());
    return path;
}

static std::vector<Point> boundedAStar(
    const Point& start,
    const Point& goal,
    const std::vector<int>& bounds,
    const PointSet& obstacles,
    const PointCountMap& occ,
    const Point& tail,
    int nodeLimit
) {
    if (samePoint(start, goal)) return {start};

    std::priority_queue<AStarNode, std::vector<AStarNode>, AStarCmp> pq;
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> gScore;
    std::unordered_map<Point, Point, PointHash> parent;
    gScore.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(nodeLimit) * 2ull + 64ull);
    parent.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(nodeLimit) * 2ull + 64ull);

    gScore[start] = 0;
    pq.push(AStarNode{manhattan(start, goal), 0, start});

    int expanded = 0;
    const int D = static_cast<int>(start.size());

    while (!pq.empty() && expanded < nodeLimit) {
        AStarNode cur = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        auto git = gScore.find(cur.p);
        if (git == gScore.end() || git->second != cur.g) continue;
        if (samePoint(cur.p, goal)) {
            return reconstructPath(start, goal, parent);
        }

        ++expanded;

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point np = cur.p;
                np[axis] += dir;
                if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
                if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;

                auto oit = occ.find(np);
                if (oit != occ.end() && !samePoint(np, tail) && !samePoint(np, goal)) {
                    continue;
                }

                int ng = cur.g + 1;
                auto ngit = gScore.find(np);
                if (ngit == gScore.end() || ng < ngit->second) {
                    gScore[np] = ng;
                    parent[np] = cur.p;
                    int h = manhattan(np, goal);
                    int f = (h >= std::numeric_limits<int>::max() - ng) ? std::numeric_limits<int>::max() : (ng + h);
                    pq.push(AStarNode{f, ng, std::move(np)});
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return {};
}

static std::vector<Point> topKNearestFoods(const Point& head, const PointSet& foods, int k) {
    std::vector<std::pair<int, Point>> best;
    best.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(k));

    for (const Point& f : foods) {
        int d = manhattan(head, f);
        if (static_cast<int>(best.size()) < k) {
            best.push_back({d, f});
            continue;
        }

        int worstIdx = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < k; ++i) {
            if (best[i].first > best[worstIdx].first) worstIdx = i;
        }
        if (d < best[worstIdx].first) {
            best[worstIdx] = {d, f};
        }
    }

    std::sort(best.begin(), best.end(), [](const auto& a, const auto& b) {
        return a.first < b.first;
    });

    std::vector<Point> out;
    out.reserve(best.size());
    for (auto& p : best) out.push_back(std::move(p.second));
    return out;
}

static int nearestFoodDistance(const Point& p, const PointSet& foods) {
    if (foods.empty()) return 0;
    int best = std::numeric_limits<int>::max();
    for (const Point& f : foods) {
        best = std::min(best, manhattan(p, f));
    }
    return best;
}

static bool occupiedAfterMove(
    const Point& cell,
    const Point& nextHead,
    bool grow,
    const Point& oldTail,
    const PointCountMap& occ
) {
    if (samePoint(cell, nextHead)) return true;
    auto it = occ.find(cell);
    if (it == occ.end()) return false;
    if (!grow && samePoint(cell, oldTail)) return false;
    return true;
}

static int floodFreedomAfterMove(
    const Point& nextHead,
    bool grow,
    const std::vector<int>& bounds,
    const PointSet& obstacles,
    const PointCountMap& occ,
    const Point& oldTail,
    int cap
) {
    std::queue<Point> q;
    PointSet seen;
    seen.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(cap) * 2ull + 64ull);

    q.push(nextHead);
    seen.insert(nextHead);

    const int D = static_cast<int>(nextHead.size());

    while (!q.empty() && static_cast<int>(seen.size()) < cap) {
        Point cur = q.front();
        q.pop();

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point np = cur;
                np[axis] += dir;
                if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
                if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;
                if (occupiedAfterMove(np, nextHead, grow, oldTail, occ)) continue;
                if (seen.insert(np).second) {
                    q.push(std::move(np));
                    if (static_cast<int>(seen.size()) >= cap) break;
                }
            }
            if (static_cast<int>(seen.size()) >= cap) break;
        }
    }

    return static_cast<int>(seen.size());
}

static int openNeighborsAfterMove(
    const Point& nextHead,
    bool grow,
    const std::vector<int>& bounds,
    const PointSet& obstacles,
    const PointCountMap& occ,
    const Point& oldTail
) {
    int count = 0;
    const int D = static_cast<int>(nextHead.size());

    for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
        for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
            Point np = nextHead;
            np[axis] += dir;
            if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
            if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;
            if (occupiedAfterMove(np, nextHead, grow, oldTail, occ)) continue;
            ++count;
        }
    }

    return count;
}

struct MoveOption {
    int axis;
    int dir;
    Point next;
    int score;
};

int main() {
    std::ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);

    int D = 0;
    int maxTurns = 0;
    if (!(std::cin >> D >> maxTurns)) {
        return 0;
    }

    std::vector<int> bounds(D);
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) std::cin >> bounds[i];

    int snakeLengthInput = 1;
    Point start(D);
    std::cin >> snakeLengthInput;
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) std::cin >> start[i];

    int F = 0;
    std::cin >> F;
    PointSet foods;
    foods.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(F) * 2ull + 64ull);
    for (int i = 0; i < F; ++i) {
        Point p(D);
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) std::cin >> p[j];
        foods.insert(std::move(p));
    }

    int O = 0;
    std::cin >> O;
    PointSet obstacles;
    obstacles.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(O) * 2ull + 64ull);
    for (int i = 0; i < O; ++i) {
        Point p(D);
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) std::cin >> p[j];
        obstacles.insert(std::move(p));
    }

    // Build a deterministic initial body from head + length when only head is provided.
    // If a full initial body is not available in input, this gives us a valid internal state.
    std::deque<Point> snake;
    PointCountMap occ;
    occ.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(std::max(16, snakeLengthInput * 2 + 16)));

    snake.push_back(start);
    occ[start] = 1;

    for (int seg = 1; seg < snakeLengthInput; ++seg) {
        const Point& tail = snake.back();
        bool placed = false;

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D && !placed; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point np = tail;
                np[axis] += dir;
                if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
                if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;
                if (occ.find(np) != occ.end()) continue;

                snake.push_back(np);
                occ[np] = 1;
                placed = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (!placed) break;
    }

    // Any food currently occupied by body is considered unavailable.
    for (const Point& part : snake) {
        auto it = foods.find(part);
        if (it != foods.end()) foods.erase(it);
    }

    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> outputs;
    outputs.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(std::max(0, maxTurns)));

    for (int turn = 0; turn < maxTurns; ++turn) {
        if (foods.empty()) break;

        const Point& head = snake.front();
        const Point& oldTail = snake.back();

        std::vector<MoveOption> options;
        options.reserve(static_cast<std::size_t>(2 * D));

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point np = head;
                np[axis] += dir;

                if (!inBounds(np, bounds)) continue;
                if (obstacles.find(np) != obstacles.end()) continue;

                bool grow = (foods.find(np) != foods.end());
                auto oit = occ.find(np);
                if (oit != occ.end()) {
                    bool canUseTail = (!grow && samePoint(np, oldTail));
                    if (!canUseTail) continue;
                }

                options.push_back(MoveOption{axis, dir, std::move(np), std::numeric_limits<int>::min()});
            }
        }

        if (options.empty()) break;

        // Try to get a planned first step from bounded A* toward one of the nearest foods.
        bool hasPathStep = false;
        Point plannedStep;
        {
            int k = std::min<int>(6, static_cast<int>(foods.size()));
            if (k > 0) {
                std::vector<Point> candidates = topKNearestFoods(head, foods, k);
                int nodeLimit = 2000 + D * 300 + static_cast<int>(snake.size()) * 8;
                if (nodeLimit > 50000) nodeLimit = 50000;

                for (const Point& goal : candidates) {
                    std::vector<Point> path = boundedAStar(head, goal, bounds, obstacles, occ, oldTail, nodeLimit);
                    if (path.size() >= 2) {
                        plannedStep = path[1];
                        hasPathStep = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        int bestIdx = 0;
        int bestScore = std::numeric_limits<int>::min();

        for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(options.size()); ++i) {
            MoveOption& m = options[i];
            bool grow = (foods.find(m.next) != foods.end());

            int freedomCap = std::max(80, std::min(8000, static_cast<int>(snake.size()) * 4 + 256));
            int freedom = floodFreedomAfterMove(m.next, grow, bounds, obstacles, occ, oldTail, freedomCap);
            int degree = openNeighborsAfterMove(m.next, grow, bounds, obstacles, occ, oldTail);
            int dist = nearestFoodDistance(m.next, foods);

            int score = 0;
            if (grow) score += 200000;
            if (hasPathStep && samePoint(m.next, plannedStep)) score += 60000;
            score += freedom * 8;
            score += degree * 1200;
            score -= dist * 25;

            if (!grow && degree == 0) score -= 120000;
            if (!grow && freedom < static_cast<int>(snake.size() / 2)) score -= 20000;

            m.score = score;

            if (score > bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                bestIdx = i;
            }
        }

        const MoveOption& chosen = options[bestIdx];
        outputs.push_back({chosen.axis, chosen.dir});

        bool grow = (foods.find(chosen.next) != foods.end());

        snake.push_front(chosen.next);
        ++occ[chosen.next];

        if (grow) {
            foods.erase(chosen.next);
        } else {
            Point tail = snake.back();
            snake.pop_back();
            auto it = occ.find(tail);
            if (it != occ.end()) {
                --(it->second);
                if (it->second <= 0) occ.erase(it);
            }
        }
    }

    for (const auto& mv : outputs) {
        std::cout << mv.first << ' ' << mv.second << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}
Test 22: Tetris Game (C#) Score: 0.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C# code to play Tetris optimally.

Your C# Tetris player will be tested with games ranging from short practice sessions to marathon games.

**Problem:**
Standard Tetris rules apply - variable width board (typically 10-20 columns),
pieces fall from top, clear lines by filling them completely, game over when pieces stack to the top.
The program receives pieces one at a time and must decide optimal placement.

**Input format (stdin, whitespace seperated decimal integers):**
```
width height num_pieces
For each piece:
Line: piece_type (I, O, T, S, Z, J, L)
Program outputs: rotation column
Then receives: result (ok, cleared_N, gameover)
```

**Output format (stdout, 1 line per piece, whitespace seperated decimal integers):**
rotation column
- rotation: 0-3 (number of 90° clockwise rotations)
- column: 0 to width-1 (leftmost column of piece)

**Piece Types:**
- I: 4x1 line piece
- O: 2x2 square piece
- T: T-shaped piece
- S: S-shaped piece (right-leaning)
- Z: Z-shaped piece (left-leaning)
- J: L-shaped piece (left-leaning)
- L: L-shaped piece (right-leaning)

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable board widths and long game sequences
4. Must place a peice within 5 seconds of it being written to STDIN.

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14


Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on game complexity.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write an AI that plays Tetris. Given the current board state and the next piece, choose where to place it to survive as long as possible and clear as many lines as you can. Good play means keeping the board flat, avoiding buried holes, and setting up multi-line clears.

Subpasses increase the board size and speed, demanding smarter lookahead and evaluation. The AI must balance short-term survival with long-term board health.

 0.0000
[20 pieces] Placed: 20/20, Lines: 0, End: completed, Time: 0.17s

Tetris AI - 20 pieces

View C# Code (24816 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;

public static class Program
{
    public static void Main()
    {
        var scanner = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());

        if (!scanner.TryNextInt(out int width))
        {
            return;
        }

        if (!scanner.TryNextInt(out int height) || !scanner.TryNextInt(out int numPieces))
        {
            return;
        }

        var board = new Board(width, height);
        var ai = new TetrisAi();

        for (int i = 0; i < numPieces; i++)
        {
            string pieceToken = scanner.NextToken();
            if (pieceToken == null)
            {
                break;
            }

            char pieceType = char.ToUpperInvariant(pieceToken[0]);
            Move move = ai.ChooseMove(board, pieceType, numPieces - i);

            Console.WriteLine(move.Rotation + " " + move.Column);
            Console.Out.Flush();

            if (board.TryPlace(pieceType, move.Rotation, move.Column, out Board nextBoard, out _))
            {
                board = nextBoard;
            }

            string resultToken = scanner.NextToken();
            if (resultToken == null)
            {
                break;
            }

            if (resultToken.StartsWith("gameover", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

public sealed class TetrisAi
{
    private static readonly char[] PieceOrder = { 'I', 'O', 'T', 'S', 'Z', 'J', 'L' };

    public Move ChooseMove(Board board, char pieceType, int piecesRemaining)
    {
        List<Orientation> orientations = PieceLibrary.Get(pieceType);
        var strategy = Strategy.For(board, piecesRemaining);
        long startTicks = Stopwatch.GetTimestamp();

        var candidates = new List<Candidate>(48);

        for (int oi = 0; oi < orientations.Count; oi++)
        {
            Orientation orientation = orientations[oi];
            int maxCol = board.Width - orientation.Width;

            for (int col = 0; col <= maxCol; col++)
            {
                if (!board.TryPlace(orientation, col, out Board nextBoard, out int cleared))
                {
                    continue;
                }

                double immediateScore = Evaluate(nextBoard, cleared, strategy);
                candidates.Add(new Candidate(new Move(orientation.RotationIndex, col), immediateScore, nextBoard));
            }
        }

        if (candidates.Count == 0)
        {
            return new Move(0, 0);
        }

        candidates.Sort((a, b) => b.Score.CompareTo(a.Score));

        if (strategy.LookaheadBeam <= 0 || strategy.FutureSamples <= 0)
        {
            return candidates[0].Move;
        }

        int beam = Math.Min(strategy.LookaheadBeam, candidates.Count);
        Move bestMove = candidates[0].Move;
        double bestTotal = double.NegativeInfinity;

        for (int i = 0; i < beam; i++)
        {
            if (ElapsedMs(startTicks) > strategy.TimeBudgetMs)
            {
                break;
            }

            Candidate candidate = candidates[i];
            double future = ExpectedFutureValue(candidate.Board, strategy, startTicks);
            double total = candidate.Score + strategy.FutureWeight * future;

            if (total > bestTotal)
            {
                bestTotal = total;
                bestMove = candidate.Move;
            }
        }

        return bestMove;
    }

    private double ExpectedFutureValue(Board board, Strategy strategy, long startTicks)
    {
        int samples = Math.Min(strategy.FutureSamples, PieceOrder.Length);
        double sum = 0.0;

        for (int pi = 0; pi < samples; pi++)
        {
            if (ElapsedMs(startTicks) > strategy.TimeBudgetMs)
            {
                break;
            }

            char piece = PieceOrder[pi];
            List<Orientation> orientations = PieceLibrary.Get(piece);
            double best = double.NegativeInfinity;

            for (int oi = 0; oi < orientations.Count; oi++)
            {
                Orientation orientation = orientations[oi];
                int maxCol = board.Width - orientation.Width;

                for (int col = 0; col <= maxCol; col++)
                {
                    if (!board.TryPlace(orientation, col, out Board nextBoard, out int cleared))
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    double score = Evaluate(nextBoard, cleared, strategy);
                    if (score > best)
                    {
                        best = score;
                    }
                }
            }

            if (double.IsNegativeInfinity(best))
            {
                best = -1_000_000.0;
            }

            sum += best;
        }

        return sum / samples;
    }

    private static double Evaluate(Board board, int cleared, Strategy s)
    {
        Metrics m = board.ComputeMetrics(s.UseTransitions);

        double score =
            cleared * s.LineWeight +
            m.AggregateHeight * s.AggregateHeightWeight +
            m.Holes * s.HoleWeight +
            m.Bumpiness * s.BumpinessWeight +
            m.MaxHeight * s.MaxHeightWeight +
            m.Wells * s.WellWeight;

        if (s.UseTransitions)
        {
            score += m.RowTransitions * s.RowTransitionWeight;
            score += m.ColumnTransitions * s.ColumnTransitionWeight;
        }

        if (s.PreferRightWell && board.Width >= 2)
        {
            int wellCol = board.Width - 1;
            int neighbor = board.ColumnHeights[board.Width - 2];
            int wellDepth = Math.Max(0, neighbor - board.ColumnHeights[wellCol]);
            score += s.RightWellWeight * wellDepth;
            score -= 0.10 * board.ColumnHeights[wellCol];
        }

        return score;
    }

    private static double ElapsedMs(long startTicks)
    {
        long dt = Stopwatch.GetTimestamp() - startTicks;
        return (1000.0 * dt) / Stopwatch.Frequency;
    }

    private readonly struct Candidate
    {
        public Candidate(Move move, double score, Board board)
        {
            Move = move;
            Score = score;
            Board = board;
        }

        public Move Move { get; }
        public double Score { get; }
        public Board Board { get; }
    }
}

public readonly struct Strategy
{
    public readonly double LineWeight;
    public readonly double AggregateHeightWeight;
    public readonly double HoleWeight;
    public readonly double BumpinessWeight;
    public readonly double MaxHeightWeight;
    public readonly double WellWeight;
    public readonly double RowTransitionWeight;
    public readonly double ColumnTransitionWeight;
    public readonly double FutureWeight;
    public readonly double RightWellWeight;
    public readonly int LookaheadBeam;
    public readonly int FutureSamples;
    public readonly int TimeBudgetMs;
    public readonly bool UseTransitions;
    public readonly bool PreferRightWell;

    private Strategy(
        double lineWeight,
        double aggregateHeightWeight,
        double holeWeight,
        double bumpinessWeight,
        double maxHeightWeight,
        double wellWeight,
        double rowTransitionWeight,
        double columnTransitionWeight,
        double futureWeight,
        double rightWellWeight,
        int lookaheadBeam,
        int futureSamples,
        int timeBudgetMs,
        bool useTransitions,
        bool preferRightWell)
    {
        LineWeight = lineWeight;
        AggregateHeightWeight = aggregateHeightWeight;
        HoleWeight = holeWeight;
        BumpinessWeight = bumpinessWeight;
        MaxHeightWeight = maxHeightWeight;
        WellWeight = wellWeight;
        RowTransitionWeight = rowTransitionWeight;
        ColumnTransitionWeight = columnTransitionWeight;
        FutureWeight = futureWeight;
        RightWellWeight = rightWellWeight;
        LookaheadBeam = lookaheadBeam;
        FutureSamples = futureSamples;
        TimeBudgetMs = timeBudgetMs;
        UseTransitions = useTransitions;
        PreferRightWell = preferRightWell;
    }

    public static Strategy For(Board board, int piecesRemaining)
    {
        double danger = board.MaxHeight / (double)Math.Max(1, board.Height);
        double fill = board.FilledCells / (double)Math.Max(1, board.Width * board.Height);
        bool wideBoard = board.Width >= 14;

        if (danger >= 0.78 || fill >= 0.58)
        {
            return new Strategy(
                lineWeight: 2.10,
                aggregateHeightWeight: -0.62,
                holeWeight: -3.80,
                bumpinessWeight: -0.42,
                maxHeightWeight: -2.20,
                wellWeight: -0.20,
                rowTransitionWeight: -0.55,
                columnTransitionWeight: -0.50,
                futureWeight: 0.0,
                rightWellWeight: 0.0,
                lookaheadBeam: 0,
                futureSamples: 0,
                timeBudgetMs: 25,
                useTransitions: true,
                preferRightWell: false);
        }

        if (wideBoard || piecesRemaining > 600)
        {
            return new Strategy(
                lineWeight: 1.90,
                aggregateHeightWeight: -0.40,
                holeWeight: -2.70,
                bumpinessWeight: -0.30,
                maxHeightWeight: -1.20,
                wellWeight: -0.06,
                rowTransitionWeight: -0.30,
                columnTransitionWeight: -0.25,
                futureWeight: 0.12,
                rightWellWeight: 0.0,
                lookaheadBeam: 2,
                futureSamples: 4,
                timeBudgetMs: 40,
                useTransitions: false,
                preferRightWell: false);
        }

        bool lowDanger = danger < 0.45;
        bool shortRun = piecesRemaining < 180;

        if (lowDanger && shortRun)
        {
            return new Strategy(
                lineWeight: 2.80,
                aggregateHeightWeight: -0.28,
                holeWeight: -2.25,
                bumpinessWeight: -0.24,
                maxHeightWeight: -0.90,
                wellWeight: 0.02,
                rowTransitionWeight: -0.30,
                columnTransitionWeight: -0.25,
                futureWeight: 0.28,
                rightWellWeight: 0.18,
                lookaheadBeam: 6,
                futureSamples: 7,
                timeBudgetMs: 120,
                useTransitions: false,
                preferRightWell: board.Width >= 10);
        }

        return new Strategy(
            lineWeight: 2.20,
            aggregateHeightWeight: -0.35,
            holeWeight: -2.50,
            bumpinessWeight: -0.28,
            maxHeightWeight: -1.05,
            wellWeight: -0.05,
            rowTransitionWeight: -0.45,
            columnTransitionWeight: -0.35,
            futureWeight: 0.18,
            rightWellWeight: 0.08,
            lookaheadBeam: 4,
            futureSamples: 6,
            timeBudgetMs: 80,
            useTransitions: true,
            preferRightWell: board.Width >= 10 && danger < 0.55);
    }
}

public readonly struct Move
{
    public Move(int rotation, int column)
    {
        Rotation = rotation;
        Column = column;
    }

    public int Rotation { get; }
    public int Column { get; }
}

public sealed class Board
{
    public int Width { get; }
    public int Height { get; }
    public int FilledCells { get; }
    public int[] ColumnHeights { get; }
    public int MaxHeight { get; }

    private ulong FullMask { get; }
    private ulong[] Rows { get; }

    public Board(int width, int height)
    {
        Width = Math.Max(1, width);
        Height = Math.Max(1, height);

        if (Width >= 63)
        {
            throw new ArgumentException("Board width must be <= 62 for bitboard representation.");
        }

        FullMask = (1UL << Width) - 1UL;
        Rows = new ulong[Height];
        ColumnHeights = new int[Width];
        FilledCells = 0;
        MaxHeight = 0;
    }

    private Board(int width, int height, ulong fullMask, ulong[] rows, int[] columnHeights, int filledCells)
    {
        Width = width;
        Height = height;
        FullMask = fullMask;
        Rows = rows;
        ColumnHeights = columnHeights;
        FilledCells = filledCells;

        int max = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < columnHeights.Length; i++)
        {
            if (columnHeights[i] > max)
            {
                max = columnHeights[i];
            }
        }

        MaxHeight = max;
    }

    public bool TryPlace(char pieceType, int rotation, int column, out Board next, out int cleared)
    {
        Orientation? orientation = PieceLibrary.GetByRotation(pieceType, rotation);
        if (orientation == null)
        {
            next = this;
            cleared = 0;
            return false;
        }

        return TryPlace(orientation, column, out next, out cleared);
    }

    public bool TryPlace(Orientation orientation, int column, out Board next, out int cleared)
    {
        next = this;
        cleared = 0;

        if (column < 0 || column + orientation.Width > Width)
        {
            return false;
        }

        int landingY = 0;
        for (int lx = 0; lx < orientation.Width; lx++)
        {
            int boardHeight = ColumnHeights[column + lx];
            int y = boardHeight - orientation.BottomOffsets[lx];
            if (y > landingY)
            {
                landingY = y;
            }
        }

        if (landingY + orientation.Height > Height)
        {
            return false;
        }

        ulong[] newRows = (ulong[])Rows.Clone();

        for (int i = 0; i < orientation.Blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            Block b = orientation.Blocks[i];
            int gx = column + b.X;
            int gy = landingY + b.Y;

            if ((uint)gy >= (uint)Height)
            {
                return false;
            }

            ulong bit = 1UL << gx;
            if ((newRows[gy] & bit) != 0)
            {
                return false;
            }

            newRows[gy] |= bit;
        }

        int write = 0;
        for (int read = 0; read < Height; read++)
        {
            if (newRows[read] == FullMask)
            {
                cleared++;
            }
            else
            {
                newRows[write++] = newRows[read];
            }
        }

        while (write < Height)
        {
            newRows[write++] = 0UL;
        }

        int[] heights = RecomputeHeights(newRows);
        int newFilled = FilledCells + 4 - cleared * Width;
        next = new Board(Width, Height, FullMask, newRows, heights, newFilled);
        return true;
    }

    public Metrics ComputeMetrics(bool includeTransitions)
    {
        int aggregateHeight = 0;
        int holes = 0;
        int bumpiness = 0;
        int wells = 0;

        for (int x = 0; x < Width; x++)
        {
            int h = ColumnHeights[x];
            aggregateHeight += h;

            bool seenBlock = false;
            for (int y = Height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
            {
                bool occupied = ((Rows[y] >> x) & 1UL) != 0;
                if (occupied)
                {
                    seenBlock = true;
                }
                else if (seenBlock)
                {
                    holes++;
                }
            }

            if (x + 1 < Width)
            {
                bumpiness += Math.Abs(ColumnHeights[x] - ColumnHeights[x + 1]);
            }

            int left = x == 0 ? Height : ColumnHeights[x - 1];
            int right = x == Width - 1 ? Height : ColumnHeights[x + 1];
            int minNeighbor = Math.Min(left, right);
            if (minNeighbor > h)
            {
                int depth = minNeighbor - h;
                wells += depth * (depth + 1) / 2;
            }
        }

        int rowTransitions = 0;
        int colTransitions = 0;

        if (includeTransitions)
        {
            for (int y = 0; y < Height; y++)
            {
                bool prev = true;
                for (int x = 0; x < Width; x++)
                {
                    bool occupied = ((Rows[y] >> x) & 1UL) != 0;
                    if (occupied != prev)
                    {
                        rowTransitions++;
                    }
                    prev = occupied;
                }
                if (!prev)
                {
                    rowTransitions++;
                }
            }

            for (int x = 0; x < Width; x++)
            {
                bool prev = true;
                for (int y = Height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
                {
                    bool occupied = ((Rows[y] >> x) & 1UL) != 0;
                    if (occupied != prev)
                    {
                        colTransitions++;
                    }
                    prev = occupied;
                }
                if (!prev)
                {
                    colTransitions++;
                }
            }
        }

        return new Metrics(
            aggregateHeight,
            holes,
            bumpiness,
            MaxHeight,
            wells,
            rowTransitions,
            colTransitions);
    }

    private int[] RecomputeHeights(ulong[] rows)
    {
        int[] heights = new int[Width];

        for (int x = 0; x < Width; x++)
        {
            int h = 0;
            for (int y = Height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
            {
                if (((rows[y] >> x) & 1UL) != 0)
                {
                    h = y + 1;
                    break;
                }
            }
            heights[x] = h;
        }

        return heights;
    }
}

public readonly struct Metrics
{
    public Metrics(int aggregateHeight, int holes, int bumpiness, int maxHeight, int wells, int rowTransitions, int columnTransitions)
    {
        AggregateHeight = aggregateHeight;
        Holes = holes;
        Bumpiness = bumpiness;
        MaxHeight = maxHeight;
        Wells = wells;
        RowTransitions = rowTransitions;
        ColumnTransitions = columnTransitions;
    }

    public int AggregateHeight { get; }
    public int Holes { get; }
    public int Bumpiness { get; }
    public int MaxHeight { get; }
    public int Wells { get; }
    public int RowTransitions { get; }
    public int ColumnTransitions { get; }
}

public readonly struct Block
{
    public Block(int x, int y)
    {
        X = x;
        Y = y;
    }

    public int X { get; }
    public int Y { get; }
}

public sealed class Orientation
{
    public Orientation(int rotationIndex, Block[] blocks)
    {
        RotationIndex = rotationIndex;
        Blocks = blocks;

        int maxX = 0;
        int maxY = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            if (blocks[i].X > maxX) maxX = blocks[i].X;
            if (blocks[i].Y > maxY) maxY = blocks[i].Y;
        }

        Width = maxX + 1;
        Height = maxY + 1;
        BottomOffsets = new int[Width];
        for (int i = 0; i < Width; i++)
        {
            BottomOffsets[i] = int.MaxValue;
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            Block b = blocks[i];
            if (b.Y < BottomOffsets[b.X])
            {
                BottomOffsets[b.X] = b.Y;
            }
        }
    }

    public int RotationIndex { get; }
    public Block[] Blocks { get; }
    public int Width { get; }
    public int Height { get; }
    public int[] BottomOffsets { get; }
}

public static class PieceLibrary
{
    private static readonly Dictionary<char, List<Orientation>> All = new Dictionary<char, List<Orientation>>();
    private static readonly Dictionary<char, Dictionary<int, Orientation>> ByRotation = new Dictionary<char, Dictionary<int, Orientation>>();

    static PieceLibrary()
    {
        Add('I', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(3, 0) });
        Add('O', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(0, 1), new Block(1, 1) });
        Add('T', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(1, 1) });
        Add('S', new[] { new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(0, 1), new Block(1, 1) });
        Add('Z', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(1, 1), new Block(2, 1) });
        Add('J', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(0, 1) });
        Add('L', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(2, 1) });
    }

    public static List<Orientation> Get(char piece)
    {
        char key = char.ToUpperInvariant(piece);
        if (!All.TryGetValue(key, out List<Orientation>? value))
        {
            return All['I'];
        }

        return value;
    }

    public static Orientation? GetByRotation(char piece, int rotation)
    {
        char key = char.ToUpperInvariant(piece);
        if (!ByRotation.TryGetValue(key, out Dictionary<int, Orientation>? map))
        {
            return null;
        }

        map.TryGetValue((rotation % 4 + 4) % 4, out Orientation? orientation);
        return orientation;
    }

    private static void Add(char piece, Block[] baseBlocks)
    {
        var list = new List<Orientation>(4);
        var map = new Dictionary<int, Orientation>(4);
        var seen = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.Ordinal);

        Block[] current = (Block[])baseBlocks.Clone();

        for (int rotation = 0; rotation < 4; rotation++)
        {
            Block[] normalized = Normalize(current);
            string sig = Signature(normalized);

            if (seen.Add(sig))
            {
                var orientation = new Orientation(rotation, normalized);
                list.Add(orientation);
                map[rotation] = orientation;
            }

            current = RotateCW(current);
        }

        All[piece] = list;
        ByRotation[piece] = map;
    }

    private static Block[] RotateCW(Block[] blocks)
    {
        Block[] outBlocks = new Block[blocks.Length];
        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            // (x, y) -> (y, -x)
            outBlocks[i] = new Block(blocks[i].Y, -blocks[i].X);
        }
        return outBlocks;
    }

    private static Block[] Normalize(Block[] blocks)
    {
        int minX = int.MaxValue;
        int minY = int.MaxValue;

        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            if (blocks[i].X < minX) minX = blocks[i].X;
            if (blocks[i].Y < minY) minY = blocks[i].Y;
        }

        Block[] normalized = new Block[blocks.Length];
        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            normalized[i] = new Block(blocks[i].X - minX, blocks[i].Y - minY);
        }

        Array.Sort(normalized, (a, b) =>
        {
            int cx = a.X.CompareTo(b.X);
            return cx != 0 ? cx : a.Y.CompareTo(b.Y);
        });

        return normalized;
    }

    private static string Signature(Block[] blocks)
    {
        var chars = new char[blocks.Length * 6];
        int p = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            int x = blocks[i].X;
            int y = blocks[i].Y;

            chars[p++] = (char)('0' + x);
            chars[p++] = ',';
            chars[p++] = (char)('0' + y);
            chars[p++] = ';';
        }

        return new string(chars, 0, p);
    }
}

public sealed class FastScanner
{
    private readonly Stream _stream;
    private readonly byte[] _buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
    private int _len;
    private int _ptr;

    public FastScanner(Stream stream)
    {
        _stream = stream;
    }

    public string NextToken()
    {
        int c;
        do
        {
            c = Read();
            if (c < 0)
            {
                return null;
            }
        } while (c <= 32);

        var chars = new char[32];
        int n = 0;

        while (c > 32)
        {
            if (n == chars.Length)
            {
                Array.Resize(ref chars, chars.Length * 2);
            }

            chars[n++] = (char)c;
            c = Read();
        }

        return new string(chars, 0, n);
    }

    public bool TryNextInt(out int value)
    {
        value = 0;
        string token = NextToken();
        if (token == null)
        {
            return false;
        }

        return int.TryParse(token, out value);
    }

    private int Read()
    {
        if (_ptr >= _len)
        {
            _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
            _ptr = 0;
            if (_len == 0)
            {
                return -1;
            }
        }

        return _buffer[_ptr++];
    }
}

[50 pieces] Placed: 36/50, Lines: 0, End: gameover, Time: 0.28s

Tetris AI - 50 pieces

View C# Code (24816 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;

public static class Program
{
    public static void Main()
    {
        var scanner = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());

        if (!scanner.TryNextInt(out int width))
        {
            return;
        }

        if (!scanner.TryNextInt(out int height) || !scanner.TryNextInt(out int numPieces))
        {
            return;
        }

        var board = new Board(width, height);
        var ai = new TetrisAi();

        for (int i = 0; i < numPieces; i++)
        {
            string pieceToken = scanner.NextToken();
            if (pieceToken == null)
            {
                break;
            }

            char pieceType = char.ToUpperInvariant(pieceToken[0]);
            Move move = ai.ChooseMove(board, pieceType, numPieces - i);

            Console.WriteLine(move.Rotation + " " + move.Column);
            Console.Out.Flush();

            if (board.TryPlace(pieceType, move.Rotation, move.Column, out Board nextBoard, out _))
            {
                board = nextBoard;
            }

            string resultToken = scanner.NextToken();
            if (resultToken == null)
            {
                break;
            }

            if (resultToken.StartsWith("gameover", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

public sealed class TetrisAi
{
    private static readonly char[] PieceOrder = { 'I', 'O', 'T', 'S', 'Z', 'J', 'L' };

    public Move ChooseMove(Board board, char pieceType, int piecesRemaining)
    {
        List<Orientation> orientations = PieceLibrary.Get(pieceType);
        var strategy = Strategy.For(board, piecesRemaining);
        long startTicks = Stopwatch.GetTimestamp();

        var candidates = new List<Candidate>(48);

        for (int oi = 0; oi < orientations.Count; oi++)
        {
            Orientation orientation = orientations[oi];
            int maxCol = board.Width - orientation.Width;

            for (int col = 0; col <= maxCol; col++)
            {
                if (!board.TryPlace(orientation, col, out Board nextBoard, out int cleared))
                {
                    continue;
                }

                double immediateScore = Evaluate(nextBoard, cleared, strategy);
                candidates.Add(new Candidate(new Move(orientation.RotationIndex, col), immediateScore, nextBoard));
            }
        }

        if (candidates.Count == 0)
        {
            return new Move(0, 0);
        }

        candidates.Sort((a, b) => b.Score.CompareTo(a.Score));

        if (strategy.LookaheadBeam <= 0 || strategy.FutureSamples <= 0)
        {
            return candidates[0].Move;
        }

        int beam = Math.Min(strategy.LookaheadBeam, candidates.Count);
        Move bestMove = candidates[0].Move;
        double bestTotal = double.NegativeInfinity;

        for (int i = 0; i < beam; i++)
        {
            if (ElapsedMs(startTicks) > strategy.TimeBudgetMs)
            {
                break;
            }

            Candidate candidate = candidates[i];
            double future = ExpectedFutureValue(candidate.Board, strategy, startTicks);
            double total = candidate.Score + strategy.FutureWeight * future;

            if (total > bestTotal)
            {
                bestTotal = total;
                bestMove = candidate.Move;
            }
        }

        return bestMove;
    }

    private double ExpectedFutureValue(Board board, Strategy strategy, long startTicks)
    {
        int samples = Math.Min(strategy.FutureSamples, PieceOrder.Length);
        double sum = 0.0;

        for (int pi = 0; pi < samples; pi++)
        {
            if (ElapsedMs(startTicks) > strategy.TimeBudgetMs)
            {
                break;
            }

            char piece = PieceOrder[pi];
            List<Orientation> orientations = PieceLibrary.Get(piece);
            double best = double.NegativeInfinity;

            for (int oi = 0; oi < orientations.Count; oi++)
            {
                Orientation orientation = orientations[oi];
                int maxCol = board.Width - orientation.Width;

                for (int col = 0; col <= maxCol; col++)
                {
                    if (!board.TryPlace(orientation, col, out Board nextBoard, out int cleared))
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    double score = Evaluate(nextBoard, cleared, strategy);
                    if (score > best)
                    {
                        best = score;
                    }
                }
            }

            if (double.IsNegativeInfinity(best))
            {
                best = -1_000_000.0;
            }

            sum += best;
        }

        return sum / samples;
    }

    private static double Evaluate(Board board, int cleared, Strategy s)
    {
        Metrics m = board.ComputeMetrics(s.UseTransitions);

        double score =
            cleared * s.LineWeight +
            m.AggregateHeight * s.AggregateHeightWeight +
            m.Holes * s.HoleWeight +
            m.Bumpiness * s.BumpinessWeight +
            m.MaxHeight * s.MaxHeightWeight +
            m.Wells * s.WellWeight;

        if (s.UseTransitions)
        {
            score += m.RowTransitions * s.RowTransitionWeight;
            score += m.ColumnTransitions * s.ColumnTransitionWeight;
        }

        if (s.PreferRightWell && board.Width >= 2)
        {
            int wellCol = board.Width - 1;
            int neighbor = board.ColumnHeights[board.Width - 2];
            int wellDepth = Math.Max(0, neighbor - board.ColumnHeights[wellCol]);
            score += s.RightWellWeight * wellDepth;
            score -= 0.10 * board.ColumnHeights[wellCol];
        }

        return score;
    }

    private static double ElapsedMs(long startTicks)
    {
        long dt = Stopwatch.GetTimestamp() - startTicks;
        return (1000.0 * dt) / Stopwatch.Frequency;
    }

    private readonly struct Candidate
    {
        public Candidate(Move move, double score, Board board)
        {
            Move = move;
            Score = score;
            Board = board;
        }

        public Move Move { get; }
        public double Score { get; }
        public Board Board { get; }
    }
}

public readonly struct Strategy
{
    public readonly double LineWeight;
    public readonly double AggregateHeightWeight;
    public readonly double HoleWeight;
    public readonly double BumpinessWeight;
    public readonly double MaxHeightWeight;
    public readonly double WellWeight;
    public readonly double RowTransitionWeight;
    public readonly double ColumnTransitionWeight;
    public readonly double FutureWeight;
    public readonly double RightWellWeight;
    public readonly int LookaheadBeam;
    public readonly int FutureSamples;
    public readonly int TimeBudgetMs;
    public readonly bool UseTransitions;
    public readonly bool PreferRightWell;

    private Strategy(
        double lineWeight,
        double aggregateHeightWeight,
        double holeWeight,
        double bumpinessWeight,
        double maxHeightWeight,
        double wellWeight,
        double rowTransitionWeight,
        double columnTransitionWeight,
        double futureWeight,
        double rightWellWeight,
        int lookaheadBeam,
        int futureSamples,
        int timeBudgetMs,
        bool useTransitions,
        bool preferRightWell)
    {
        LineWeight = lineWeight;
        AggregateHeightWeight = aggregateHeightWeight;
        HoleWeight = holeWeight;
        BumpinessWeight = bumpinessWeight;
        MaxHeightWeight = maxHeightWeight;
        WellWeight = wellWeight;
        RowTransitionWeight = rowTransitionWeight;
        ColumnTransitionWeight = columnTransitionWeight;
        FutureWeight = futureWeight;
        RightWellWeight = rightWellWeight;
        LookaheadBeam = lookaheadBeam;
        FutureSamples = futureSamples;
        TimeBudgetMs = timeBudgetMs;
        UseTransitions = useTransitions;
        PreferRightWell = preferRightWell;
    }

    public static Strategy For(Board board, int piecesRemaining)
    {
        double danger = board.MaxHeight / (double)Math.Max(1, board.Height);
        double fill = board.FilledCells / (double)Math.Max(1, board.Width * board.Height);
        bool wideBoard = board.Width >= 14;

        if (danger >= 0.78 || fill >= 0.58)
        {
            return new Strategy(
                lineWeight: 2.10,
                aggregateHeightWeight: -0.62,
                holeWeight: -3.80,
                bumpinessWeight: -0.42,
                maxHeightWeight: -2.20,
                wellWeight: -0.20,
                rowTransitionWeight: -0.55,
                columnTransitionWeight: -0.50,
                futureWeight: 0.0,
                rightWellWeight: 0.0,
                lookaheadBeam: 0,
                futureSamples: 0,
                timeBudgetMs: 25,
                useTransitions: true,
                preferRightWell: false);
        }

        if (wideBoard || piecesRemaining > 600)
        {
            return new Strategy(
                lineWeight: 1.90,
                aggregateHeightWeight: -0.40,
                holeWeight: -2.70,
                bumpinessWeight: -0.30,
                maxHeightWeight: -1.20,
                wellWeight: -0.06,
                rowTransitionWeight: -0.30,
                columnTransitionWeight: -0.25,
                futureWeight: 0.12,
                rightWellWeight: 0.0,
                lookaheadBeam: 2,
                futureSamples: 4,
                timeBudgetMs: 40,
                useTransitions: false,
                preferRightWell: false);
        }

        bool lowDanger = danger < 0.45;
        bool shortRun = piecesRemaining < 180;

        if (lowDanger && shortRun)
        {
            return new Strategy(
                lineWeight: 2.80,
                aggregateHeightWeight: -0.28,
                holeWeight: -2.25,
                bumpinessWeight: -0.24,
                maxHeightWeight: -0.90,
                wellWeight: 0.02,
                rowTransitionWeight: -0.30,
                columnTransitionWeight: -0.25,
                futureWeight: 0.28,
                rightWellWeight: 0.18,
                lookaheadBeam: 6,
                futureSamples: 7,
                timeBudgetMs: 120,
                useTransitions: false,
                preferRightWell: board.Width >= 10);
        }

        return new Strategy(
            lineWeight: 2.20,
            aggregateHeightWeight: -0.35,
            holeWeight: -2.50,
            bumpinessWeight: -0.28,
            maxHeightWeight: -1.05,
            wellWeight: -0.05,
            rowTransitionWeight: -0.45,
            columnTransitionWeight: -0.35,
            futureWeight: 0.18,
            rightWellWeight: 0.08,
            lookaheadBeam: 4,
            futureSamples: 6,
            timeBudgetMs: 80,
            useTransitions: true,
            preferRightWell: board.Width >= 10 && danger < 0.55);
    }
}

public readonly struct Move
{
    public Move(int rotation, int column)
    {
        Rotation = rotation;
        Column = column;
    }

    public int Rotation { get; }
    public int Column { get; }
}

public sealed class Board
{
    public int Width { get; }
    public int Height { get; }
    public int FilledCells { get; }
    public int[] ColumnHeights { get; }
    public int MaxHeight { get; }

    private ulong FullMask { get; }
    private ulong[] Rows { get; }

    public Board(int width, int height)
    {
        Width = Math.Max(1, width);
        Height = Math.Max(1, height);

        if (Width >= 63)
        {
            throw new ArgumentException("Board width must be <= 62 for bitboard representation.");
        }

        FullMask = (1UL << Width) - 1UL;
        Rows = new ulong[Height];
        ColumnHeights = new int[Width];
        FilledCells = 0;
        MaxHeight = 0;
    }

    private Board(int width, int height, ulong fullMask, ulong[] rows, int[] columnHeights, int filledCells)
    {
        Width = width;
        Height = height;
        FullMask = fullMask;
        Rows = rows;
        ColumnHeights = columnHeights;
        FilledCells = filledCells;

        int max = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < columnHeights.Length; i++)
        {
            if (columnHeights[i] > max)
            {
                max = columnHeights[i];
            }
        }

        MaxHeight = max;
    }

    public bool TryPlace(char pieceType, int rotation, int column, out Board next, out int cleared)
    {
        Orientation? orientation = PieceLibrary.GetByRotation(pieceType, rotation);
        if (orientation == null)
        {
            next = this;
            cleared = 0;
            return false;
        }

        return TryPlace(orientation, column, out next, out cleared);
    }

    public bool TryPlace(Orientation orientation, int column, out Board next, out int cleared)
    {
        next = this;
        cleared = 0;

        if (column < 0 || column + orientation.Width > Width)
        {
            return false;
        }

        int landingY = 0;
        for (int lx = 0; lx < orientation.Width; lx++)
        {
            int boardHeight = ColumnHeights[column + lx];
            int y = boardHeight - orientation.BottomOffsets[lx];
            if (y > landingY)
            {
                landingY = y;
            }
        }

        if (landingY + orientation.Height > Height)
        {
            return false;
        }

        ulong[] newRows = (ulong[])Rows.Clone();

        for (int i = 0; i < orientation.Blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            Block b = orientation.Blocks[i];
            int gx = column + b.X;
            int gy = landingY + b.Y;

            if ((uint)gy >= (uint)Height)
            {
                return false;
            }

            ulong bit = 1UL << gx;
            if ((newRows[gy] & bit) != 0)
            {
                return false;
            }

            newRows[gy] |= bit;
        }

        int write = 0;
        for (int read = 0; read < Height; read++)
        {
            if (newRows[read] == FullMask)
            {
                cleared++;
            }
            else
            {
                newRows[write++] = newRows[read];
            }
        }

        while (write < Height)
        {
            newRows[write++] = 0UL;
        }

        int[] heights = RecomputeHeights(newRows);
        int newFilled = FilledCells + 4 - cleared * Width;
        next = new Board(Width, Height, FullMask, newRows, heights, newFilled);
        return true;
    }

    public Metrics ComputeMetrics(bool includeTransitions)
    {
        int aggregateHeight = 0;
        int holes = 0;
        int bumpiness = 0;
        int wells = 0;

        for (int x = 0; x < Width; x++)
        {
            int h = ColumnHeights[x];
            aggregateHeight += h;

            bool seenBlock = false;
            for (int y = Height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
            {
                bool occupied = ((Rows[y] >> x) & 1UL) != 0;
                if (occupied)
                {
                    seenBlock = true;
                }
                else if (seenBlock)
                {
                    holes++;
                }
            }

            if (x + 1 < Width)
            {
                bumpiness += Math.Abs(ColumnHeights[x] - ColumnHeights[x + 1]);
            }

            int left = x == 0 ? Height : ColumnHeights[x - 1];
            int right = x == Width - 1 ? Height : ColumnHeights[x + 1];
            int minNeighbor = Math.Min(left, right);
            if (minNeighbor > h)
            {
                int depth = minNeighbor - h;
                wells += depth * (depth + 1) / 2;
            }
        }

        int rowTransitions = 0;
        int colTransitions = 0;

        if (includeTransitions)
        {
            for (int y = 0; y < Height; y++)
            {
                bool prev = true;
                for (int x = 0; x < Width; x++)
                {
                    bool occupied = ((Rows[y] >> x) & 1UL) != 0;
                    if (occupied != prev)
                    {
                        rowTransitions++;
                    }
                    prev = occupied;
                }
                if (!prev)
                {
                    rowTransitions++;
                }
            }

            for (int x = 0; x < Width; x++)
            {
                bool prev = true;
                for (int y = Height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
                {
                    bool occupied = ((Rows[y] >> x) & 1UL) != 0;
                    if (occupied != prev)
                    {
                        colTransitions++;
                    }
                    prev = occupied;
                }
                if (!prev)
                {
                    colTransitions++;
                }
            }
        }

        return new Metrics(
            aggregateHeight,
            holes,
            bumpiness,
            MaxHeight,
            wells,
            rowTransitions,
            colTransitions);
    }

    private int[] RecomputeHeights(ulong[] rows)
    {
        int[] heights = new int[Width];

        for (int x = 0; x < Width; x++)
        {
            int h = 0;
            for (int y = Height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
            {
                if (((rows[y] >> x) & 1UL) != 0)
                {
                    h = y + 1;
                    break;
                }
            }
            heights[x] = h;
        }

        return heights;
    }
}

public readonly struct Metrics
{
    public Metrics(int aggregateHeight, int holes, int bumpiness, int maxHeight, int wells, int rowTransitions, int columnTransitions)
    {
        AggregateHeight = aggregateHeight;
        Holes = holes;
        Bumpiness = bumpiness;
        MaxHeight = maxHeight;
        Wells = wells;
        RowTransitions = rowTransitions;
        ColumnTransitions = columnTransitions;
    }

    public int AggregateHeight { get; }
    public int Holes { get; }
    public int Bumpiness { get; }
    public int MaxHeight { get; }
    public int Wells { get; }
    public int RowTransitions { get; }
    public int ColumnTransitions { get; }
}

public readonly struct Block
{
    public Block(int x, int y)
    {
        X = x;
        Y = y;
    }

    public int X { get; }
    public int Y { get; }
}

public sealed class Orientation
{
    public Orientation(int rotationIndex, Block[] blocks)
    {
        RotationIndex = rotationIndex;
        Blocks = blocks;

        int maxX = 0;
        int maxY = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            if (blocks[i].X > maxX) maxX = blocks[i].X;
            if (blocks[i].Y > maxY) maxY = blocks[i].Y;
        }

        Width = maxX + 1;
        Height = maxY + 1;
        BottomOffsets = new int[Width];
        for (int i = 0; i < Width; i++)
        {
            BottomOffsets[i] = int.MaxValue;
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            Block b = blocks[i];
            if (b.Y < BottomOffsets[b.X])
            {
                BottomOffsets[b.X] = b.Y;
            }
        }
    }

    public int RotationIndex { get; }
    public Block[] Blocks { get; }
    public int Width { get; }
    public int Height { get; }
    public int[] BottomOffsets { get; }
}

public static class PieceLibrary
{
    private static readonly Dictionary<char, List<Orientation>> All = new Dictionary<char, List<Orientation>>();
    private static readonly Dictionary<char, Dictionary<int, Orientation>> ByRotation = new Dictionary<char, Dictionary<int, Orientation>>();

    static PieceLibrary()
    {
        Add('I', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(3, 0) });
        Add('O', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(0, 1), new Block(1, 1) });
        Add('T', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(1, 1) });
        Add('S', new[] { new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(0, 1), new Block(1, 1) });
        Add('Z', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(1, 1), new Block(2, 1) });
        Add('J', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(0, 1) });
        Add('L', new[] { new Block(0, 0), new Block(1, 0), new Block(2, 0), new Block(2, 1) });
    }

    public static List<Orientation> Get(char piece)
    {
        char key = char.ToUpperInvariant(piece);
        if (!All.TryGetValue(key, out List<Orientation>? value))
        {
            return All['I'];
        }

        return value;
    }

    public static Orientation? GetByRotation(char piece, int rotation)
    {
        char key = char.ToUpperInvariant(piece);
        if (!ByRotation.TryGetValue(key, out Dictionary<int, Orientation>? map))
        {
            return null;
        }

        map.TryGetValue((rotation % 4 + 4) % 4, out Orientation? orientation);
        return orientation;
    }

    private static void Add(char piece, Block[] baseBlocks)
    {
        var list = new List<Orientation>(4);
        var map = new Dictionary<int, Orientation>(4);
        var seen = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.Ordinal);

        Block[] current = (Block[])baseBlocks.Clone();

        for (int rotation = 0; rotation < 4; rotation++)
        {
            Block[] normalized = Normalize(current);
            string sig = Signature(normalized);

            if (seen.Add(sig))
            {
                var orientation = new Orientation(rotation, normalized);
                list.Add(orientation);
                map[rotation] = orientation;
            }

            current = RotateCW(current);
        }

        All[piece] = list;
        ByRotation[piece] = map;
    }

    private static Block[] RotateCW(Block[] blocks)
    {
        Block[] outBlocks = new Block[blocks.Length];
        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            // (x, y) -> (y, -x)
            outBlocks[i] = new Block(blocks[i].Y, -blocks[i].X);
        }
        return outBlocks;
    }

    private static Block[] Normalize(Block[] blocks)
    {
        int minX = int.MaxValue;
        int minY = int.MaxValue;

        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            if (blocks[i].X < minX) minX = blocks[i].X;
            if (blocks[i].Y < minY) minY = blocks[i].Y;
        }

        Block[] normalized = new Block[blocks.Length];
        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            normalized[i] = new Block(blocks[i].X - minX, blocks[i].Y - minY);
        }

        Array.Sort(normalized, (a, b) =>
        {
            int cx = a.X.CompareTo(b.X);
            return cx != 0 ? cx : a.Y.CompareTo(b.Y);
        });

        return normalized;
    }

    private static string Signature(Block[] blocks)
    {
        var chars = new char[blocks.Length * 6];
        int p = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < blocks.Length; i++)
        {
            int x = blocks[i].X;
            int y = blocks[i].Y;

            chars[p++] = (char)('0' + x);
            chars[p++] = ',';
            chars[p++] = (char)('0' + y);
            chars[p++] = ';';
        }

        return new string(chars, 0, p);
    }
}

public sealed class FastScanner
{
    private readonly Stream _stream;
    private readonly byte[] _buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
    private int _len;
    private int _ptr;

    public FastScanner(Stream stream)
    {
        _stream = stream;
    }

    public string NextToken()
    {
        int c;
        do
        {
            c = Read();
            if (c < 0)
            {
                return null;
            }
        } while (c <= 32);

        var chars = new char[32];
        int n = 0;

        while (c > 32)
        {
            if (n == chars.Length)
            {
                Array.Resize(ref chars, chars.Length * 2);
            }

            chars[n++] = (char)c;
            c = Read();
        }

        return new string(chars, 0, n);
    }

    public bool TryNextInt(out int value)
    {
        value = 0;
        string token = NextToken();
        if (token == null)
        {
            return false;
        }

        return int.TryParse(token, out value);
    }

    private int Read()
    {
        if (_ptr >= _len)
        {
            _len = _stream.Read(_buffer, 0, _buffer.Length);
            _ptr = 0;
            if (_len == 0)
            {
                return -1;
            }
        }

        return _buffer[_ptr++];
    }
}
