#include <algorithm>
#include <chrono>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <numeric>
#include <queue>
#include <random>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>
#ifdef _MSC_VER
#include <intrin.h>
#endif

using namespace std;
using Clock = chrono::steady_clock;

struct Graph {
    int n = 0;
    int k = 0;
    long long m = 0;
    vector<int> offset;
    vector<int> adj;
    vector<int> degree;
};

static inline double elapsedSeconds(const Clock::time_point& start) {
    return chrono::duration<double>(Clock::now() - start).count();
}

static inline int firstSetBit64(uint64_t x) {
#ifdef _MSC_VER
#if defined(_M_X64) || defined(_M_ARM64)
    unsigned long idx = 0;
    _BitScanForward64(&idx, x);
    return static_cast<int>(idx);
#else
    unsigned long idx = 0;
    const unsigned int low = static_cast<unsigned int>(x & 0xFFFFFFFFULL);
    if (low != 0U) {
        _BitScanForward(&idx, low);
        return static_cast<int>(idx);
    }
    _BitScanForward(&idx, static_cast<unsigned int>(x >> 32));
    return static_cast<int>(idx) + 32;
#endif
#else
    return __builtin_ctzll(x);
#endif
}

static bool readGraph(Graph& g, bool& hasSelfLoop) {
    int n, k;
    long long mInput;
    if (!(cin >> n >> mInput >> k)) {
        return false;
    }

    if (n < 0) n = 0;
    if (k < 0) k = 0;
    if (mInput < 0) mInput = 0;

    g.n = n;
    g.k = k;
    hasSelfLoop = false;

    vector<pair<int, int>> edges;
    edges.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(mInput));
    g.degree.assign(n, 0);

    for (long long i = 0; i < mInput; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        if (!(cin >> u >> v)) break;
        if (u < 0 || u >= n || v < 0 || v >= n) continue;
        if (u == v) {
            hasSelfLoop = true;
            continue;
        }
        edges.emplace_back(u, v);
        g.degree[u]++;
        g.degree[v]++;
    }

    g.m = static_cast<long long>(edges.size());
    g.offset.assign(n + 1, 0);
    for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
        g.offset[v + 1] = g.offset[v] + g.degree[v];
    }

    g.adj.assign(static_cast<size_t>(g.offset[n]), 0);
    vector<int> cur = g.offset;
    for (const auto& e : edges) {
        const int u = e.first;
        const int v = e.second;
        g.adj[cur[u]++] = v;
        g.adj[cur[v]++] = u;
    }

    return true;
}

static vector<int> largestFirstOrder(const Graph& g) {
    vector<int> order(g.n);
    iota(order.begin(), order.end(), 0);
    sort(order.begin(), order.end(), [&](int a, int b) {
        if (g.degree[a] != g.degree[b]) return g.degree[a] > g.degree[b];
        return a < b;
    });
    return order;
}

static vector<int> smallestLastOrder(const Graph& g) {
    vector<int> curDeg = g.degree;
    vector<char> removed(g.n, 0);
    using Node = pair<int, int>;  // {degree, vertex}
    priority_queue<Node, vector<Node>, greater<Node>> pq;
    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) pq.push({curDeg[v], v});

    vector<int> peel;
    peel.reserve(g.n);

    while (static_cast<int>(peel.size()) < g.n) {
        auto [d, v] = pq.top();
        pq.pop();
        if (removed[v] || d != curDeg[v]) continue;

        removed[v] = 1;
        peel.push_back(v);

        for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            if (removed[u]) continue;
            --curDeg[u];
            pq.push({curDeg[u], u});
        }
    }

    reverse(peel.begin(), peel.end());
    return peel;
}

static vector<int> perturbedOrder(const vector<int>& base, mt19937& rng, int swaps) {
    vector<int> order = base;
    if (order.empty()) return order;
    uniform_int_distribution<int> dist(0, static_cast<int>(order.size() - 1));
    for (int i = 0; i < swaps; ++i) {
        int a = dist(rng);
        int b = dist(rng);
        swap(order[a], order[b]);
    }
    return order;
}

static bool strictGreedyColor(const Graph& g, const vector<int>& order, vector<int>& color) {
    color.assign(g.n, -1);

    if (g.k <= 64) {
        const uint64_t allMask = (g.k == 64) ? ~0ULL : ((1ULL << g.k) - 1ULL);
        for (int v : order) {
            uint64_t forbidden = 0ULL;
            for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
                int u = g.adj[i];
                int cu = color[u];
                if (cu >= 0) forbidden |= (1ULL << cu);
            }
            uint64_t freeMask = allMask & ~forbidden;
            if (freeMask == 0ULL) return false;
            color[v] = firstSetBit64(freeMask);
        }
        return true;
    }

    vector<int> seen(g.k, -1);
    int stamp = 0;
    for (int v : order) {
        ++stamp;
        for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            int cu = color[u];
            if (cu >= 0) seen[cu] = stamp;
        }
        int chosen = -1;
        for (int c = 0; c < g.k; ++c) {
            if (seen[c] != stamp) {
                chosen = c;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (chosen < 0) return false;
        color[v] = chosen;
    }

    return true;
}

static void greedyWithConflicts(const Graph& g, const vector<int>& order, vector<int>& color, mt19937& rng) {
    color.assign(g.n, 0);
    vector<int> cnt(g.k, 0);
    vector<int> touched;
    touched.reserve(64);

    for (int v : order) {
        touched.clear();
        for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            int cu = color[u];
            if (cu < 0 || cu >= g.k) continue;
            if (cnt[cu] == 0) touched.push_back(cu);
            cnt[cu]++;
        }

        int bestColor = 0;
        int bestConf = cnt[0];
        for (int c = 1; c < g.k; ++c) {
            int conf = cnt[c];
            if (conf < bestConf) {
                bestConf = conf;
                bestColor = c;
            }
        }

        if (bestConf > 0) {
            for (int c = 0; c < g.k; ++c) {
                if (cnt[c] == 0) {
                    bestColor = c;
                    bestConf = 0;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (bestConf > 0) {
                vector<int> ties;
                for (int c = 0; c < g.k; ++c) {
                    if (cnt[c] == bestConf) ties.push_back(c);
                }
                if (!ties.empty()) {
                    bestColor = ties[rng() % ties.size()];
                }
            }
        }

        color[v] = bestColor;
        for (int c : touched) cnt[c] = 0;
    }
}

static long long countConflicts(const Graph& g, const vector<int>& color) {
    long long bad = 0;
    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            if (u > v && color[u] == color[v]) ++bad;
        }
    }
    return bad;
}

static bool isProperColoring(const Graph& g, const vector<int>& color) {
    if (static_cast<int>(color.size()) != g.n) return false;
    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        if (color[v] < 0 || color[v] >= g.k) return false;
        for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            if (u > v && color[u] == color[v]) return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}

static void tryUseMoreColors(const Graph& g, vector<int>& color) {
    if (g.k <= 0 || g.n <= 0) return;

    vector<int> freq(g.k, 0);
    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        if (color[v] >= 0 && color[v] < g.k) freq[color[v]]++;
    }

    for (int c = 0; c < g.k; ++c) {
        if (freq[c] != 0) continue;

        bool placed = false;
        for (int v = 0; v < g.n && !placed; ++v) {
            int old = color[v];
            if (old == c) {
                placed = true;
                break;
            }
            if (old < 0 || old >= g.k) continue;
            if (freq[old] <= 1) continue;

            bool ok = true;
            for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
                int u = g.adj[i];
                if (color[u] == c) {
                    ok = false;
                    break;
                }
            }

            if (ok) {
                color[v] = c;
                freq[old]--;
                freq[c]++;
                placed = true;
            }
        }

        if (!placed) {
            for (int v = 0; v < g.n && !placed; ++v) {
                int old = color[v];
                if (old == c || old < 0 || old >= g.k) continue;

                bool ok = true;
                for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
                    int u = g.adj[i];
                    if (color[u] == c) {
                        ok = false;
                        break;
                    }
                }

                if (ok) {
                    color[v] = c;
                    freq[old]--;
                    freq[c]++;
                    placed = true;
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

static bool minConflictsRepair(const Graph& g, vector<int>& color, mt19937& rng,
                               const Clock::time_point& start, double timeLimitSec) {
    vector<int> conflictCount(g.n, 0);
    long long badEdges = 0;

    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            if (u > v && color[u] == color[v]) {
                conflictCount[v]++;
                conflictCount[u]++;
                ++badEdges;
            }
        }
    }

    if (badEdges == 0) return true;

    vector<int> pos(g.n, -1);
    vector<int> conflicted;
    conflicted.reserve(g.n);

    auto addConflicted = [&](int v) {
        if (pos[v] == -1) {
            pos[v] = static_cast<int>(conflicted.size());
            conflicted.push_back(v);
        }
    };

    auto removeConflicted = [&](int v) {
        int p = pos[v];
        if (p == -1) return;
        int last = conflicted.back();
        conflicted[p] = last;
        pos[last] = p;
        conflicted.pop_back();
        pos[v] = -1;
    };

    for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
        if (conflictCount[v] > 0) addConflicted(v);
    }

    vector<int> cnt(g.k, 0);
    vector<int> touched;
    touched.reserve(64);
    uniform_real_distribution<double> prob01(0.0, 1.0);

    long long bestBad = badEdges;
    vector<int> bestColor = color;

    while (badEdges > 0 && elapsedSeconds(start) < timeLimitSec) {
        if (conflicted.empty()) break;

        int v = conflicted[rng() % conflicted.size()];
        int oldColor = color[v];

        touched.clear();
        for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            int cu = color[u];
            if (cnt[cu] == 0) touched.push_back(cu);
            cnt[cu]++;
        }

        int oldConf = cnt[oldColor];
        int minConf = oldConf;
        vector<int> bestChoices;
        bestChoices.push_back(oldColor);

        for (int c = 0; c < g.k; ++c) {
            int conf = cnt[c];
            if (conf < minConf) {
                minConf = conf;
                bestChoices.clear();
                bestChoices.push_back(c);
            } else if (conf == minConf) {
                bestChoices.push_back(c);
            }
        }

        int newColor = oldColor;
        if (minConf < oldConf) {
            newColor = bestChoices[rng() % bestChoices.size()];
        } else if (g.k > 1 && prob01(rng) < 0.08) {
            newColor = static_cast<int>(rng() % g.k);
        }

        for (int c : touched) cnt[c] = 0;

        if (newColor == oldColor) continue;

        for (int i = g.offset[v]; i < g.offset[v + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            if (color[u] == oldColor) {
                --conflictCount[v];
                --conflictCount[u];
                --badEdges;
                if (conflictCount[u] == 0) removeConflicted(u);
            }
            if (color[u] == newColor) {
                ++conflictCount[v];
                ++conflictCount[u];
                ++badEdges;
                if (conflictCount[u] == 1) addConflicted(u);
            }
        }

        color[v] = newColor;
        if (conflictCount[v] == 0) removeConflicted(v);
        else addConflicted(v);

        if (badEdges < bestBad) {
            bestBad = badEdges;
            bestColor = color;
            if (bestBad == 0) return true;
        }
    }

    if (bestBad < badEdges) {
        color = bestColor;
        badEdges = bestBad;
    }

    return badEdges == 0;
}

static bool dsaturBacktracking(const Graph& g, vector<int>& color,
                               const Clock::time_point& start, double timeLimitSec) {
    if (g.k <= 0) return g.n == 0;
    if (g.k > 63) return false;

    vector<uint64_t> satMask(g.n, 0ULL);
    vector<int> satDeg(g.n, 0);
    vector<char> uncolored(g.n, 1);
    color.assign(g.n, -1);

    const uint64_t allMask = (g.k == 64) ? ~0ULL : ((1ULL << g.k) - 1ULL);

    function<bool(int)> dfs = [&](int coloredCount) -> bool {
        if (elapsedSeconds(start) >= timeLimitSec) return false;
        if (coloredCount == g.n) return true;

        int pick = -1;
        int bestSat = -1;
        int bestDeg = -1;

        for (int v = 0; v < g.n; ++v) {
            if (!uncolored[v]) continue;
            if (satDeg[v] > bestSat || (satDeg[v] == bestSat && g.degree[v] > bestDeg)) {
                bestSat = satDeg[v];
                bestDeg = g.degree[v];
                pick = v;
            }
        }

        if (pick < 0) return false;

        uint64_t forbidden = 0ULL;
        for (int i = g.offset[pick]; i < g.offset[pick + 1]; ++i) {
            int u = g.adj[i];
            int cu = color[u];
            if (cu >= 0) forbidden |= (1ULL << cu);
        }
        uint64_t avail = allMask & ~forbidden;
        if (avail == 0ULL) return false;

        while (avail) {
            uint64_t bit = avail & (~avail + 1ULL);
            int c = firstSetBit64(bit);
            avail ^= bit;

            color[pick] = c;
            uncolored[pick] = 0;

            vector<int> changed;
            changed.reserve(g.degree[pick]);

            for (int i = g.offset[pick]; i < g.offset[pick + 1]; ++i) {
                int u = g.adj[i];
                if (!uncolored[u]) continue;
                uint64_t before = satMask[u];
                uint64_t after = before | (1ULL << c);
                if (after != before) {
                    satMask[u] = after;
                    satDeg[u]++;
                    changed.push_back(u);
                }
            }

            bool impossible = false;
            for (int u : changed) {
                if ((satMask[u] & allMask) == allMask) {
                    impossible = true;
                    break;
                }
            }

            if (!impossible && dfs(coloredCount + 1)) return true;

            for (int u : changed) {
                satMask[u] &= ~(1ULL << c);
                satDeg[u]--;
            }

            uncolored[pick] = 1;
            color[pick] = -1;
        }

        return false;
    };

    return dfs(0);
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    Graph g;
    bool hasSelfLoop = false;
    if (!readGraph(g, hasSelfLoop)) return 0;

    if (g.n == 0) {
        cout << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    vector<int> color(g.n, 0);

    if (g.k <= 0 || hasSelfLoop) {
        for (int i = 0; i < g.n; ++i) {
            if (i) cout << ' ';
            cout << 0;
        }
        cout << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    const Clock::time_point start = Clock::now();
    const double hardLimit = 295.0;

    random_device rd;
    mt19937 rng(rd() ^ static_cast<unsigned>(g.n * 911382323u + g.k * 972663749u));

    bool solved = false;

    if (g.n <= 220 && g.k <= 63) {
        solved = dsaturBacktracking(g, color, start, min(8.0, hardLimit));
    }

    vector<int> bestColor = color;
    long long bestBad = numeric_limits<long long>::max();

    auto attempt = [&](const vector<int>& order, double localBudgetSec) {
        vector<int> candidate;

        if (strictGreedyColor(g, order, candidate)) {
            long long bad = countConflicts(g, candidate);
            if (bad < bestBad) {
                bestBad = bad;
                bestColor = candidate;
            }
            if (bad == 0) {
                color = move(candidate);
                solved = true;
                return;
            }
        }

        greedyWithConflicts(g, order, candidate, rng);
        minConflictsRepair(g, candidate, rng, start, min(hardLimit, elapsedSeconds(start) + localBudgetSec));
        long long bad = countConflicts(g, candidate);
        if (bad < bestBad) {
            bestBad = bad;
            bestColor = candidate;
        }
        if (bad == 0) {
            color = move(candidate);
            solved = true;
        }
    };

    if (!solved) {
        vector<int> orderLF = largestFirstOrder(g);
        attempt(orderLF, 40.0);

        if (!solved && g.n <= 250000 && g.m <= 6000000 && elapsedSeconds(start) < 120.0) {
            vector<int> orderSL = smallestLastOrder(g);
            attempt(orderSL, 60.0);
        }

        int tries = (g.n < 200000) ? 6 : 3;
        for (int t = 0; t < tries && !solved; ++t) {
            if (elapsedSeconds(start) >= hardLimit) break;
            int swaps = max(1, g.n / 200);
            swaps = min(swaps, 30000);
            vector<int> p = perturbedOrder(orderLF, rng, swaps);
            double budget = (g.n < 200000) ? 40.0 : 25.0;
            attempt(p, budget);
        }

        if (!solved && bestBad != numeric_limits<long long>::max()) {
            color = bestColor;
            solved = (bestBad == 0);
        }
    }

    if (isProperColoring(g, color)) {
        tryUseMoreColors(g, color);
    } else {
        vector<int> order(g.n);
        iota(order.begin(), order.end(), 0);
        strictGreedyColor(g, order, color);
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < g.n; ++i) {
        if (i) cout << ' ';
        int c = color[i];
        if (c < 0 || c >= g.k) c = 0;
        cout << c;
    }
    cout << '\n';

    return 0;
}

Test 28: Minimum Vertex Cover (Rust) Score: 10.32 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the Minimum Vertex Cover problem.

Your code may see graphs with up to 2M vertices and 15M edges.

**Problem:**
Find the minimum set of vertices such that every edge has at least one endpoint in the set.
This is NP-Hard and requires sophisticated algorithms for larger instances.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges
u v (for each edge, 0-indexed)
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
vertex_count
vertex_1 vertex_2 ... vertex_k (vertices in the cover, space-separated)
```

**Success Criteria:**
- All edges are covered by selected vertices
- Vertex set size is minimized (or near-minimized for large graphs)
- Output format is correct

**Failure Criteria:**
- Not all edges are covered
- Timeout without solution
- Invalid output format

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler:**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Be aware that default warnings are enabled and will cause a compilation failure,
so ensure that you write warning-free code.

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main() function.

 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0

View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Find the smallest set of nodes in a graph such that every edge has at least one endpoint in the set. Imagine placing guards at intersections so that every road is watched by at least one guard — use as few guards as possible.

This is a classic NP-hard problem. The test uses planted instances with a known optimal answer, so grading is strict pass/fail. Subpasses increase the graph size.

 1.0000
[10 vertices, 30 edges] Cover size 7 (optimal: 7), 0.05s

Minimum Vertex Cover - 10 vertices, 30 edges

View Rust Code (8006 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read, Write};

struct FastInput {
    data: Vec<u8>,
    idx: usize,
}

impl FastInput {
    fn new() -> io::Result<Self> {
        let mut data = Vec::new();
        io::stdin().read_to_end(&mut data)?;
        Ok(Self { data, idx: 0 })
    }

    fn next_usize(&mut self) -> Option<usize> {
        while self.idx < self.data.len() && self.data[self.idx].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.idx += 1;
        }
        if self.idx >= self.data.len() {
            return None;
        }

        let mut value: usize = 0;
        let mut found_digit = false;
        while self.idx < self.data.len() {
            let b = self.data[self.idx];
            if !b.is_ascii_digit() {
                break;
            }
            found_digit = true;
            value = value.saturating_mul(10).saturating_add((b - b'0') as usize);
            self.idx += 1;
        }

        if !found_digit {
            None
        } else {
            Some(value)
        }
    }
}

fn build_initial_matching_cover(
    n: usize,
    edges_u: &[u32],
    edges_v: &[u32],
    forced: &[u8],
) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut selected = vec![0u8; n];
    selected.copy_from_slice(forced);

    for i in 0..edges_u.len() {
        let u = edges_u[i] as usize;
        let v = edges_v[i] as usize;

        if u == v {
            selected[u] = 1;
            continue;
        }

        if selected[u] == 0 && selected[v] == 0 {
            selected[u] = 1;
            selected[v] = 1;
        }
    }

    selected
}

fn build_initial_degree_cover(
    n: usize,
    edges_u: &[u32],
    edges_v: &[u32],
    deg: &[u32],
    forced: &[u8],
) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut selected = vec![0u8; n];
    selected.copy_from_slice(forced);

    for i in 0..edges_u.len() {
        let u = edges_u[i] as usize;
        let v = edges_v[i] as usize;

        if u == v {
            selected[u] = 1;
            continue;
        }

        if selected[u] == 0 && selected[v] == 0 {
            if deg[u] >= deg[v] {
                selected[u] = 1;
            } else {
                selected[v] = 1;
            }
        }
    }

    selected
}

fn prune_cover(
    edges_u: &[u32],
    edges_v: &[u32],
    offsets: &[usize],
    adj_edges: &[u32],
    selected: &mut [u8],
) -> usize {
    let n = selected.len();
    let m = edges_u.len();

    let mut selected_count = selected.iter().map(|&x| x as usize).sum::<usize>();
    let mut edge_cov = vec![0u8; m];
    let mut unique = vec![0u32; n];

    for i in 0..m {
        let u = edges_u[i] as usize;
        let v = edges_v[i] as usize;

        let cov = if u == v {
            selected[u]
        } else {
            selected[u] + selected[v]
        };
        edge_cov[i] = cov;

        if cov == 1 {
            if u == v {
                unique[u] = unique[u].saturating_add(1);
            } else if selected[u] == 1 {
                unique[u] = unique[u].saturating_add(1);
            } else {
                unique[v] = unique[v].saturating_add(1);
            }
        }
    }

    let mut stack = Vec::new();
    for v in 0..n {
        if selected[v] == 1 && unique[v] == 0 {
            stack.push(v);
        }
    }

    while let Some(v) = stack.pop() {
        if selected[v] == 0 || unique[v] != 0 {
            continue;
        }

        selected[v] = 0;
        selected_count -= 1;

        let start = offsets[v];
        let end = offsets[v + 1];
        for idx in start..end {
            let e = adj_edges[idx] as usize;

            if edge_cov[e] == 2 {
                edge_cov[e] = 1;

                let a = edges_u[e] as usize;
                let b = edges_v[e] as usize;
                let other = if a == v { b } else { a };
                if selected[other] == 1 {
                    unique[other] = unique[other].saturating_add(1);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    selected_count
}

fn is_valid_cover(edges_u: &[u32], edges_v: &[u32], selected: &[u8]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..edges_u.len() {
        let u = edges_u[i] as usize;
        let v = edges_v[i] as usize;
        if selected[u] == 0 && selected[v] == 0 {
            return false;
        }
    }
    true
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = match FastInput::new() {
        Ok(v) => v,
        Err(_) => return,
    };

    let n = match input.next_usize() {
        Some(v) => v,
        None => {
            let stdout = io::stdout();
            let mut out = io::BufWriter::new(stdout.lock());
            if writeln!(out, "0").is_err() {
                return;
            }
            let _ = writeln!(out);
            return;
        }
    };

    let m_input = match input.next_usize() {
        Some(v) => v,
        None => {
            let stdout = io::stdout();
            let mut out = io::BufWriter::new(stdout.lock());
            if writeln!(out, "0").is_err() {
                return;
            }
            let _ = writeln!(out);
            return;
        }
    };

    let mut edges_u: Vec<u32> = Vec::with_capacity(m_input);
    let mut edges_v: Vec<u32> = Vec::with_capacity(m_input);
    let mut deg = vec![0u32; n];
    let mut forced = vec![0u8; n];

    for _ in 0..m_input {
        let u_opt = input.next_usize();
        let v_opt = input.next_usize();

        let (u, v) = match (u_opt, v_opt) {
            (Some(uu), Some(vv)) => (uu, vv),
            _ => break,
        };

        if u >= n || v >= n {
            continue;
        }

        edges_u.push(u as u32);
        edges_v.push(v as u32);

        if u == v {
            forced[u] = 1;
            deg[u] = deg[u].saturating_add(1);
        } else {
            deg[u] = deg[u].saturating_add(1);
            deg[v] = deg[v].saturating_add(1);
        }
    }

    let m = edges_u.len();

    if m == 0 {
        let stdout = io::stdout();
        let mut out = io::BufWriter::new(stdout.lock());
        if writeln!(out, "0").is_err() {
            return;
        }
        let _ = writeln!(out);
        return;
    }

    let mut offsets = vec![0usize; n + 1];
    for v in 0..n {
        offsets[v + 1] = offsets[v] + deg[v] as usize;
    }

    let mut adj_edges = vec![0u32; offsets[n]];
    let mut cursor = offsets[..n].to_vec();

    for e in 0..m {
        let u = edges_u[e] as usize;
        let v = edges_v[e] as usize;

        let cu = cursor[u];
        adj_edges[cu] = e as u32;
        cursor[u] += 1;

        if u != v {
            let cv = cursor[v];
            adj_edges[cv] = e as u32;
            cursor[v] += 1;
        }
    }

    let mut cover_match = build_initial_matching_cover(n, &edges_u, &edges_v, &forced);
    let size_match = prune_cover(&edges_u, &edges_v, &offsets, &adj_edges, &mut cover_match);
    let valid_match = is_valid_cover(&edges_u, &edges_v, &cover_match);

    let mut cover_degree = build_initial_degree_cover(n, &edges_u, &edges_v, &deg, &forced);
    let size_degree = prune_cover(&edges_u, &edges_v, &offsets, &adj_edges, &mut cover_degree);
    let valid_degree = is_valid_cover(&edges_u, &edges_v, &cover_degree);

    let final_cover = if valid_match {
        if valid_degree && size_degree < size_match {
            cover_degree
        } else {
            cover_match
        }
    } else if valid_degree {
        cover_degree
    } else {
        vec![1u8; n]
    };

    let final_size = final_cover.iter().map(|&x| x as usize).sum::<usize>();

    let stdout = io::stdout();
    let mut out = io::BufWriter::new(stdout.lock());

    if writeln!(out, "{}", final_size).is_err() {
        return;
    }

    if final_size > 0 {
        let mut first = true;
        for (v, &pick) in final_cover.iter().enumerate() {
            if pick == 1 {
                if !first && write!(out, " ").is_err() {
                    return;
                }
                if write!(out, "{}", v).is_err() {
                    return;
                }
                first = false;
            }
        }
    }

    let _ = writeln!(out);
}

Test 29: Maximum Clique (C#) Score: 18.00 / 18
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C# code to solve the Maximum Clique problem, which is NP Hard.

Your C# maximum clique finder will be tested with graphs ranging from sparse to very dense instances.
The same algorithm must work efficiently across ALL graph complexities, from 20 vertices to 1 million.

**Problem:**
Find the largest complete subgraph (clique) in an undirected graph.
A clique is a set of vertices where every pair of vertices is connected by an edge.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges
u v (for each edge, 0-indexed)
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
clique_size
vertex_1 vertex_2 ... vertex_k (vertices in the maximum clique, space-separated)
```

**Success Criteria:**
- All vertices in output form a complete subgraph
- No larger clique exists in the graph
- Output format is correct

**Failure Criteria:**
- Output vertices don't form a clique
- Larger clique exists
- Timeout without solution
- Invalid output format

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable graph sizes and densities
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Must handle varying graph complexities efficiently

Hints:
- You may wish to drop to a hueristic if time is running out for partial score.
- Use threads to process in parallel.

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14

Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Find the largest group of nodes in a graph where every pair is directly connected. Think of finding the biggest circle of friends where everyone knows everyone else — no strangers allowed.

This is one of the hardest problems in computer science (NP-hard). The test uses planted instances with a known answer for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the graph size and density.

 1.0000
[20 vertices, dense] Answered Clique size 18 (true: 18), 0.19s

Maximum Clique - 20 vertices, dense

View C# Code (21872 chars)
using System;
using System.Buffers;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public static class Program
{
    private const int MaxHeuristicSeeds = 96;
    private const int ExactKernelLimit = 2200;
    private static readonly TimeSpan TotalTimeLimit = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(4.9);

    public static void Main()
    {
        var stopwatch = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        var scanner = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());

        if (!scanner.TryReadInt(out int n) || !scanner.TryReadInt(out int mInput))
        {
            return;
        }

        if (n <= 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine(0);
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        if (mInput < 0)
        {
            mInput = 0;
        }

        int[] inputDegrees = new int[n];
        int[] us = new int[mInput];
        int[] vs = new int[mInput];
        int m = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < mInput; i++)
        {
            if (!scanner.TryReadInt(out int u) || !scanner.TryReadInt(out int v))
            {
                break;
            }

            if ((uint)u >= (uint)n || (uint)v >= (uint)n || u == v)
            {
                continue;
            }

            us[m] = u;
            vs[m] = v;
            m++;
            inputDegrees[u]++;
            inputDegrees[v]++;
        }

        Graph graph = Graph.Build(n, m, us, vs, inputDegrees);

        int[] core;
        int maxCore = ComputeCoreNumbers(graph, out core);
        int upperBound = maxCore + 1;

        int[] degreeOrder = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            degreeOrder[i] = i;
        }

        Array.Sort(degreeOrder, (a, b) =>
        {
            int cmp = graph.Degree[b].CompareTo(graph.Degree[a]);
            return cmp != 0 ? cmp : a.CompareTo(b);
        });

        int[] bestClique = GreedyFromOrder(graph, degreeOrder);
        if (bestClique.Length == 0)
        {
            bestClique = new[] { degreeOrder[0] };
        }

        RunSeedHeuristicsParallel(graph, degreeOrder, stopwatch, TotalTimeLimit, ref bestClique);

        int bestSize = bestClique.Length;

        if (bestSize < upperBound && stopwatch.Elapsed < TotalTimeLimit)
        {
            int[] kernel = BuildKernelForLargerCliques(graph, bestSize);

            if (kernel.Length > 0 && kernel.Length <= ExactKernelLimit && stopwatch.Elapsed < TotalTimeLimit - TimeSpan.FromSeconds(2))
            {
                BuildKernelBitsetGraph(graph, kernel, out ulong[] bitAdj, out int[] kernelDegree);
                int[] mappedInitialClique = MapCliqueToKernel(bestClique, kernel, graph.N);

                var exact = new ExactCliqueSolver(kernel.Length, bitAdj, kernelDegree, mappedInitialClique, stopwatch, TotalTimeLimit);
                exact.Solve();

                if (exact.BestSize > bestSize)
                {
                    int[] mappedBest = exact.GetBestClique();
                    int[] lifted = new int[mappedBest.Length];
                    for (int i = 0; i < mappedBest.Length; i++)
                    {
                        lifted[i] = kernel[mappedBest[i]];
                    }

                    bestClique = lifted;
                    bestSize = bestClique.Length;
                }
            }
        }

        Array.Sort(bestClique);
        Console.WriteLine(bestClique.Length);
        Console.WriteLine(bestClique.Length == 0 ? string.Empty : string.Join(" ", bestClique));
    }

    private static int[] GreedyFromOrder(Graph g, int[] order)
    {
        var clique = new List<int>(Math.Min(64, g.N));

        for (int i = 0; i < order.Length; i++)
        {
            int v = order[i];
            bool ok = true;

            for (int j = 0; j < clique.Count; j++)
            {
                if (!g.IsAdjacent(v, clique[j]))
                {
                    ok = false;
                    break;
                }
            }

            if (ok)
            {
                clique.Add(v);
            }
        }

        return clique.ToArray();
    }

    private static void RunSeedHeuristicsParallel(Graph g, int[] degreeOrder, Stopwatch stopwatch, TimeSpan limit, ref int[] bestClique)
    {
        int seedCount = Math.Min(MaxHeuristicSeeds, g.N);
        if (seedCount <= 0)
        {
            return;
        }

        int[] seeds = new int[seedCount];
        Array.Copy(degreeOrder, seeds, seedCount);

        object bestLock = new object();
        int[] currentBest = bestClique;

        var markArrays = new ThreadLocal<int[]>(() => new int[g.N]);
        var stampValues = new ThreadLocal<int>(() => 1);

        Parallel.For(0, seedCount, new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = Environment.ProcessorCount }, sidx =>
        {
            if (stopwatch.Elapsed >= limit)
            {
                return;
            }

            int seed = seeds[sidx];
            int[] marks = markArrays.Value!;
            int stamp = stampValues.Value;

            int[] clique = GreedyFromSeed(g, seed, marks, ref stamp);
            stampValues.Value = stamp;

            lock (bestLock)
            {
                if (clique.Length > currentBest.Length)
                {
                    currentBest = clique;
                }
            }
        });

        bestClique = currentBest;
    }

    private static int[] GreedyFromSeed(Graph g, int seed, int[] marks, ref int stamp)
    {
        var clique = new List<int>(32) { seed };

        int start = g.Offset[seed];
        int end = g.Offset[seed + 1];
        int candCount = end - start;
        if (candCount <= 0)
        {
            return clique.ToArray();
        }

        int[] candidates = new int[candCount];
        Array.Copy(g.Adj, start, candidates, 0, candCount);

        while (candCount > 0)
        {
            int bestIdx = 0;
            int bestScore = -1;

            for (int i = 0; i < candCount; i++)
            {
                int v = candidates[i];
                int score = g.Degree[v];
                if (score > bestScore)
                {
                    bestScore = score;
                    bestIdx = i;
                }
            }

            int chosen = candidates[bestIdx];
            clique.Add(chosen);

            stamp++;
            if (stamp == int.MaxValue)
            {
                Array.Clear(marks, 0, marks.Length);
                stamp = 1;
            }

            int nStart = g.Offset[chosen];
            int nEnd = g.Offset[chosen + 1];
            for (int p = nStart; p < nEnd; p++)
            {
                marks[g.Adj[p]] = stamp;
            }

            int nextCount = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < candCount; i++)
            {
                int v = candidates[i];
                if (v != chosen && marks[v] == stamp)
                {
                    candidates[nextCount++] = v;
                }
            }

            candCount = nextCount;
        }

        return clique.ToArray();
    }

    private static int[] BuildKernelForLargerCliques(Graph g, int currentBestSize)
    {
        int threshold = currentBestSize;
        if (threshold <= 0)
        {
            int[] all = new int[g.N];
            for (int i = 0; i < g.N; i++) all[i] = i;
            return all;
        }

        int n = g.N;
        int[] degree = new int[n];
        Array.Copy(g.Degree, degree, n);
        bool[] active = new bool[n];
        Array.Fill(active, true);

        var q = new Queue<int>();
        for (int v = 0; v < n; v++)
        {
            if (degree[v] < threshold)
            {
                active[v] = false;
                q.Enqueue(v);
            }
        }

        while (q.Count > 0)
        {
            int v = q.Dequeue();
            int start = g.Offset[v];
            int end = g.Offset[v + 1];

            for (int p = start; p < end; p++)
            {
                int u = g.Adj[p];
                if (!active[u]) continue;

                degree[u]--;
                if (degree[u] < threshold)
                {
                    active[u] = false;
                    q.Enqueue(u);
                }
            }
        }

        int count = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            if (active[i]) count++;
        }

        int[] kernel = new int[count];
        int idx = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            if (active[i]) kernel[idx++] = i;
        }

        return kernel;
    }

    private static void BuildKernelBitsetGraph(Graph g, int[] kernel, out ulong[] bitAdj, out int[] kernelDegree)
    {
        int k = kernel.Length;
        int words = (k + 63) >> 6;

        bitAdj = new ulong[k * words];
        kernelDegree = new int[k];

        int[] map = new int[g.N];
        Array.Fill(map, -1);
        for (int i = 0; i < k; i++)
        {
            map[kernel[i]] = i;
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < k; i++)
        {
            int old = kernel[i];
            int row = i * words;
            int start = g.Offset[old];
            int end = g.Offset[old + 1];
            int deg = 0;

            for (int p = start; p < end; p++)
            {
                int mapped = map[g.Adj[p]];
                if (mapped >= 0 && mapped != i)
                {
                    bitAdj[row + (mapped >> 6)] |= 1UL << (mapped & 63);
                    deg++;
                }
            }

            kernelDegree[i] = deg;
        }
    }

    private static int[] MapCliqueToKernel(int[] clique, int[] kernel, int originalN)
    {
        int[] map = new int[originalN];
        Array.Fill(map, -1);
        for (int i = 0; i < kernel.Length; i++)
        {
            map[kernel[i]] = i;
        }

        var mapped = new List<int>(clique.Length);
        for (int i = 0; i < clique.Length; i++)
        {
            int m = map[clique[i]];
            if (m >= 0)
            {
                mapped.Add(m);
            }
        }

        return mapped.ToArray();
    }

    private static int ComputeCoreNumbers(Graph g, out int[] core)
    {
        int n = g.N;
        int[] deg = new int[n];
        Array.Copy(g.Degree, deg, n);

        int maxDeg = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            if (deg[i] > maxDeg) maxDeg = deg[i];
        }

        int[] bin = new int[maxDeg + 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            bin[deg[i]]++;
        }

        int start = 0;
        for (int d = 0; d <= maxDeg; d++)
        {
            int num = bin[d];
            bin[d] = start;
            start += num;
        }

        int[] vert = new int[n];
        int[] pos = new int[n];

        for (int v = 0; v < n; v++)
        {
            int d = deg[v];
            int p = bin[d]++;
            pos[v] = p;
            vert[p] = v;
        }

        for (int d = maxDeg; d >= 1; d--)
        {
            bin[d] = bin[d - 1];
        }
        bin[0] = 0;

        int maxCore = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            int v = vert[i];
            int dv = deg[v];
            if (dv > maxCore) maxCore = dv;

            int s = g.Offset[v];
            int e = g.Offset[v + 1];
            for (int p = s; p < e; p++)
            {
                int u = g.Adj[p];
                if (deg[u] > dv)
                {
                    int du = deg[u];
                    int pu = pos[u];
                    int pw = bin[du];
                    int w = vert[pw];

                    if (u != w)
                    {
                        vert[pu] = w;
                        vert[pw] = u;
                        pos[u] = pw;
                        pos[w] = pu;
                    }

                    bin[du]++;
                    deg[u]--;
                }
            }
        }

        core = deg;
        return maxCore;
    }

    private sealed class Graph
    {
        public int N { get; }
        public int[] Offset { get; }
        public int[] Adj { get; }
        public int[] Degree { get; }

        private Graph(int n, int[] offset, int[] adj, int[] degree)
        {
            N = n;
            Offset = offset;
            Adj = adj;
            Degree = degree;
        }

        public static Graph Build(int n, int m, int[] us, int[] vs, int[] degree)
        {
            int[] offset = new int[n + 1];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                offset[i + 1] = offset[i] + degree[i];
            }

            int[] adj = new int[offset[n]];
            int[] cursor = new int[n];
            Array.Copy(offset, cursor, n);

            for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
            {
                int u = us[i];
                int v = vs[i];
                adj[cursor[u]++] = v;
                adj[cursor[v]++] = u;
            }

            if (n >= 10000)
            {
                Parallel.For(0, n, i =>
                {
                    int s = offset[i];
                    int len = offset[i + 1] - s;
                    if (len > 1)
                    {
                        Array.Sort(adj, s, len);
                    }
                });
            }
            else
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                {
                    int s = offset[i];
                    int len = offset[i + 1] - s;
                    if (len > 1)
                    {
                        Array.Sort(adj, s, len);
                    }
                }
            }

            return new Graph(n, offset, adj, degree);
        }

        public bool IsAdjacent(int u, int v)
        {
            int su = Offset[u];
            int eu = Offset[u + 1];
            int sv = Offset[v];
            int ev = Offset[v + 1];

            if (eu - su > ev - sv)
            {
                int t = u; u = v; v = t;
                su = Offset[u];
                eu = Offset[u + 1];
            }

            int lo = su;
            int hi = eu - 1;
            while (lo <= hi)
            {
                int mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
                int x = Adj[mid];
                if (x == v) return true;
                if (x < v) lo = mid + 1;
                else hi = mid - 1;
            }

            return false;
        }
    }

    private sealed class ExactCliqueSolver
    {
        private readonly int n;
        private readonly int words;
        private readonly ulong[] adj;
        private readonly int[] degree;
        private readonly Stopwatch stopwatch;
        private readonly long deadlineTicks;

        private bool timedOut;
        private long nodes;
        private int bestSize;
        private int[] bestClique;
        private readonly int[] cliqueStack;

        public bool TimedOut => timedOut;
        public int BestSize => bestSize;

        public ExactCliqueSolver(int n, ulong[] adj, int[] degree, int[] initialClique, Stopwatch stopwatch, TimeSpan totalLimit)
        {
            this.n = n;
            this.adj = adj;
            this.degree = degree;
            this.words = (n + 63) >> 6;
            this.stopwatch = stopwatch;
            deadlineTicks = (long)(totalLimit.TotalSeconds * Stopwatch.Frequency);

            bestSize = initialClique.Length;
            bestClique = new int[Math.Max(1, n)];
            for (int i = 0; i < initialClique.Length; i++)
            {
                bestClique[i] = initialClique[i];
            }

            cliqueStack = new int[Math.Max(1, n)];
        }

        public int[] GetBestClique()
        {
            int[] outClique = new int[bestSize];
            Array.Copy(bestClique, outClique, bestSize);
            return outClique;
        }

        public void Solve()
        {
            int[] candidates = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                candidates[i] = i;
            }

            Array.Sort(candidates, (a, b) =>
            {
                int cmp = degree[b].CompareTo(degree[a]);
                return cmp != 0 ? cmp : a.CompareTo(b);
            });

            Expand(candidates, n, 0);
        }

        private void Expand(int[] candidates, int count, int depth)
        {
            if (timedOut)
            {
                return;
            }

            if (count == 0)
            {
                if (depth > bestSize)
                {
                    bestSize = depth;
                    Array.Copy(cliqueStack, bestClique, depth);
                }
                return;
            }

            if ((++nodes & 2047) == 0 && stopwatch.ElapsedTicks >= deadlineTicks)
            {
                timedOut = true;
                return;
            }

            int[] ordered = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            int[] bounds = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            try
            {
                ColorSort(candidates, count, ordered, bounds);

                for (int i = count - 1; i >= 0; i--)
                {
                    if (depth + bounds[i] <= bestSize)
                    {
                        break;
                    }

                    int v = ordered[i];
                    cliqueStack[depth] = v;

                    int[] next = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(i == 0 ? 1 : i);
                    int nextCount = 0;
                    for (int j = 0; j < i; j++)
                    {
                        int u = ordered[j];
                        if (HasEdge(v, u))
                        {
                            next[nextCount++] = u;
                        }
                    }

                    if (nextCount == 0)
                    {
                        int newSize = depth + 1;
                        if (newSize > bestSize)
                        {
                            bestSize = newSize;
                            Array.Copy(cliqueStack, bestClique, newSize);
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        Expand(next, nextCount, depth + 1);
                    }

                    ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(next);

                    if (timedOut)
                    {
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(ordered);
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(bounds);
            }
        }

        private void ColorSort(int[] candidates, int count, int[] ordered, int[] bounds)
        {
            int[] rem = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            int[] colorClass = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            try
            {
                Array.Copy(candidates, rem, count);
                int remCount = count;
                int outIdx = 0;
                int color = 0;

                while (remCount > 0)
                {
                    color++;
                    int classCount = 0;

                    for (int i = 0; i < remCount; i++)
                    {
                        int v = rem[i];
                        bool ok = true;
                        for (int j = 0; j < classCount; j++)
                        {
                            if (HasEdge(v, colorClass[j]))
                            {
                                ok = false;
                                break;
                            }
                        }

                        if (ok)
                        {
                            colorClass[classCount++] = v;
                            ordered[outIdx] = v;
                            bounds[outIdx] = color;
                            outIdx++;

                            rem[i] = rem[remCount - 1];
                            remCount--;
                            i--;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(rem);
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(colorClass);
            }
        }

        private bool HasEdge(int a, int b)
        {
            int idx = a * words + (b >> 6);
            ulong mask = 1UL << (b & 63);
            return (adj[idx] & mask) != 0;
        }
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream stream;
        private readonly byte[] buffer;
        private int length;
        private int ptr;

        public FastScanner(Stream stream)
        {
            this.stream = stream;
            buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
        }

        public bool TryReadInt(out int value)
        {
            value = 0;
            int c;

            do
            {
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1) return false;
            }
            while (c <= 32);

            int sign = 1;
            if (c == '-')
            {
                sign = -1;
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1)
                {
                    value = 0;
                    return true;
                }
            }

            int x = 0;
            while (c > 32)
            {
                x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1) break;
            }

            value = x * sign;
            return true;
        }

        private int Read()
        {
            if (ptr >= length)
            {
                length = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length);
                ptr = 0;
                if (length == 0)
                {
                    return -1;
                }
            }

            return buffer[ptr++];
        }
    }
}
Subpass 1
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought
 1.0000
[40 vertices, medium density] Answered Clique size 30 (true: 30), 0.08s

Maximum Clique - 40 vertices, medium density

View C# Code (21872 chars)
using System;
using System.Buffers;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public static class Program
{
    private const int MaxHeuristicSeeds = 96;
    private const int ExactKernelLimit = 2200;
    private static readonly TimeSpan TotalTimeLimit = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(4.9);

    public static void Main()
    {
        var stopwatch = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        var scanner = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());

        if (!scanner.TryReadInt(out int n) || !scanner.TryReadInt(out int mInput))
        {
            return;
        }

        if (n <= 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine(0);
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        if (mInput < 0)
        {
            mInput = 0;
        }

        int[] inputDegrees = new int[n];
        int[] us = new int[mInput];
        int[] vs = new int[mInput];
        int m = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < mInput; i++)
        {
            if (!scanner.TryReadInt(out int u) || !scanner.TryReadInt(out int v))
            {
                break;
            }

            if ((uint)u >= (uint)n || (uint)v >= (uint)n || u == v)
            {
                continue;
            }

            us[m] = u;
            vs[m] = v;
            m++;
            inputDegrees[u]++;
            inputDegrees[v]++;
        }

        Graph graph = Graph.Build(n, m, us, vs, inputDegrees);

        int[] core;
        int maxCore = ComputeCoreNumbers(graph, out core);
        int upperBound = maxCore + 1;

        int[] degreeOrder = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            degreeOrder[i] = i;
        }

        Array.Sort(degreeOrder, (a, b) =>
        {
            int cmp = graph.Degree[b].CompareTo(graph.Degree[a]);
            return cmp != 0 ? cmp : a.CompareTo(b);
        });

        int[] bestClique = GreedyFromOrder(graph, degreeOrder);
        if (bestClique.Length == 0)
        {
            bestClique = new[] { degreeOrder[0] };
        }

        RunSeedHeuristicsParallel(graph, degreeOrder, stopwatch, TotalTimeLimit, ref bestClique);

        int bestSize = bestClique.Length;

        if (bestSize < upperBound && stopwatch.Elapsed < TotalTimeLimit)
        {
            int[] kernel = BuildKernelForLargerCliques(graph, bestSize);

            if (kernel.Length > 0 && kernel.Length <= ExactKernelLimit && stopwatch.Elapsed < TotalTimeLimit - TimeSpan.FromSeconds(2))
            {
                BuildKernelBitsetGraph(graph, kernel, out ulong[] bitAdj, out int[] kernelDegree);
                int[] mappedInitialClique = MapCliqueToKernel(bestClique, kernel, graph.N);

                var exact = new ExactCliqueSolver(kernel.Length, bitAdj, kernelDegree, mappedInitialClique, stopwatch, TotalTimeLimit);
                exact.Solve();

                if (exact.BestSize > bestSize)
                {
                    int[] mappedBest = exact.GetBestClique();
                    int[] lifted = new int[mappedBest.Length];
                    for (int i = 0; i < mappedBest.Length; i++)
                    {
                        lifted[i] = kernel[mappedBest[i]];
                    }

                    bestClique = lifted;
                    bestSize = bestClique.Length;
                }
            }
        }

        Array.Sort(bestClique);
        Console.WriteLine(bestClique.Length);
        Console.WriteLine(bestClique.Length == 0 ? string.Empty : string.Join(" ", bestClique));
    }

    private static int[] GreedyFromOrder(Graph g, int[] order)
    {
        var clique = new List<int>(Math.Min(64, g.N));

        for (int i = 0; i < order.Length; i++)
        {
            int v = order[i];
            bool ok = true;

            for (int j = 0; j < clique.Count; j++)
            {
                if (!g.IsAdjacent(v, clique[j]))
                {
                    ok = false;
                    break;
                }
            }

            if (ok)
            {
                clique.Add(v);
            }
        }

        return clique.ToArray();
    }

    private static void RunSeedHeuristicsParallel(Graph g, int[] degreeOrder, Stopwatch stopwatch, TimeSpan limit, ref int[] bestClique)
    {
        int seedCount = Math.Min(MaxHeuristicSeeds, g.N);
        if (seedCount <= 0)
        {
            return;
        }

        int[] seeds = new int[seedCount];
        Array.Copy(degreeOrder, seeds, seedCount);

        object bestLock = new object();
        int[] currentBest = bestClique;

        var markArrays = new ThreadLocal<int[]>(() => new int[g.N]);
        var stampValues = new ThreadLocal<int>(() => 1);

        Parallel.For(0, seedCount, new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = Environment.ProcessorCount }, sidx =>
        {
            if (stopwatch.Elapsed >= limit)
            {
                return;
            }

            int seed = seeds[sidx];
            int[] marks = markArrays.Value!;
            int stamp = stampValues.Value;

            int[] clique = GreedyFromSeed(g, seed, marks, ref stamp);
            stampValues.Value = stamp;

            lock (bestLock)
            {
                if (clique.Length > currentBest.Length)
                {
                    currentBest = clique;
                }
            }
        });

        bestClique = currentBest;
    }

    private static int[] GreedyFromSeed(Graph g, int seed, int[] marks, ref int stamp)
    {
        var clique = new List<int>(32) { seed };

        int start = g.Offset[seed];
        int end = g.Offset[seed + 1];
        int candCount = end - start;
        if (candCount <= 0)
        {
            return clique.ToArray();
        }

        int[] candidates = new int[candCount];
        Array.Copy(g.Adj, start, candidates, 0, candCount);

        while (candCount > 0)
        {
            int bestIdx = 0;
            int bestScore = -1;

            for (int i = 0; i < candCount; i++)
            {
                int v = candidates[i];
                int score = g.Degree[v];
                if (score > bestScore)
                {
                    bestScore = score;
                    bestIdx = i;
                }
            }

            int chosen = candidates[bestIdx];
            clique.Add(chosen);

            stamp++;
            if (stamp == int.MaxValue)
            {
                Array.Clear(marks, 0, marks.Length);
                stamp = 1;
            }

            int nStart = g.Offset[chosen];
            int nEnd = g.Offset[chosen + 1];
            for (int p = nStart; p < nEnd; p++)
            {
                marks[g.Adj[p]] = stamp;
            }

            int nextCount = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < candCount; i++)
            {
                int v = candidates[i];
                if (v != chosen && marks[v] == stamp)
                {
                    candidates[nextCount++] = v;
                }
            }

            candCount = nextCount;
        }

        return clique.ToArray();
    }

    private static int[] BuildKernelForLargerCliques(Graph g, int currentBestSize)
    {
        int threshold = currentBestSize;
        if (threshold <= 0)
        {
            int[] all = new int[g.N];
            for (int i = 0; i < g.N; i++) all[i] = i;
            return all;
        }

        int n = g.N;
        int[] degree = new int[n];
        Array.Copy(g.Degree, degree, n);
        bool[] active = new bool[n];
        Array.Fill(active, true);

        var q = new Queue<int>();
        for (int v = 0; v < n; v++)
        {
            if (degree[v] < threshold)
            {
                active[v] = false;
                q.Enqueue(v);
            }
        }

        while (q.Count > 0)
        {
            int v = q.Dequeue();
            int start = g.Offset[v];
            int end = g.Offset[v + 1];

            for (int p = start; p < end; p++)
            {
                int u = g.Adj[p];
                if (!active[u]) continue;

                degree[u]--;
                if (degree[u] < threshold)
                {
                    active[u] = false;
                    q.Enqueue(u);
                }
            }
        }

        int count = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            if (active[i]) count++;
        }

        int[] kernel = new int[count];
        int idx = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            if (active[i]) kernel[idx++] = i;
        }

        return kernel;
    }

    private static void BuildKernelBitsetGraph(Graph g, int[] kernel, out ulong[] bitAdj, out int[] kernelDegree)
    {
        int k = kernel.Length;
        int words = (k + 63) >> 6;

        bitAdj = new ulong[k * words];
        kernelDegree = new int[k];

        int[] map = new int[g.N];
        Array.Fill(map, -1);
        for (int i = 0; i < k; i++)
        {
            map[kernel[i]] = i;
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < k; i++)
        {
            int old = kernel[i];
            int row = i * words;
            int start = g.Offset[old];
            int end = g.Offset[old + 1];
            int deg = 0;

            for (int p = start; p < end; p++)
            {
                int mapped = map[g.Adj[p]];
                if (mapped >= 0 && mapped != i)
                {
                    bitAdj[row + (mapped >> 6)] |= 1UL << (mapped & 63);
                    deg++;
                }
            }

            kernelDegree[i] = deg;
        }
    }

    private static int[] MapCliqueToKernel(int[] clique, int[] kernel, int originalN)
    {
        int[] map = new int[originalN];
        Array.Fill(map, -1);
        for (int i = 0; i < kernel.Length; i++)
        {
            map[kernel[i]] = i;
        }

        var mapped = new List<int>(clique.Length);
        for (int i = 0; i < clique.Length; i++)
        {
            int m = map[clique[i]];
            if (m >= 0)
            {
                mapped.Add(m);
            }
        }

        return mapped.ToArray();
    }

    private static int ComputeCoreNumbers(Graph g, out int[] core)
    {
        int n = g.N;
        int[] deg = new int[n];
        Array.Copy(g.Degree, deg, n);

        int maxDeg = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            if (deg[i] > maxDeg) maxDeg = deg[i];
        }

        int[] bin = new int[maxDeg + 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            bin[deg[i]]++;
        }

        int start = 0;
        for (int d = 0; d <= maxDeg; d++)
        {
            int num = bin[d];
            bin[d] = start;
            start += num;
        }

        int[] vert = new int[n];
        int[] pos = new int[n];

        for (int v = 0; v < n; v++)
        {
            int d = deg[v];
            int p = bin[d]++;
            pos[v] = p;
            vert[p] = v;
        }

        for (int d = maxDeg; d >= 1; d--)
        {
            bin[d] = bin[d - 1];
        }
        bin[0] = 0;

        int maxCore = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            int v = vert[i];
            int dv = deg[v];
            if (dv > maxCore) maxCore = dv;

            int s = g.Offset[v];
            int e = g.Offset[v + 1];
            for (int p = s; p < e; p++)
            {
                int u = g.Adj[p];
                if (deg[u] > dv)
                {
                    int du = deg[u];
                    int pu = pos[u];
                    int pw = bin[du];
                    int w = vert[pw];

                    if (u != w)
                    {
                        vert[pu] = w;
                        vert[pw] = u;
                        pos[u] = pw;
                        pos[w] = pu;
                    }

                    bin[du]++;
                    deg[u]--;
                }
            }
        }

        core = deg;
        return maxCore;
    }

    private sealed class Graph
    {
        public int N { get; }
        public int[] Offset { get; }
        public int[] Adj { get; }
        public int[] Degree { get; }

        private Graph(int n, int[] offset, int[] adj, int[] degree)
        {
            N = n;
            Offset = offset;
            Adj = adj;
            Degree = degree;
        }

        public static Graph Build(int n, int m, int[] us, int[] vs, int[] degree)
        {
            int[] offset = new int[n + 1];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                offset[i + 1] = offset[i] + degree[i];
            }

            int[] adj = new int[offset[n]];
            int[] cursor = new int[n];
            Array.Copy(offset, cursor, n);

            for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
            {
                int u = us[i];
                int v = vs[i];
                adj[cursor[u]++] = v;
                adj[cursor[v]++] = u;
            }

            if (n >= 10000)
            {
                Parallel.For(0, n, i =>
                {
                    int s = offset[i];
                    int len = offset[i + 1] - s;
                    if (len > 1)
                    {
                        Array.Sort(adj, s, len);
                    }
                });
            }
            else
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                {
                    int s = offset[i];
                    int len = offset[i + 1] - s;
                    if (len > 1)
                    {
                        Array.Sort(adj, s, len);
                    }
                }
            }

            return new Graph(n, offset, adj, degree);
        }

        public bool IsAdjacent(int u, int v)
        {
            int su = Offset[u];
            int eu = Offset[u + 1];
            int sv = Offset[v];
            int ev = Offset[v + 1];

            if (eu - su > ev - sv)
            {
                int t = u; u = v; v = t;
                su = Offset[u];
                eu = Offset[u + 1];
            }

            int lo = su;
            int hi = eu - 1;
            while (lo <= hi)
            {
                int mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
                int x = Adj[mid];
                if (x == v) return true;
                if (x < v) lo = mid + 1;
                else hi = mid - 1;
            }

            return false;
        }
    }

    private sealed class ExactCliqueSolver
    {
        private readonly int n;
        private readonly int words;
        private readonly ulong[] adj;
        private readonly int[] degree;
        private readonly Stopwatch stopwatch;
        private readonly long deadlineTicks;

        private bool timedOut;
        private long nodes;
        private int bestSize;
        private int[] bestClique;
        private readonly int[] cliqueStack;

        public bool TimedOut => timedOut;
        public int BestSize => bestSize;

        public ExactCliqueSolver(int n, ulong[] adj, int[] degree, int[] initialClique, Stopwatch stopwatch, TimeSpan totalLimit)
        {
            this.n = n;
            this.adj = adj;
            this.degree = degree;
            this.words = (n + 63) >> 6;
            this.stopwatch = stopwatch;
            deadlineTicks = (long)(totalLimit.TotalSeconds * Stopwatch.Frequency);

            bestSize = initialClique.Length;
            bestClique = new int[Math.Max(1, n)];
            for (int i = 0; i < initialClique.Length; i++)
            {
                bestClique[i] = initialClique[i];
            }

            cliqueStack = new int[Math.Max(1, n)];
        }

        public int[] GetBestClique()
        {
            int[] outClique = new int[bestSize];
            Array.Copy(bestClique, outClique, bestSize);
            return outClique;
        }

        public void Solve()
        {
            int[] candidates = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                candidates[i] = i;
            }

            Array.Sort(candidates, (a, b) =>
            {
                int cmp = degree[b].CompareTo(degree[a]);
                return cmp != 0 ? cmp : a.CompareTo(b);
            });

            Expand(candidates, n, 0);
        }

        private void Expand(int[] candidates, int count, int depth)
        {
            if (timedOut)
            {
                return;
            }

            if (count == 0)
            {
                if (depth > bestSize)
                {
                    bestSize = depth;
                    Array.Copy(cliqueStack, bestClique, depth);
                }
                return;
            }

            if ((++nodes & 2047) == 0 && stopwatch.ElapsedTicks >= deadlineTicks)
            {
                timedOut = true;
                return;
            }

            int[] ordered = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            int[] bounds = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            try
            {
                ColorSort(candidates, count, ordered, bounds);

                for (int i = count - 1; i >= 0; i--)
                {
                    if (depth + bounds[i] <= bestSize)
                    {
                        break;
                    }

                    int v = ordered[i];
                    cliqueStack[depth] = v;

                    int[] next = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(i == 0 ? 1 : i);
                    int nextCount = 0;
                    for (int j = 0; j < i; j++)
                    {
                        int u = ordered[j];
                        if (HasEdge(v, u))
                        {
                            next[nextCount++] = u;
                        }
                    }

                    if (nextCount == 0)
                    {
                        int newSize = depth + 1;
                        if (newSize > bestSize)
                        {
                            bestSize = newSize;
                            Array.Copy(cliqueStack, bestClique, newSize);
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        Expand(next, nextCount, depth + 1);
                    }

                    ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(next);

                    if (timedOut)
                    {
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(ordered);
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(bounds);
            }
        }

        private void ColorSort(int[] candidates, int count, int[] ordered, int[] bounds)
        {
            int[] rem = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            int[] colorClass = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            try
            {
                Array.Copy(candidates, rem, count);
                int remCount = count;
                int outIdx = 0;
                int color = 0;

                while (remCount > 0)
                {
                    color++;
                    int classCount = 0;

                    for (int i = 0; i < remCount; i++)
                    {
                        int v = rem[i];
                        bool ok = true;
                        for (int j = 0; j < classCount; j++)
                        {
                            if (HasEdge(v, colorClass[j]))
                            {
                                ok = false;
                                break;
                            }
                        }

                        if (ok)
                        {
                            colorClass[classCount++] = v;
                            ordered[outIdx] = v;
                            bounds[outIdx] = color;
                            outIdx++;

                            rem[i] = rem[remCount - 1];
                            remCount--;
                            i--;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(rem);
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(colorClass);
            }
        }

        private bool HasEdge(int a, int b)
        {
            int idx = a * words + (b >> 6);
            ulong mask = 1UL << (b & 63);
            return (adj[idx] & mask) != 0;
        }
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream stream;
        private readonly byte[] buffer;
        private int length;
        private int ptr;

        public FastScanner(Stream stream)
        {
            this.stream = stream;
            buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
        }

        public bool TryReadInt(out int value)
        {
            value = 0;
            int c;

            do
            {
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1) return false;
            }
            while (c <= 32);

            int sign = 1;
            if (c == '-')
            {
                sign = -1;
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1)
                {
                    value = 0;
                    return true;
                }
            }

            int x = 0;
            while (c > 32)
            {
                x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1) break;
            }

            value = x * sign;
            return true;
        }

        private int Read()
        {
            if (ptr >= length)
            {
                length = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length);
                ptr = 0;
                if (length == 0)
                {
                    return -1;
                }
            }

            return buffer[ptr++];
        }
    }
}

View C# Code (21872 chars)
using System;
using System.Buffers;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public static class Program
{
    private const int MaxHeuristicSeeds = 96;
    private const int ExactKernelLimit = 2200;
    private static readonly TimeSpan TotalTimeLimit = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(4.9);

    public static void Main()
    {
        var stopwatch = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        var scanner = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());

        if (!scanner.TryReadInt(out int n) || !scanner.TryReadInt(out int mInput))
        {
            return;
        }

        if (n <= 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine(0);
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        if (mInput < 0)
        {
            mInput = 0;
        }

        int[] inputDegrees = new int[n];
        int[] us = new int[mInput];
        int[] vs = new int[mInput];
        int m = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < mInput; i++)
        {
            if (!scanner.TryReadInt(out int u) || !scanner.TryReadInt(out int v))
            {
                break;
            }

            if ((uint)u >= (uint)n || (uint)v >= (uint)n || u == v)
            {
                continue;
            }

            us[m] = u;
            vs[m] = v;
            m++;
            inputDegrees[u]++;
            inputDegrees[v]++;
        }

        Graph graph = Graph.Build(n, m, us, vs, inputDegrees);

        int[] core;
        int maxCore = ComputeCoreNumbers(graph, out core);
        int upperBound = maxCore + 1;

        int[] degreeOrder = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            degreeOrder[i] = i;
        }

        Array.Sort(degreeOrder, (a, b) =>
        {
            int cmp = graph.Degree[b].CompareTo(graph.Degree[a]);
            return cmp != 0 ? cmp : a.CompareTo(b);
        });

        int[] bestClique = GreedyFromOrder(graph, degreeOrder);
        if (bestClique.Length == 0)
        {
            bestClique = new[] { degreeOrder[0] };
        }

        RunSeedHeuristicsParallel(graph, degreeOrder, stopwatch, TotalTimeLimit, ref bestClique);

        int bestSize = bestClique.Length;

        if (bestSize < upperBound && stopwatch.Elapsed < TotalTimeLimit)
        {
            int[] kernel = BuildKernelForLargerCliques(graph, bestSize);

            if (kernel.Length > 0 && kernel.Length <= ExactKernelLimit && stopwatch.Elapsed < TotalTimeLimit - TimeSpan.FromSeconds(2))
            {
                BuildKernelBitsetGraph(graph, kernel, out ulong[] bitAdj, out int[] kernelDegree);
                int[] mappedInitialClique = MapCliqueToKernel(bestClique, kernel, graph.N);

                var exact = new ExactCliqueSolver(kernel.Length, bitAdj, kernelDegree, mappedInitialClique, stopwatch, TotalTimeLimit);
                exact.Solve();

                if (exact.BestSize > bestSize)
                {
                    int[] mappedBest = exact.GetBestClique();
                    int[] lifted = new int[mappedBest.Length];
                    for (int i = 0; i < mappedBest.Length; i++)
                    {
                        lifted[i] = kernel[mappedBest[i]];
                    }

                    bestClique = lifted;
                    bestSize = bestClique.Length;
                }
            }
        }

        Array.Sort(bestClique);
        Console.WriteLine(bestClique.Length);
        Console.WriteLine(bestClique.Length == 0 ? string.Empty : string.Join(" ", bestClique));
    }

    private static int[] GreedyFromOrder(Graph g, int[] order)
    {
        var clique = new List<int>(Math.Min(64, g.N));

        for (int i = 0; i < order.Length; i++)
        {
            int v = order[i];
            bool ok = true;

            for (int j = 0; j < clique.Count; j++)
            {
                if (!g.IsAdjacent(v, clique[j]))
                {
                    ok = false;
                    break;
                }
            }

            if (ok)
            {
                clique.Add(v);
            }
        }

        return clique.ToArray();
    }

    private static void RunSeedHeuristicsParallel(Graph g, int[] degreeOrder, Stopwatch stopwatch, TimeSpan limit, ref int[] bestClique)
    {
        int seedCount = Math.Min(MaxHeuristicSeeds, g.N);
        if (seedCount <= 0)
        {
            return;
        }

        int[] seeds = new int[seedCount];
        Array.Copy(degreeOrder, seeds, seedCount);

        object bestLock = new object();
        int[] currentBest = bestClique;

        var markArrays = new ThreadLocal<int[]>(() => new int[g.N]);
        var stampValues = new ThreadLocal<int>(() => 1);

        Parallel.For(0, seedCount, new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = Environment.ProcessorCount }, sidx =>
        {
            if (stopwatch.Elapsed >= limit)
            {
                return;
            }

            int seed = seeds[sidx];
            int[] marks = markArrays.Value!;
            int stamp = stampValues.Value;
