                    int len = offset[i + 1] - s;
                    if (len > 1)
                    {
                        Array.Sort(adj, s, len);
                    }
                }
            }

            return new Graph(n, offset, adj, degree);
        }

        public bool IsAdjacent(int u, int v)
        {
            int su = Offset[u];
            int eu = Offset[u + 1];
            int sv = Offset[v];
            int ev = Offset[v + 1];

            if (eu - su > ev - sv)
            {
                int t = u; u = v; v = t;
                su = Offset[u];
                eu = Offset[u + 1];
            }

            int lo = su;
            int hi = eu - 1;
            while (lo <= hi)
            {
                int mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
                int x = Adj[mid];
                if (x == v) return true;
                if (x < v) lo = mid + 1;
                else hi = mid - 1;
            }

            return false;
        }
    }

    private sealed class ExactCliqueSolver
    {
        private readonly int n;
        private readonly int words;
        private readonly ulong[] adj;
        private readonly int[] degree;
        private readonly Stopwatch stopwatch;
        private readonly long deadlineTicks;

        private bool timedOut;
        private long nodes;
        private int bestSize;
        private int[] bestClique;
        private readonly int[] cliqueStack;

        public bool TimedOut => timedOut;
        public int BestSize => bestSize;

        public ExactCliqueSolver(int n, ulong[] adj, int[] degree, int[] initialClique, Stopwatch stopwatch, TimeSpan totalLimit)
        {
            this.n = n;
            this.adj = adj;
            this.degree = degree;
            this.words = (n + 63) >> 6;
            this.stopwatch = stopwatch;
            deadlineTicks = (long)(totalLimit.TotalSeconds * Stopwatch.Frequency);

            bestSize = initialClique.Length;
            bestClique = new int[Math.Max(1, n)];
            for (int i = 0; i < initialClique.Length; i++)
            {
                bestClique[i] = initialClique[i];
            }

            cliqueStack = new int[Math.Max(1, n)];
        }

        public int[] GetBestClique()
        {
            int[] outClique = new int[bestSize];
            Array.Copy(bestClique, outClique, bestSize);
            return outClique;
        }

        public void Solve()
        {
            int[] candidates = new int[n];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                candidates[i] = i;
            }

            Array.Sort(candidates, (a, b) =>
            {
                int cmp = degree[b].CompareTo(degree[a]);
                return cmp != 0 ? cmp : a.CompareTo(b);
            });

            Expand(candidates, n, 0);
        }

        private void Expand(int[] candidates, int count, int depth)
        {
            if (timedOut)
            {
                return;
            }

            if (count == 0)
            {
                if (depth > bestSize)
                {
                    bestSize = depth;
                    Array.Copy(cliqueStack, bestClique, depth);
                }
                return;
            }

            if ((++nodes & 2047) == 0 && stopwatch.ElapsedTicks >= deadlineTicks)
            {
                timedOut = true;
                return;
            }

            int[] ordered = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            int[] bounds = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            try
            {
                ColorSort(candidates, count, ordered, bounds);

                for (int i = count - 1; i >= 0; i--)
                {
                    if (depth + bounds[i] <= bestSize)
                    {
                        break;
                    }

                    int v = ordered[i];
                    cliqueStack[depth] = v;

                    int[] next = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(i == 0 ? 1 : i);
                    int nextCount = 0;
                    for (int j = 0; j < i; j++)
                    {
                        int u = ordered[j];
                        if (HasEdge(v, u))
                        {
                            next[nextCount++] = u;
                        }
                    }

                    if (nextCount == 0)
                    {
                        int newSize = depth + 1;
                        if (newSize > bestSize)
                        {
                            bestSize = newSize;
                            Array.Copy(cliqueStack, bestClique, newSize);
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        Expand(next, nextCount, depth + 1);
                    }

                    ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(next);

                    if (timedOut)
                    {
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(ordered);
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(bounds);
            }
        }

        private void ColorSort(int[] candidates, int count, int[] ordered, int[] bounds)
        {
            int[] rem = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            int[] colorClass = ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Rent(count);
            try
            {
                Array.Copy(candidates, rem, count);
                int remCount = count;
                int outIdx = 0;
                int color = 0;

                while (remCount > 0)
                {
                    color++;
                    int classCount = 0;

                    for (int i = 0; i < remCount; i++)
                    {
                        int v = rem[i];
                        bool ok = true;
                        for (int j = 0; j < classCount; j++)
                        {
                            if (HasEdge(v, colorClass[j]))
                            {
                                ok = false;
                                break;
                            }
                        }

                        if (ok)
                        {
                            colorClass[classCount++] = v;
                            ordered[outIdx] = v;
                            bounds[outIdx] = color;
                            outIdx++;

                            rem[i] = rem[remCount - 1];
                            remCount--;
                            i--;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(rem);
                ArrayPool<int>.Shared.Return(colorClass);
            }
        }

        private bool HasEdge(int a, int b)
        {
            int idx = a * words + (b >> 6);
            ulong mask = 1UL << (b & 63);
            return (adj[idx] & mask) != 0;
        }
    }

    private sealed class FastScanner
    {
        private readonly Stream stream;
        private readonly byte[] buffer;
        private int length;
        private int ptr;

        public FastScanner(Stream stream)
        {
            this.stream = stream;
            buffer = new byte[1 << 16];
        }

        public bool TryReadInt(out int value)
        {
            value = 0;
            int c;

            do
            {
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1) return false;
            }
            while (c <= 32);

            int sign = 1;
            if (c == '-')
            {
                sign = -1;
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1)
                {
                    value = 0;
                    return true;
                }
            }

            int x = 0;
            while (c > 32)
            {
                x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
                c = Read();
                if (c == -1) break;
            }

            value = x * sign;
            return true;
        }

        private int Read()
        {
            if (ptr >= length)
            {
                length = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length);
                ptr = 0;
                if (length == 0)
                {
                    return -1;
                }
            }

            return buffer[ptr++];
        }
    }
}
Test 30: 3-SAT Solver (Python) Score: 12.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Python code to solve the 3-SAT (Boolean Satisfiability) problem, which is NP-Complete.

**What is 3-SAT?**
You have N boolean variables (x1, x2, ..., xN), each of which is either True or False.
You are given M "clauses". Each clause is a constraint containing exactly 3 "literals".
A literal is either:
- A positive integer (e.g. 5) meaning "variable 5 must be True", or
- A negative integer (e.g. -5) meaning "variable 5 must be False".

A clause is **satisfied** if ANY of its 3 literals evaluates to True.
The formula is **satisfiable** if ALL clauses can be satisfied simultaneously
by some assignment of True/False to the variables.

**Example:**
Variables: x1, x2, x3
Clause "1 -2 3" means: x1=True OR x2=False OR x3=True.
If x1=True, x2=True, x3=False → clause satisfied (x1=True is enough).

Your task: find an assignment of True/False to every variable that satisfies
every clause. All test instances are guaranteed to be satisfiable.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_variables num_clauses
lit1 lit2 lit3
lit1 lit2 lit3
...
```
Variables are 1-indexed. Negative literals mean negation.

**Output format (stdout):**
```
SAT
v1 v2 v3 ... vN
```
Where each vi is 1 (True) or 0 (False) for variable i, space-separated.

**Grading:**
- Output "SAT" on the first line, then the assignment on the second line.
- Every clause must be satisfied by your assignment.
- Timeouts, crashes, wrong format, or unsatisfied clauses all score 0.

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Handle up to 20M variables and 85M clauses.
3. Complete within 5 minutes.

Write complete, runnable Python code.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Given a logic puzzle made of true/false variables — where each rule says “at least one of these three things must be true” and all rules must hold simultaneously — find an assignment that satisfies every rule.

This is the classic 3-SAT problem, one of the first problems proven to be NP-complete. Every test instance has a hidden satisfying assignment the AI must discover. Subpasses increase the number of variables and clauses.

 1.0000
[20 vars, 85 clauses] All 85 clauses satisfied, 0.18s

3-SAT Solver - 20 vars, 85 clauses

Approach: !/usr/bin/env python3

View Python Code (17179 chars)
import sys
import tempfile
from array import array

TEXT_CHUNK = 1 << 20
BIN_CLAUSE_CHUNK = 65536  # clauses per binary read chunk
MASK64 = (1 << 64) - 1

# Use full in-memory WalkSAT only when occurrence indexing is practical.
FULL_MODE_MAX_CLAUSES = 1_500_000
FULL_MODE_MAX_VARS = 2_500_000


def xorshift64(seed: int) -> int:
    seed ^= (seed << 13) & MASK64
    seed ^= (seed >> 7)
    seed ^= (seed << 17) & MASK64
    return seed & MASK64


def int_stream():
    """Yield signed integers from stdin using chunked byte parsing."""
    read = sys.stdin.buffer.read
    data = read(TEXT_CHUNK)
    num = 0
    sign = 1
    in_num = False

    while data:
        for b in data:
            if 48 <= b <= 57:  # '0'..'9'
                num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
                in_num = True
            elif b == 45:  # '-'
                sign = -1
            else:
                if in_num:
                    yield sign * num
                    num = 0
                    sign = 1
                    in_num = False
                else:
                    sign = 1
        data = read(TEXT_CHUNK)

    if in_num:
        yield sign * num


def build_clause_store_and_scores(n_vars, n_clauses, ints):
    """
    Store clauses as packed uint32 literals in a temp file.
    literal encoding: (var << 1) | neg_bit
      neg_bit = 0 for positive literal, 1 for negated literal.
    Also build signed occurrence score per variable.
    """
    scores = array('i', [0]) * (n_vars + 1)
    tmp = tempfile.TemporaryFile()

    buf = array('I')
    append = buf.append
    flush_threshold = 1 << 20  # uint32 values

    clauses_read = 0
    for _ in range(n_clauses):
        try:
            a = next(ints)
            b = next(ints)
            c = next(ints)
        except StopIteration:
            break

        for lit in (a, b, c):
            if lit > 0:
                v = lit
                scores[v] += 1
                append(v << 1)
            else:
                v = -lit
                scores[v] -= 1
                append((v << 1) | 1)

        clauses_read += 1

        if len(buf) >= flush_threshold:
            buf.tofile(tmp)
            buf = array('I')
            append = buf.append

    if buf:
        buf.tofile(tmp)

    return tmp, scores, clauses_read


def initial_assignment(scores):
    """Set variable to majority polarity: True if score >= 0 else False."""
    n_vars = len(scores) - 1
    assign = bytearray(n_vars + 1)
    for i in range(1, n_vars + 1):
        if scores[i] >= 0:
            assign[i] = 1
    return assign


def count_unsat_stream(clause_file, assign, n_clauses):
    """Single verification sweep: count unsatisfied clauses."""
    clause_file.seek(0)
    read = clause_file.read

    unsat = 0
    done = 0
    carry = b''
    chunk_bytes = BIN_CLAUSE_CHUNK * 12

    while done < n_clauses:
        block = read(chunk_bytes)
        if not block:
            break

        data = carry + block
        usable = (len(data) // 12) * 12
        carry = data[usable:]

        if usable == 0:
            continue

        words = memoryview(data[:usable]).cast('I')
        i = 0
        wlen = len(words)

        while i < wlen and done < n_clauses:
            e1 = words[i]
            e2 = words[i + 1]
            e3 = words[i + 2]
            i += 3
            done += 1

            v1 = e1 >> 1
            n1 = e1 & 1
            v2 = e2 >> 1
            n2 = e2 & 1
            v3 = e3 >> 1
            n3 = e3 & 1

            if assign[v1] == n1 and assign[v2] == n2 and assign[v3] == n3:
                unsat += 1

    return unsat


def repair_sweep_stream(clause_file, assign, scores, n_clauses, random_mode=False, seed=0x9E3779B97F4A7C15):
    """
    Sweep clauses and repair unsatisfied ones in-place.
    Returns (unsat_before_repairs, updated_seed).
    """
    clause_file.seek(0)
    read = clause_file.read

    unsat = 0
    done = 0
    carry = b''
    chunk_bytes = BIN_CLAUSE_CHUNK * 12

    while done < n_clauses:
        block = read(chunk_bytes)
        if not block:
            break

        data = carry + block
        usable = (len(data) // 12) * 12
        carry = data[usable:]

        if usable == 0:
            continue

        words = memoryview(data[:usable]).cast('I')
        i = 0
        wlen = len(words)

        while i < wlen and done < n_clauses:
            e1 = words[i]
            e2 = words[i + 1]
            e3 = words[i + 2]
            i += 3
            done += 1

            v1 = e1 >> 1
            n1 = e1 & 1
            v2 = e2 >> 1
            n2 = e2 & 1
            v3 = e3 >> 1
            n3 = e3 & 1

            if assign[v1] == n1 and assign[v2] == n2 and assign[v3] == n3:
                unsat += 1

                if random_mode:
                    seed = xorshift64(seed)
                    pick = seed % 3
                    if pick == 0:
                        assign[v1] = 1 - n1
                    elif pick == 1:
                        assign[v2] = 1 - n2
                    else:
                        assign[v3] = 1 - n3
                else:
                    d1 = 1 - n1
                    d2 = 1 - n2
                    d3 = 1 - n3

                    w1 = scores[v1] if d1 else -scores[v1]
                    w2 = scores[v2] if d2 else -scores[v2]
                    w3 = scores[v3] if d3 else -scores[v3]

                    best_v = v1
                    best_d = d1
                    best_w = w1

                    if w2 > best_w:
                        best_v = v2
                        best_d = d2
                        best_w = w2

                    if w3 > best_w:
                        best_v = v3
                        best_d = d3

                    assign[best_v] = best_d

    return unsat, seed


def load_literals(clause_file, n_clauses):
    clause_file.seek(0)
    lits = array('I')
    need = n_clauses * 3
    try:
        lits.fromfile(clause_file, need)
    except EOFError:
        # Partial read fallback (should not happen in normal flow).
        remaining = clause_file.read()
        if remaining:
            tail = len(remaining) // 4 * 4
            if tail:
                lits.frombytes(remaining[:tail])
    return lits


def build_occurrence_index(lits, n_vars, n_clauses):
    occ_count = array('I', [0]) * (n_vars + 1)
    for e in lits:
        occ_count[e >> 1] += 1

    occ_start = array('I', [0]) * (n_vars + 2)
    run = 0
    for v in range(1, n_vars + 1):
        occ_start[v] = run
        run += occ_count[v]
    occ_start[n_vars + 1] = run

    next_pos = array('I', occ_start)
    occ_clause = array('I', [0]) * run
    occ_neg = bytearray(run)

    for cid in range(n_clauses):
        b = 3 * cid
        e1 = lits[b]
        e2 = lits[b + 1]
        e3 = lits[b + 2]
        for e in (e1, e2, e3):
            v = e >> 1
            p = next_pos[v]
            occ_clause[p] = cid
            occ_neg[p] = e & 1
            next_pos[v] = p + 1

    return occ_start, occ_clause, occ_neg


def init_sat_state(lits, assign, n_clauses):
    sat_count = bytearray(n_clauses)
    unsat = array('I')
    pos_in_unsat = array('i', [-1]) * n_clauses

    for cid in range(n_clauses):
        b = 3 * cid
        e1 = lits[b]
        e2 = lits[b + 1]
        e3 = lits[b + 2]

        c = 0
        if assign[e1 >> 1] != (e1 & 1):
            c += 1
        if assign[e2 >> 1] != (e2 & 1):
            c += 1
        if assign[e3 >> 1] != (e3 & 1):
            c += 1

        sat_count[cid] = c
        if c == 0:
            pos_in_unsat[cid] = len(unsat)
            unsat.append(cid)

    return sat_count, unsat, pos_in_unsat


def walksat_attempt(assign, lits, occ_start, occ_clause, occ_neg, n_clauses, seed, max_flips, noise_bits):
    sat_count, unsat, pos_in_unsat = init_sat_state(lits, assign, n_clauses)
    if len(unsat) == 0:
        return True, 0, seed

    for _ in range(max_flips):
        ulen = len(unsat)
        if ulen == 0:
            return True, 0, seed

        seed = xorshift64(seed)
        cid = unsat[seed % ulen]
        b = 3 * cid

        e1 = lits[b]
        e2 = lits[b + 1]
        e3 = lits[b + 2]

        v1 = e1 >> 1
        v2 = e2 >> 1
        v3 = e3 >> 1

        # Compute breakcount for each candidate variable.
        a1 = assign[v1]
        a2 = assign[v2]
        a3 = assign[v3]

        br1 = 0
        p = occ_start[v1]
        q = occ_start[v1 + 1]
        while p < q:
            c = occ_clause[p]
            if sat_count[c] == 1 and a1 != occ_neg[p]:
                br1 += 1
            p += 1

        br2 = 0
        p = occ_start[v2]
        q = occ_start[v2 + 1]
        while p < q:
            c = occ_clause[p]
            if sat_count[c] == 1 and a2 != occ_neg[p]:
                br2 += 1
            p += 1

        br3 = 0
        p = occ_start[v3]
        q = occ_start[v3 + 1]
        while p < q:
            c = occ_clause[p]
            if sat_count[c] == 1 and a3 != occ_neg[p]:
                br3 += 1
            p += 1

        # WalkSAT variable choice.
        zero_mask = 0
        if br1 == 0:
            zero_mask |= 1
        if br2 == 0:
            zero_mask |= 2
        if br3 == 0:
            zero_mask |= 4

        if zero_mask:
            seed = xorshift64(seed)
            if zero_mask == 1:
                flip_v = v1
            elif zero_mask == 2:
                flip_v = v2
            elif zero_mask == 4:
                flip_v = v3
            elif zero_mask == 3:
                flip_v = v1 if (seed & 1) == 0 else v2
            elif zero_mask == 5:
                flip_v = v1 if (seed & 1) == 0 else v3
            elif zero_mask == 6:
                flip_v = v2 if (seed & 1) == 0 else v3
            else:
                pick = seed % 3
                if pick == 0:
                    flip_v = v1
                elif pick == 1:
                    flip_v = v2
                else:
                    flip_v = v3
        else:
            seed = xorshift64(seed)
            if (seed & 1023) < noise_bits:
                pick = seed % 3
                if pick == 0:
                    flip_v = v1
                elif pick == 1:
                    flip_v = v2
                else:
                    flip_v = v3
            else:
                # Minimum breakcount, random tie break.
                best_b = br1
                flip_v = v1
                tie_mask = 1

                if br2 < best_b:
                    best_b = br2
                    flip_v = v2
                    tie_mask = 2
                elif br2 == best_b:
                    tie_mask |= 2

                if br3 < best_b:
                    flip_v = v3
                    tie_mask = 4
                elif br3 == best_b:
                    tie_mask |= 4

                if tie_mask == 3:
                    flip_v = v1 if (seed & 1) == 0 else v2
                elif tie_mask == 5:
                    flip_v = v1 if (seed & 1) == 0 else v3
                elif tie_mask == 6:
                    flip_v = v2 if (seed & 1) == 0 else v3
                elif tie_mask == 7:
                    pick = seed % 3
                    if pick == 0:
                        flip_v = v1
                    elif pick == 1:
                        flip_v = v2
                    else:
                        flip_v = v3

        # Apply flip incrementally.
        old = assign[flip_v]
        new = 1 - old
        assign[flip_v] = new

        p = occ_start[flip_v]
        q = occ_start[flip_v + 1]

        while p < q:
            c = occ_clause[p]
            neg = occ_neg[p]

            was_true = 1 if old != neg else 0
            now_true = 1 if new != neg else 0

            if was_true != now_true:
                before = sat_count[c]
                after = before + (1 if now_true else -1)
                sat_count[c] = after

                if before == 0 and after > 0:
                    # remove c from unsat
                    pos = pos_in_unsat[c]
                    if pos >= 0:
                        last_idx = len(unsat) - 1
                        last_clause = unsat[last_idx]
                        unsat[pos] = last_clause
                        pos_in_unsat[last_clause] = pos
                        unsat.pop()
                        pos_in_unsat[c] = -1
                elif before > 0 and after == 0:
                    # add c to unsat
                    pos_in_unsat[c] = len(unsat)
                    unsat.append(c)

            p += 1

    return len(unsat) == 0, len(unsat), seed


def perturb_assignment(assign, seed, flip_mask=7):
    """Flip ~1/(flip_mask+1) variables to escape local minima."""
    n_vars = len(assign) - 1
    for i in range(1, n_vars + 1):
        seed = xorshift64(seed)
        if (seed & flip_mask) == 0:
            assign[i] ^= 1
    return seed


def solve_full_mode(n_vars, n_clauses, clause_file, scores):
    lits = load_literals(clause_file, n_clauses)
    if len(lits) < n_clauses * 3:
        # Corrupted / partial input fallback.
        assign = initial_assignment(scores)
        return assign, False

    occ_start, occ_clause, occ_neg = build_occurrence_index(lits, n_vars, n_clauses)

    base_assign = initial_assignment(scores)
    best_assign = bytearray(base_assign)
    best_unsat = n_clauses + 1

    if n_clauses <= 150_000:
        restarts = 8
        max_flips = 2_000_000
    elif n_clauses <= 600_000:
        restarts = 5
        max_flips = 3_000_000
    else:
        restarts = 3
        max_flips = 4_000_000

    noise_bits = 580  # about 0.566 * 1024
    seed = 0x9E3779B97F4A7C15 ^ n_clauses ^ (n_vars << 1)

    for r in range(restarts):
        if r == 0:
            assign = bytearray(base_assign)
        else:
            assign = bytearray(best_assign)
            seed = perturb_assignment(assign, seed, flip_mask=7)

        solved, unsat_left, seed = walksat_attempt(
            assign,
            lits,
            occ_start,
            occ_clause,
            occ_neg,
            n_clauses,
            seed,
            max_flips,
            noise_bits,
        )

        if solved:
            return assign, True

        if unsat_left < best_unsat:
            best_unsat = unsat_left
            best_assign = bytearray(assign)

    return best_assign, False


def solve_stream_mode(clause_file, scores, n_vars, n_clauses):
    assign = initial_assignment(scores)

    unsat = count_unsat_stream(clause_file, assign, n_clauses)
    if unsat == 0:
        return assign

    if n_clauses <= 5_000_000:
        det_passes = 8
        rnd_passes = 6
    elif n_clauses <= 20_000_000:
        det_passes = 5
        rnd_passes = 4
    else:
        det_passes = 3
        rnd_passes = 3

    seed = 0xD1B54A32D192ED03 ^ n_clauses ^ (n_vars << 2)

    for _ in range(det_passes):
        before, seed = repair_sweep_stream(clause_file, assign, scores, n_clauses, random_mode=False, seed=seed)
        if before == 0:
            break
        unsat = count_unsat_stream(clause_file, assign, n_clauses)
        if unsat == 0:
            break

    if unsat != 0:
        for _ in range(rnd_passes):
            before, seed = repair_sweep_stream(clause_file, assign, scores, n_clauses, random_mode=True, seed=seed)
            if before == 0:
                break
            unsat = count_unsat_stream(clause_file, assign, n_clauses)
            if unsat == 0:
                break

    return assign


def write_solution(assign):
    out = sys.stdout.buffer
    out.write(b"SAT\n")

    n_vars = len(assign) - 1
    chunk = bytearray()
    flush_at = 1 << 20

    for i in range(1, n_vars + 1):
        chunk.append(49 if assign[i] else 48)  # '1' or '0'
        if i < n_vars:
            chunk.append(32)  # space
        else:
            chunk.append(10)  # newline

        if len(chunk) >= flush_at:
            out.write(chunk)
            chunk.clear()

    if chunk:
        out.write(chunk)


def main():
    ints = int_stream()

    try:
        n_vars = next(ints)
        n_clauses = next(ints)
    except StopIteration:
        return

    if n_vars <= 0:
        sys.stdout.write("SAT\n\n")
        return

    clause_file, scores, clauses_read = build_clause_store_and_scores(n_vars, n_clauses, ints)

    use_full_mode = (
        clauses_read <= FULL_MODE_MAX_CLAUSES
        and n_vars <= FULL_MODE_MAX_VARS
    )

    if use_full_mode:
        assign, solved = solve_full_mode(n_vars, clauses_read, clause_file, scores)
        if not solved:
            # Finish with additional streaming repairs from the best full-mode state.
            seed = 0xA24BAED4963EE407 ^ clauses_read
            for _ in range(3):
                before, seed = repair_sweep_stream(clause_file, assign, scores, clauses_read, random_mode=True, seed=seed)
                if before == 0:
                    break
                if count_unsat_stream(clause_file, assign, clauses_read) == 0:
                    break
    else:
        assign = solve_stream_mode(clause_file, scores, n_vars, clauses_read)

    write_solution(assign)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

Test 31: Subset Sum (Rust) Score: 8.10 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the Subset Sum problem.

Your Rust subset sum solver will be tested with instances ranging from simple to very
complex sets. The same algorithm must work efficiently across ALL problem complexities.

Given a set of integers and a target value, determine if there exists a subset
that sums to exactly the target value. Simple sets (<100 numbers) you can probably
brute force, however this code will also need to run on sets with millions of
numbers. This is NP-Complete and requires sophisticated algorithms for larger instances:
additionally; threading, memory optimization, vectorization and parallelization are all
strongly suggested.

**Input format (stdin, space seperated decimal integers):**
```
num_numbers target
num1 num2 ... numN
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
YES or NO
[index1 index2 ... indexK] (only if YES, 0-indexed indices of subset elements)
```

**Implementation Hints:**
- Detect set complexity and choose appropriate algorithm
- Use efficient data structures: bitsets, hash sets for DP
- Implement adaptive quality vs speed tradeoffs
- For very large sets, focus on approximation algorithms
- Handle edge cases: empty set, zero target, all numbers add to target.
- Use fast I/O as the input size can approach 1gb.

**Success Criteria:**
- Correctly determine if subset sum exists
- If YES, provide valid subset indices
- Complete within time limit

**Failure Criteria:**
- Incorrect subset sum determination
- Invalid subset indices
- Timeout without conclusion

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with rustc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable set sizes and target values
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Must handle varying subset sum complexities efficiently

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler:**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Be aware that default warnings are enabled and will cause a compilation failure,
so ensure that you write warning-free code.

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main() function.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Given a list of numbers and a target total, find a subset of those numbers that adds up to exactly the target. It sounds simple, but with large lists the number of possible subsets is astronomical.

This is a classic NP-hard problem. The test uses planted instances with a known solution for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the list size and target magnitude.

 1.0000
[20 numbers, small values] Valid subset of 9 elements, 0.09s

Subset Sum - 20 numbers, small values

View Rust Code (16251 chars)
﻿use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::io::{self, Read};
use std::time::{Duration, Instant};

const MITM_MAX_N: usize = 46;
const BITSET_TARGET_MAX: usize = 6_000_000;
const BITSET_WORK_MAX: u128 = 320_000_000;
const SPARSE_N_MAX: usize = 6_000;
const SPARSE_STATE_MAX: usize = 2_500_000;
const HEURISTIC_BUDGET_MS: u64 = 1_200;

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct Item {
    value: i64,
    index: usize,
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct PosItem {
    value: u64,
    index: usize,
}

struct Scanner<'a> {
    data: &'a [u8],
    pos: usize,
}

impl<'a> Scanner<'a> {
    fn new(data: &'a [u8]) -> Self {
        Self { data, pos: 0 }
    }

    fn next_i64(&mut self) -> Option<i64> {
        while self.pos < self.data.len() && self.data[self.pos].is_ascii_whitespace() {
            self.pos += 1;
        }
        if self.pos >= self.data.len() {
            return None;
        }

        let mut sign: i128 = 1;
        if self.data[self.pos] == b'-' {
            sign = -1;
            self.pos += 1;
        } else if self.data[self.pos] == b'+' {
            self.pos += 1;
        }

        let mut value: i128 = 0;
        let mut any = false;
        while self.pos < self.data.len() {
            let b = self.data[self.pos];
            if b.is_ascii_digit() {
                any = true;
                value = value.saturating_mul(10).saturating_add((b - b'0') as i128);
                self.pos += 1;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }

        if !any {
            return None;
        }

        let signed = value.saturating_mul(sign);
        if signed < i64::MIN as i128 || signed > i64::MAX as i128 {
            return None;
        }
        Some(signed as i64)
    }
}

struct XorShift64 {
    state: u64,
}

impl XorShift64 {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        let state = if seed == 0 { 0x9E37_79B9_7F4A_7C15 } else { seed };
        Self { state }
    }

    fn next_u64(&mut self) -> u64 {
        let mut x = self.state;
        x ^= x << 13;
        x ^= x >> 7;
        x ^= x << 17;
        self.state = x;
        x
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = Vec::new();
    if io::stdin().read_to_end(&mut input).is_err() {
        return;
    }

    let mut scanner = Scanner::new(&input);
    let n_raw = match scanner.next_i64() {
        Some(v) => v,
        None => return,
    };
    let target = match scanner.next_i64() {
        Some(v) => v,
        None => return,
    };

    if n_raw < 0 {
        println!("NO");
        return;
    }

    let n = n_raw as usize;
    let mut items = Vec::with_capacity(n);
    for idx in 0..n {
        match scanner.next_i64() {
            Some(v) => items.push(Item { value: v, index: idx }),
            None => break,
        }
    }

    match solve(&items, target) {
        Some(mut indices) => {
            indices.sort_unstable();
            println!("YES");
            let mut line = String::new();
            for (i, idx) in indices.iter().enumerate() {
                if i > 0 {
                    line.push(' ');
                }
                line.push_str(&idx.to_string());
            }
            println!("{line}");
        }
        None => {
            println!("NO");
        }
    }
}

fn solve(items: &[Item], target: i64) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    if target == 0 {
        return Some(Vec::new());
    }
    if items.is_empty() {
        return None;
    }

    for item in items {
        if item.value == target {
            return Some(vec![item.index]);
        }
    }

    let mut min_sum: i128 = 0;
    let mut max_sum: i128 = 0;
    let mut all_nonneg = true;
    let mut all_nonpos = true;

    for item in items {
        if item.value > 0 {
            all_nonpos = false;
            max_sum += item.value as i128;
        } else if item.value < 0 {
            all_nonneg = false;
            min_sum += item.value as i128;
        }
    }

    let t = target as i128;
    if t < min_sum || t > max_sum {
        return None;
    }

    if items.len() <= MITM_MAX_N {
        return meet_in_middle(items, target);
    }

    if all_nonneg && target > 0 {
        let mut pos = Vec::with_capacity(items.len());
        for item in items {
            if item.value > 0 {
                pos.push(PosItem {
                    value: item.value as u64,
                    index: item.index,
                });
            }
        }
        return solve_nonnegative(&pos, target as u64);
    }

    if all_nonpos && target < 0 {
        let mut pos = Vec::with_capacity(items.len());
        for item in items {
            if item.value < 0 {
                if item.value == i64::MIN {
                    return solve_mixed(items, target);
                }
                pos.push(PosItem {
                    value: (-item.value) as u64,
                    index: item.index,
                });
            }
        }
        return solve_nonnegative(&pos, (-target) as u64);
    }

    solve_mixed(items, target)
}

fn solve_nonnegative(items: &[PosItem], target: u64) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    if target == 0 {
        return Some(Vec::new());
    }

    let mut filtered = Vec::with_capacity(items.len());
    let mut total: u128 = 0;
    let mut g: u64 = 0;

    for item in items {
        if item.value == 0 {
            continue;
        }
        if item.value == target {
            return Some(vec![item.index]);
        }
        if item.value < target {
            filtered.push(*item);
            total += item.value as u128;
            g = gcd_u64(g, item.value);
        }
    }

    if filtered.is_empty() {
        return None;
    }
    if total < target as u128 {
        return None;
    }
    if g != 0 && target % g != 0 {
        return None;
    }

    if filtered.len() <= MITM_MAX_N {
        let mut tmp = Vec::with_capacity(filtered.len());
        for it in &filtered {
            tmp.push(Item {
                value: it.value as i64,
                index: it.index,
            });
        }
        return meet_in_middle(&tmp, target as i64);
    }

    if let Some(ans) = two_sum_exact(&filtered, target) {
        return Some(ans);
    }

    let words = (target as usize / 64) + 1;
    let work = (filtered.len() as u128) * (words as u128);
    if target as usize <= BITSET_TARGET_MAX && work <= BITSET_WORK_MAX {
        if let Some(ans) = bitset_dp_with_parents(&filtered, target as usize) {
            return Some(ans);
        }
        return None;
    }

    if filtered.len() <= SPARSE_N_MAX {
        if let Some(ans) = sparse_dp_nonnegative(&filtered, target, SPARSE_STATE_MAX) {
            return Some(ans);
        }
    }

    heuristic_nonnegative(
        &filtered,
        target,
        Duration::from_millis(HEURISTIC_BUDGET_MS),
    )
}

fn solve_mixed(items: &[Item], target: i64) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    if items.len() <= MITM_MAX_N {
        return meet_in_middle(items, target);
    }

    if items.len() <= SPARSE_N_MAX {
        if let Some(ans) = sparse_dp_signed(items, target, SPARSE_STATE_MAX) {
            return Some(ans);
        }
    }

    None
}

fn gcd_u64(mut a: u64, mut b: u64) -> u64 {
    while b != 0 {
        let r = a % b;
        a = b;
        b = r;
    }
    a
}

fn meet_in_middle(items: &[Item], target: i64) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let n = items.len();
    let mid = n / 2;
    let left = &items[..mid];
    let right = &items[mid..];

    let left_count = 1usize << left.len();
    let right_count = 1usize << right.len();

    let mut left_sums: Vec<(i128, u64)> = Vec::with_capacity(left_count);
    for mask in 0..left_count {
        let mut sum: i128 = 0;
        for (bit, item) in left.iter().enumerate() {
            if ((mask >> bit) & 1) != 0 {
                sum += item.value as i128;
            }
        }
        left_sums.push((sum, mask as u64));
    }

    let mut right_sums: Vec<(i128, u64)> = Vec::with_capacity(right_count);
    for mask in 0..right_count {
        let mut sum: i128 = 0;
        for (bit, item) in right.iter().enumerate() {
            if ((mask >> bit) & 1) != 0 {
                sum += item.value as i128;
            }
        }
        right_sums.push((sum, mask as u64));
    }

    right_sums.sort_unstable_by_key(|x| x.0);
    let target128 = target as i128;

    for (left_sum, left_mask) in left_sums {
        let need = target128 - left_sum;
        if let Ok(pos) = right_sums.binary_search_by_key(&need, |x| x.0) {
            let right_mask = right_sums[pos].1;
            let mut indices = Vec::new();

            for (bit, item) in left.iter().enumerate() {
                if ((left_mask >> bit) & 1) != 0 {
                    indices.push(item.index);
                }
            }
            for (bit, item) in right.iter().enumerate() {
                if ((right_mask >> bit) & 1) != 0 {
                    indices.push(item.index);
                }
            }
            return Some(indices);
        }
    }

    None
}

fn two_sum_exact(items: &[PosItem], target: u64) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut seen: HashMap<u64, usize> = HashMap::with_capacity(items.len().min(1_000_000));
    for item in items {
        if item.value > target {
            continue;
        }
        let need = target - item.value;
        if let Some(other_idx) = seen.get(&need) {
            if *other_idx != item.index {
                return Some(vec![*other_idx, item.index]);
            }
        }
        seen.entry(item.value).or_insert(item.index);
    }
    None
}

fn sparse_dp_nonnegative(items: &[PosItem], target: u64, state_limit: usize) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut parent: HashMap<u64, (u64, usize)> = HashMap::new();
    parent.insert(0, (u64::MAX, usize::MAX));

    for item in items {
        let mut sums: Vec<u64> = parent.keys().copied().collect();
        sums.sort_unstable();

        for s in sums {
            if s > target || item.value > target - s {
                continue;
            }
            let ns = s + item.value;
            if let std::collections::hash_map::Entry::Vacant(slot) = parent.entry(ns) {
                slot.insert((s, item.index));
                if ns == target {
                    return Some(reconstruct_u64(&parent, target));
                }
            }
        }

        if parent.len() > state_limit {
            return None;
        }
    }

    if parent.contains_key(&target) {
        Some(reconstruct_u64(&parent, target))
    } else {
        None
    }
}

fn sparse_dp_signed(items: &[Item], target: i64, state_limit: usize) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut parent: HashMap<i64, (i64, usize)> = HashMap::new();
    parent.insert(i64::MIN, (i64::MIN, usize::MAX));
    parent.insert(0, (i64::MIN, usize::MAX));

    for item in items {
        let sums: Vec<i64> = parent.keys().copied().filter(|s| *s != i64::MIN).collect();

        for s in sums {
            if let Some(ns) = s.checked_add(item.value) {
                if let std::collections::hash_map::Entry::Vacant(slot) = parent.entry(ns) {
                    slot.insert((s, item.index));
                    if ns == target {
                        return Some(reconstruct_i64(&parent, target));
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        if parent.len() > state_limit {
            return None;
        }
    }

    if parent.contains_key(&target) {
        Some(reconstruct_i64(&parent, target))
    } else {
        None
    }
}

fn reconstruct_u64(parent: &HashMap<u64, (u64, usize)>, mut sum: u64) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut indices = Vec::new();
    while sum != 0 {
        let &(prev, idx) = parent
            .get(&sum)
            .expect("subset reconstruction failed for nonnegative DP");
        indices.push(idx);
        sum = prev;
    }
    indices
}

fn reconstruct_i64(parent: &HashMap<i64, (i64, usize)>, mut sum: i64) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut indices = Vec::new();
    while sum != 0 {
        let &(prev, idx) = parent
            .get(&sum)
            .expect("subset reconstruction failed for signed DP");
        indices.push(idx);
        sum = prev;
    }
    indices
}

fn bitset_dp_with_parents(items: &[PosItem], target: usize) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let words = (target / 64) + 1;
    let mut bits = vec![0u64; words];
    bits[0] = 1;

    let mut parent_idx = vec![usize::MAX; target + 1];
    let mut parent_prev = vec![u64::MAX; target + 1];
    parent_idx[0] = 0;
    parent_prev[0] = 0;

    for item in items {
        let shift_words = (item.value / 64) as usize;
        let shift_bits = (item.value % 64) as u32;
        if shift_words >= words {
            continue;
        }

        for w in (shift_words..words).rev() {
            let src = w - shift_words;
            let base = bits[src];
            let shifted = if shift_bits == 0 {
                base
            } else {
                let hi = base << shift_bits;
                let lo = if src > 0 {
                    bits[src - 1] >> (64 - shift_bits)
                } else {
                    0
                };
                hi | lo
            };

            let old = bits[w];
            let mut new_bits = shifted & !old;
            bits[w] = old | shifted;

            while new_bits != 0 {
                let tz = new_bits.trailing_zeros() as usize;
                let sum = w * 64 + tz;
                if sum <= target {
                    parent_idx[sum] = item.index;
                    parent_prev[sum] = (sum as u64) - item.value;
                }
                new_bits &= new_bits - 1;
            }
        }

        if ((bits[target / 64] >> (target % 64)) & 1) != 0 {
            break;
        }
    }

    if ((bits[target / 64] >> (target % 64)) & 1) == 0 {
        return None;
    }

    let mut indices = Vec::new();
    let mut sum = target as u64;
    while sum != 0 {
        let s = sum as usize;
        let idx = parent_idx[s];
        let prev = parent_prev[s];
        if idx == usize::MAX || prev == u64::MAX {
            return None;
        }
        indices.push(idx);
        sum = prev;
    }

    Some(indices)
}

fn heuristic_nonnegative(items: &[PosItem], target: u64, budget: Duration) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut sorted = items.to_vec();
    sorted.sort_unstable_by(|a, b| b.value.cmp(&a.value));

    if let Some(ans) = greedy_once(&sorted, target, true) {
        return Some(ans);
    }

    let mut best_residual = u64::MAX;
    let mut best_indices: Vec<usize> = Vec::new();
    let mut rng = XorShift64::new((target ^ (items.len() as u64).wrapping_mul(0xA24B_AED4_963E_E407)).wrapping_add(1));
    let start = Instant::now();

    while start.elapsed() < budget {
        let take_large_bias = (rng.next_u64() & 1) == 0;
        let mut sum = 0u64;
        let mut picked = Vec::new();

        for item in &sorted {
            if item.value > target - sum {
                continue;
            }

            if sum + item.value == target {
                picked.push(item.index);
                return Some(picked);
            }

            let coin = (rng.next_u64() % 100) as u32;
            let remaining = target - sum;
            let pick = if take_large_bias {
                coin < 55 || item.value > remaining / 2
            } else {
                coin < 45 || item.value > remaining / 3
            };

            if pick {
                sum += item.value;
                picked.push(item.index);
            }
        }

        if sum == target {
            return Some(picked);
        }

        let residual = target - sum;
        if residual < best_residual {
            best_residual = residual;
            best_indices = picked;
        }
    }

    let _ = best_indices;
    None
}

fn greedy_once(sorted: &[PosItem], target: u64, deterministic: bool) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut sum = 0u64;
    let mut indices = Vec::new();

    for item in sorted {
        if item.value > target - sum {
            continue;
        }
        sum += item.value;
        indices.push(item.index);
        if sum == target {
            return Some(indices);
        }
        if !deterministic && sum > target {
            break;
        }
    }

    None
}

Test 32: Steiner Tree (C++) Score: 11.40 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to solve the Steiner Tree problem (NP-Hard).

**Problem:**
Given a weighted undirected graph and a set of terminal vertices, find a minimum-weight
tree that connects all terminals. The tree may include non-terminal (Steiner) vertices.

**Input (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges num_terminals
u v weight (one edge per line, 0-indexed)
terminal_1 terminal_2 ... terminal_K
```

**Output (stdout):**
```
total_weight edge_count
u1 v1
u2 v2
...
```
Edges listed must form a connected, acyclic subgraph that includes all terminals.


**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

**Hints (not required):**
- Exact DP (Dreyfus-Wagner) for small terminal sets.
- MST / shortest-path heuristics for large graphs.
- Use adjacency lists and fast I/O.

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Connect a set of important nodes in a weighted graph using the cheapest possible tree of edges. Unlike a minimum spanning tree, the solution may pass through intermediate nodes that aren’t in the required set if doing so saves cost — like building a road network that connects key cities via junctions.

This is NP-hard. The test uses planted instances with a known optimal tree for strict grading. Subpasses increase the graph size.

 1.0000
[20V, 5 terminals] Weight 14 (MST bound: 14), 0.09s

Steiner Tree - 20V, 5 terminals

View C++ Code (8228 chars)
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <numeric>
#include <queue>
#include <tuple>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct Edge {
    int u;
    int v;
    long long w;
};

struct AdjEdge {
    int to;
    long long w;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> p;
    vector<int> r;

    explicit DSU(int n = 0) {
        init(n);
    }

    void init(int n) {
        p.resize(n);
        r.assign(n, 0);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        while (p[x] != x) {
            p[x] = p[p[x]];
            x = p[x];
        }
        return x;
    }

    bool unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return false;
        if (r[a] < r[b]) swap(a, b);
        p[b] = a;
        if (r[a] == r[b]) ++r[a];
        return true;
    }
};

struct Candidate {
    int a;
    int b;
    long long cost;
    int u;
    int v;
    int bridgeEdge;
};

static const long long INF = numeric_limits<long long>::max() / 4;

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n, m, kInput;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m >> kInput)) {
        return 0;
    }

    vector<Edge> edges;
    edges.reserve(m);
    vector<vector<AdjEdge>> g(n);

    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        long long w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        edges.push_back({u, v, w});
        g[u].push_back({v, w, i});
        g[v].push_back({u, w, i});
    }

    vector<int> terminals(kInput);
    for (int i = 0; i < kInput; ++i) {
        cin >> terminals[i];
    }

    sort(terminals.begin(), terminals.end());
    terminals.erase(unique(terminals.begin(), terminals.end()), terminals.end());
    const int k = static_cast<int>(terminals.size());

    if (k <= 1) {
        cout << 0 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    vector<char> isTerminal(n, false);
    for (int t : terminals) isTerminal[t] = true;

    vector<long long> dist(n, INF);
    vector<int> owner(n, -1);
    vector<int> parent(n, -1);
    vector<int> parentEdge(n, -1);

    using State = tuple<long long, int, int>; // dist, owner, vertex
    priority_queue<State, vector<State>, greater<State>> pq;

    for (int i = 0; i < k; ++i) {
        int s = terminals[i];
        if (0 < dist[s] || (dist[s] == 0 && (owner[s] == -1 || i < owner[s]))) {
            dist[s] = 0;
            owner[s] = i;
            parent[s] = -1;
            parentEdge[s] = -1;
            pq.push({0, i, s});
        }
    }

    while (!pq.empty()) {
        auto [d, own, v] = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        if (d != dist[v] || own != owner[v]) continue;

        for (const auto& e : g[v]) {
            if (d > INF - e.w) continue;
            long long nd = d + e.w;
            int to = e.to;
            if (nd < dist[to] || (nd == dist[to] && (owner[to] == -1 || own < owner[to]))) {
                dist[to] = nd;
                owner[to] = own;
                parent[to] = v;
                parentEdge[to] = e.id;
                pq.push({nd, own, to});
            }
        }
    }

    vector<Candidate> candidates;
    candidates.reserve(m);

    for (int id = 0; id < m; ++id) {
        int u = edges[id].u;
        int v = edges[id].v;
        int a = owner[u];
        int b = owner[v];
        if (a < 0 || b < 0 || a == b) continue;
        if (dist[u] >= INF || dist[v] >= INF) continue;

        int uu = u;
        int vv = v;
        if (a > b) {
            swap(a, b);
            swap(uu, vv);
        }

        long long cost = dist[uu] + edges[id].w + dist[vv];
        candidates.push_back({a, b, cost, uu, vv, id});
    }

    sort(candidates.begin(), candidates.end(), [](const Candidate& x, const Candidate& y) {
        if (x.a != y.a) return x.a < y.a;
        if (x.b != y.b) return x.b < y.b;
        if (x.cost != y.cost) return x.cost < y.cost;
        return x.bridgeEdge < y.bridgeEdge;
    });

    vector<Candidate> pairEdges;
    pairEdges.reserve(candidates.size());
    for (size_t i = 0; i < candidates.size();) {
        size_t j = i;
        Candidate best = candidates[i];
        while (j < candidates.size() && candidates[j].a == candidates[i].a && candidates[j].b == candidates[i].b) {
            if (candidates[j].cost < best.cost ||
                (candidates[j].cost == best.cost && candidates[j].bridgeEdge < best.bridgeEdge)) {
                best = candidates[j];
            }
            ++j;
        }
        pairEdges.push_back(best);
        i = j;
    }

    sort(pairEdges.begin(), pairEdges.end(), [](const Candidate& x, const Candidate& y) {
        if (x.cost != y.cost) return x.cost < y.cost;
        if (x.a != y.a) return x.a < y.a;
        if (x.b != y.b) return x.b < y.b;
        return x.bridgeEdge < y.bridgeEdge;
    });

    DSU dsuTerm(k);
    vector<Candidate> terminalMST;
    terminalMST.reserve(k - 1);

    for (const auto& c : pairEdges) {
        if (dsuTerm.unite(c.a, c.b)) {
            terminalMST.push_back(c);
            if (static_cast<int>(terminalMST.size()) == k - 1) break;
        }
    }

    if (static_cast<int>(terminalMST.size()) != k - 1) {
        cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    vector<char> inSubgraph(m, false);

    auto addPathToOwner = [&](int x) {
        while (x >= 0 && parent[x] != -1) {
            int eid = parentEdge[x];
            if (eid >= 0) inSubgraph[eid] = true;
            x = parent[x];
        }
    };

    for (const auto& c : terminalMST) {
        addPathToOwner(c.u);
        inSubgraph[c.bridgeEdge] = true;
        addPathToOwner(c.v);
    }

    vector<int> subEdges;
    subEdges.reserve(m);
    for (int id = 0; id < m; ++id) {
        if (inSubgraph[id]) subEdges.push_back(id);
    }

    sort(subEdges.begin(), subEdges.end(), [&](int x, int y) {
        if (edges[x].w != edges[y].w) return edges[x].w < edges[y].w;
        return x < y;
    });

    DSU dsuNode(n);
    vector<int> treeEdges;
    treeEdges.reserve(subEdges.size());

    for (int id : subEdges) {
        if (dsuNode.unite(edges[id].u, edges[id].v)) {
            treeEdges.push_back(id);
        }
    }

    int rootComp = dsuNode.find(terminals[0]);
    for (int t : terminals) {
        if (dsuNode.find(t) != rootComp) {
            cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
            return 0;
        }
    }

    vector<char> active(m, false);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> treeAdj(n);
    vector<int> degree(n, 0);

    for (int id : treeEdges) {
        active[id] = true;
        int u = edges[id].u;
        int v = edges[id].v;
        treeAdj[u].push_back({v, id});
        treeAdj[v].push_back({u, id});
        ++degree[u];
        ++degree[v];
    }

    queue<int> q;
    for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
        if (!isTerminal[v] && degree[v] == 1) {
            q.push(v);
        }
    }

    while (!q.empty()) {
        int v = q.front();
        q.pop();

        if (isTerminal[v] || degree[v] != 1) continue;

        int remEdge = -1;
        int nei = -1;
        for (const auto& [to, eid] : treeAdj[v]) {
            if (active[eid]) {
                remEdge = eid;
                nei = to;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (remEdge == -1) {
            degree[v] = 0;
            continue;
        }

        active[remEdge] = false;
        --degree[v];
        --degree[nei];

        if (!isTerminal[nei] && degree[nei] == 1) {
            q.push(nei);
        }
    }

    vector<int> finalEdges;
    finalEdges.reserve(treeEdges.size());
    long long totalWeight = 0;

    for (int id : treeEdges) {
        if (active[id]) {
            finalEdges.push_back(id);
            totalWeight += edges[id].w;
        }
    }

    DSU finalCheck(n);
    for (int id : finalEdges) {
        finalCheck.unite(edges[id].u, edges[id].v);
    }

    int r0 = finalCheck.find(terminals[0]);
    for (int t : terminals) {
        if (finalCheck.find(t) != r0) {
            cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
            return 0;
        }
    }

    cout << totalWeight << ' ' << finalEdges.size() << '\n';
    for (int id : finalEdges) {
        cout << edges[id].u << ' ' << edges[id].v << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}

View C++ Code (8228 chars)
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <numeric>
#include <queue>
#include <tuple>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct Edge {
    int u;
    int v;
    long long w;
};

struct AdjEdge {
    int to;
    long long w;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> p;
    vector<int> r;

    explicit DSU(int n = 0) {
        init(n);
    }

    void init(int n) {
        p.resize(n);
        r.assign(n, 0);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        while (p[x] != x) {
            p[x] = p[p[x]];
            x = p[x];
        }
        return x;
    }

    bool unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return false;
        if (r[a] < r[b]) swap(a, b);
        p[b] = a;
        if (r[a] == r[b]) ++r[a];
        return true;
    }
};

struct Candidate {
    int a;
    int b;
    long long cost;
    int u;
    int v;
    int bridgeEdge;
};

static const long long INF = numeric_limits<long long>::max() / 4;

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n, m, kInput;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m >> kInput)) {
        return 0;
    }

    vector<Edge> edges;
    edges.reserve(m);
    vector<vector<AdjEdge>> g(n);

    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        long long w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        edges.push_back({u, v, w});
        g[u].push_back({v, w, i});
        g[v].push_back({u, w, i});
    }

    vector<int> terminals(kInput);
    for (int i = 0; i < kInput; ++i) {
        cin >> terminals[i];
    }

    sort(terminals.begin(), terminals.end());
    terminals.erase(unique(terminals.begin(), terminals.end()), terminals.end());
    const int k = static_cast<int>(terminals.size());

    if (k <= 1) {
        cout << 0 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    vector<char> isTerminal(n, false);
    for (int t : terminals) isTerminal[t] = true;

    vector<long long> dist(n, INF);
    vector<int> owner(n, -1);
    vector<int> parent(n, -1);
    vector<int> parentEdge(n, -1);

    using State = tuple<long long, int, int>; // dist, owner, vertex
    priority_queue<State, vector<State>, greater<State>> pq;

    for (int i = 0; i < k; ++i) {
        int s = terminals[i];
        if (0 < dist[s] || (dist[s] == 0 && (owner[s] == -1 || i < owner[s]))) {
            dist[s] = 0;
            owner[s] = i;
            parent[s] = -1;
            parentEdge[s] = -1;
            pq.push({0, i, s});
        }
    }

    while (!pq.empty()) {
        auto [d, own, v] = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        if (d != dist[v] || own != owner[v]) continue;

        for (const auto& e : g[v]) {
            if (d > INF - e.w) continue;
            long long nd = d + e.w;
            int to = e.to;
            if (nd < dist[to] || (nd == dist[to] && (owner[to] == -1 || own < owner[to]))) {
                dist[to] = nd;
                owner[to] = own;
                parent[to] = v;
                parentEdge[to] = e.id;
                pq.push({nd, own, to});
            }
        }
    }

    vector<Candidate> candidates;
    candidates.reserve(m);

    for (int id = 0; id < m; ++id) {
        int u = edges[id].u;
        int v = edges[id].v;
        int a = owner[u];
        int b = owner[v];
        if (a < 0 || b < 0 || a == b) continue;
        if (dist[u] >= INF || dist[v] >= INF) continue;

        int uu = u;
        int vv = v;
        if (a > b) {
            swap(a, b);
            swap(uu, vv);
        }

        long long cost = dist[uu] + edges[id].w + dist[vv];
        candidates.push_back({a, b, cost, uu, vv, id});
    }

    sort(candidates.begin(), candidates.end(), [](const Candidate& x, const Candidate& y) {
        if (x.a != y.a) return x.a < y.a;
        if (x.b != y.b) return x.b < y.b;
        if (x.cost != y.cost) return x.cost < y.cost;
        return x.bridgeEdge < y.bridgeEdge;
    });

    vector<Candidate> pairEdges;
    pairEdges.reserve(candidates.size());
    for (size_t i = 0; i < candidates.size();) {
        size_t j = i;
        Candidate best = candidates[i];
        while (j < candidates.size() && candidates[j].a == candidates[i].a && candidates[j].b == candidates[i].b) {
            if (candidates[j].cost < best.cost ||
                (candidates[j].cost == best.cost && candidates[j].bridgeEdge < best.bridgeEdge)) {
                best = candidates[j];
            }
            ++j;
        }
        pairEdges.push_back(best);
        i = j;
    }

    sort(pairEdges.begin(), pairEdges.end(), [](const Candidate& x, const Candidate& y) {
        if (x.cost != y.cost) return x.cost < y.cost;
        if (x.a != y.a) return x.a < y.a;
        if (x.b != y.b) return x.b < y.b;
        return x.bridgeEdge < y.bridgeEdge;
    });

    DSU dsuTerm(k);
    vector<Candidate> terminalMST;
    terminalMST.reserve(k - 1);

    for (const auto& c : pairEdges) {
        if (dsuTerm.unite(c.a, c.b)) {
            terminalMST.push_back(c);
            if (static_cast<int>(terminalMST.size()) == k - 1) break;
        }
    }

    if (static_cast<int>(terminalMST.size()) != k - 1) {
        cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    vector<char> inSubgraph(m, false);

    auto addPathToOwner = [&](int x) {
        while (x >= 0 && parent[x] != -1) {
            int eid = parentEdge[x];
            if (eid >= 0) inSubgraph[eid] = true;
            x = parent[x];
        }
    };

    for (const auto& c : terminalMST) {
        addPathToOwner(c.u);
        inSubgraph[c.bridgeEdge] = true;
        addPathToOwner(c.v);
    }

    vector<int> subEdges;
    subEdges.reserve(m);
    for (int id = 0; id < m; ++id) {
        if (inSubgraph[id]) subEdges.push_back(id);
    }

    sort(subEdges.begin(), subEdges.end(), [&](int x, int y) {
        if (edges[x].w != edges[y].w) return edges[x].w < edges[y].w;
        return x < y;
    });

    DSU dsuNode(n);
    vector<int> treeEdges;
    treeEdges.reserve(subEdges.size());

    for (int id : subEdges) {
        if (dsuNode.unite(edges[id].u, edges[id].v)) {
            treeEdges.push_back(id);
        }
    }

    int rootComp = dsuNode.find(terminals[0]);
    for (int t : terminals) {
        if (dsuNode.find(t) != rootComp) {
            cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
            return 0;
        }
    }

    vector<char> active(m, false);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> treeAdj(n);
    vector<int> degree(n, 0);

    for (int id : treeEdges) {
        active[id] = true;
        int u = edges[id].u;
        int v = edges[id].v;
        treeAdj[u].push_back({v, id});
        treeAdj[v].push_back({u, id});
        ++degree[u];
        ++degree[v];
    }

    queue<int> q;
    for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
        if (!isTerminal[v] && degree[v] == 1) {
            q.push(v);
        }
    }

    while (!q.empty()) {
        int v = q.front();
        q.pop();

        if (isTerminal[v] || degree[v] != 1) continue;

        int remEdge = -1;
        int nei = -1;
        for (const auto& [to, eid] : treeAdj[v]) {
            if (active[eid]) {
                remEdge = eid;
                nei = to;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (remEdge == -1) {
            degree[v] = 0;
            continue;
        }

        active[remEdge] = false;
        --degree[v];
        --degree[nei];

        if (!isTerminal[nei] && degree[nei] == 1) {
            q.push(nei);
        }
    }

    vector<int> finalEdges;
    finalEdges.reserve(treeEdges.size());
    long long totalWeight = 0;

    for (int id : treeEdges) {
        if (active[id]) {
            finalEdges.push_back(id);
            totalWeight += edges[id].w;
        }
    }

    DSU finalCheck(n);
    for (int id : finalEdges) {
        finalCheck.unite(edges[id].u, edges[id].v);
    }

    int r0 = finalCheck.find(terminals[0]);
    for (int t : terminals) {
        if (finalCheck.find(t) != r0) {
            cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
            return 0;
        }
    }

    cout << totalWeight << ' ' << finalEdges.size() << '\n';
    for (int id : finalEdges) {
        cout << edges[id].u << ' ' << edges[id].v << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}

View C++ Code (8228 chars)
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <numeric>
#include <queue>
#include <tuple>
#include <vector>

using namespace std;

struct Edge {
    int u;
    int v;
    long long w;
};

struct AdjEdge {
    int to;
    long long w;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> p;
    vector<int> r;

    explicit DSU(int n = 0) {
        init(n);
    }

    void init(int n) {
        p.resize(n);
        r.assign(n, 0);
        iota(p.begin(), p.end(), 0);
    }

    int find(int x) {
        while (p[x] != x) {
            p[x] = p[p[x]];
            x = p[x];
        }
        return x;
    }

    bool unite(int a, int b) {
        a = find(a);
        b = find(b);
        if (a == b) return false;
        if (r[a] < r[b]) swap(a, b);
        p[b] = a;
        if (r[a] == r[b]) ++r[a];
        return true;
    }
};

struct Candidate {
    int a;
    int b;
    long long cost;
    int u;
    int v;
    int bridgeEdge;
};

static const long long INF = numeric_limits<long long>::max() / 4;

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n, m, kInput;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m >> kInput)) {
        return 0;
    }

    vector<Edge> edges;
    edges.reserve(m);
    vector<vector<AdjEdge>> g(n);

    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        long long w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        edges.push_back({u, v, w});
        g[u].push_back({v, w, i});
        g[v].push_back({u, w, i});
    }

    vector<int> terminals(kInput);
    for (int i = 0; i < kInput; ++i) {
        cin >> terminals[i];
    }

    sort(terminals.begin(), terminals.end());
    terminals.erase(unique(terminals.begin(), terminals.end()), terminals.end());
    const int k = static_cast<int>(terminals.size());

    if (k <= 1) {
        cout << 0 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    vector<char> isTerminal(n, false);
    for (int t : terminals) isTerminal[t] = true;

    vector<long long> dist(n, INF);
    vector<int> owner(n, -1);
    vector<int> parent(n, -1);
    vector<int> parentEdge(n, -1);

    using State = tuple<long long, int, int>; // dist, owner, vertex
    priority_queue<State, vector<State>, greater<State>> pq;

    for (int i = 0; i < k; ++i) {
        int s = terminals[i];
        if (0 < dist[s] || (dist[s] == 0 && (owner[s] == -1 || i < owner[s]))) {
            dist[s] = 0;
            owner[s] = i;
            parent[s] = -1;
            parentEdge[s] = -1;
            pq.push({0, i, s});
        }
    }

    while (!pq.empty()) {
        auto [d, own, v] = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        if (d != dist[v] || own != owner[v]) continue;

        for (const auto& e : g[v]) {
            if (d > INF - e.w) continue;
            long long nd = d + e.w;
            int to = e.to;
            if (nd < dist[to] || (nd == dist[to] && (owner[to] == -1 || own < owner[to]))) {
                dist[to] = nd;
                owner[to] = own;
                parent[to] = v;
                parentEdge[to] = e.id;
                pq.push({nd, own, to});
            }
        }
    }

    vector<Candidate> candidates;
    candidates.reserve(m);

    for (int id = 0; id < m; ++id) {
        int u = edges[id].u;
        int v = edges[id].v;
        int a = owner[u];
        int b = owner[v];
        if (a < 0 || b < 0 || a == b) continue;
        if (dist[u] >= INF || dist[v] >= INF) continue;

        int uu = u;
        int vv = v;
        if (a > b) {
            swap(a, b);
            swap(uu, vv);
        }

        long long cost = dist[uu] + edges[id].w + dist[vv];
        candidates.push_back({a, b, cost, uu, vv, id});
    }

    sort(candidates.begin(), candidates.end(), [](const Candidate& x, const Candidate& y) {
        if (x.a != y.a) return x.a < y.a;
        if (x.b != y.b) return x.b < y.b;
        if (x.cost != y.cost) return x.cost < y.cost;
        return x.bridgeEdge < y.bridgeEdge;
    });

    vector<Candidate> pairEdges;
    pairEdges.reserve(candidates.size());
    for (size_t i = 0; i < candidates.size();) {
        size_t j = i;
        Candidate best = candidates[i];
        while (j < candidates.size() && candidates[j].a == candidates[i].a && candidates[j].b == candidates[i].b) {
            if (candidates[j].cost < best.cost ||
                (candidates[j].cost == best.cost && candidates[j].bridgeEdge < best.bridgeEdge)) {
                best = candidates[j];
            }
            ++j;
        }
        pairEdges.push_back(best);
        i = j;
    }

    sort(pairEdges.begin(), pairEdges.end(), [](const Candidate& x, const Candidate& y) {
        if (x.cost != y.cost) return x.cost < y.cost;
        if (x.a != y.a) return x.a < y.a;
        if (x.b != y.b) return x.b < y.b;
        return x.bridgeEdge < y.bridgeEdge;
    });

    DSU dsuTerm(k);
    vector<Candidate> terminalMST;
    terminalMST.reserve(k - 1);

    for (const auto& c : pairEdges) {
        if (dsuTerm.unite(c.a, c.b)) {
            terminalMST.push_back(c);
            if (static_cast<int>(terminalMST.size()) == k - 1) break;
        }
    }

    if (static_cast<int>(terminalMST.size()) != k - 1) {
        cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
        return 0;
    }

    vector<char> inSubgraph(m, false);

    auto addPathToOwner = [&](int x) {
        while (x >= 0 && parent[x] != -1) {
            int eid = parentEdge[x];
            if (eid >= 0) inSubgraph[eid] = true;
            x = parent[x];
        }
    };

    for (const auto& c : terminalMST) {
        addPathToOwner(c.u);
        inSubgraph[c.bridgeEdge] = true;
        addPathToOwner(c.v);
    }

    vector<int> subEdges;
    subEdges.reserve(m);
    for (int id = 0; id < m; ++id) {
        if (inSubgraph[id]) subEdges.push_back(id);
    }

    sort(subEdges.begin(), subEdges.end(), [&](int x, int y) {
        if (edges[x].w != edges[y].w) return edges[x].w < edges[y].w;
        return x < y;
    });

    DSU dsuNode(n);
    vector<int> treeEdges;
    treeEdges.reserve(subEdges.size());

    for (int id : subEdges) {
        if (dsuNode.unite(edges[id].u, edges[id].v)) {
            treeEdges.push_back(id);
        }
    }

    int rootComp = dsuNode.find(terminals[0]);
    for (int t : terminals) {
        if (dsuNode.find(t) != rootComp) {
            cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
            return 0;
        }
    }

    vector<char> active(m, false);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> treeAdj(n);
    vector<int> degree(n, 0);

    for (int id : treeEdges) {
        active[id] = true;
        int u = edges[id].u;
        int v = edges[id].v;
        treeAdj[u].push_back({v, id});
        treeAdj[v].push_back({u, id});
        ++degree[u];
        ++degree[v];
    }

    queue<int> q;
    for (int v = 0; v < n; ++v) {
        if (!isTerminal[v] && degree[v] == 1) {
            q.push(v);
        }
    }

    while (!q.empty()) {
        int v = q.front();
        q.pop();

        if (isTerminal[v] || degree[v] != 1) continue;

        int remEdge = -1;
        int nei = -1;
        for (const auto& [to, eid] : treeAdj[v]) {
            if (active[eid]) {
                remEdge = eid;
                nei = to;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (remEdge == -1) {
            degree[v] = 0;
            continue;
        }

        active[remEdge] = false;
        --degree[v];
        --degree[nei];

        if (!isTerminal[nei] && degree[nei] == 1) {
            q.push(nei);
        }
    }

    vector<int> finalEdges;
    finalEdges.reserve(treeEdges.size());
    long long totalWeight = 0;

    for (int id : treeEdges) {
        if (active[id]) {
            finalEdges.push_back(id);
            totalWeight += edges[id].w;
        }
    }

    DSU finalCheck(n);
    for (int id : finalEdges) {
        finalCheck.unite(edges[id].u, edges[id].v);
    }

    int r0 = finalCheck.find(terminals[0]);
    for (int t : terminals) {
        if (finalCheck.find(t) != r0) {
            cout << -1 << ' ' << 0 << '\n';
            return 0;
        }
    }

    cout << totalWeight << ' ' << finalEdges.size() << '\n';
    for (int id : finalEdges) {
        cout << edges[id].u << ' ' << edges[id].v << '\n';
    }

    return 0;
}
